title: Turnpike with Uncertain Measurements: Triangle-Equality ILP with a Deterministic Recovery Guarantee
summary: We study Turnpike with uncertain measurements: reconstructing a one-dimensional point set from an unlabeled multiset of pairwise distances under bounded noise and rounding. We give a combinatorial characterization of realizability via a multi-matching that labels interval indices by distinct distance values while satisfying all triangle equalities. This yields an ILP based on the triangle equality whose constraint structure depends only on the two-partition set $\mathcal{P}_y=\{(r,s,t): y_r+y_s=y_t\}$ and a natural LP relaxation with $\{0,1\}$-coefficient constraints. Integral solutions certify realizability and output an explicit assignment matrix, enabling an assignment-first, regression-second pipeline for downstream coordinate estimation. Under bounded noise followed by rounding, we prove a deterministic separation condition under which $\mathcal{P}_y$ is recovered exactly, so the ILP/LP receives the same combinatorial input as in the noiseless case. Experiments illustrate integrality behavior and degradation outside the provable regime.

AI.tldr: 研究如何在有噪声和取整情况下从无标签的成对距离重构一维点集。通过多匹配组合特征化实现性，提出基于三角形等式的ILP和LP松弛方法，在确定性分离条件下可精确恢复。
AI.motivation: 解决Turnpike问题在测量不确定情况下的挑战，实现从噪声和取整后的无标签成对距离数据中准确重构一维点集。
AI.method: 提出多匹配组合特征化方法，标签区间索引distinct距离值并满足所有三角形等式；构建基于集合P_y的ILP和自然LP松弛。
AI.result: 在有界噪声后取整条件下，证明了确定性分离条件可精确恢复P_y，使ILP/LP接收与无噪声情况相同的组合输入。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分配优先、回归第二的管道实现下游坐标估计，实验验证了可积性行为和在可证明 regime 外的退化情况。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses the mathematical Turnpike problem - reconstructing 1D point sets from pairwise distances using optimization methods (ILP/LP). This is a pure mathematics/theoretical computer science problem with no connection to Computer Graphics, video generation, 3D motion synthesis, or any of the specified pain points. Even though "distance" is mentioned, the application domain is completely different - it's about 1D geometric reconstruction theory, not visual computing or motion synthesis.

title: Central Triangulation under Parallel Flip Operations: The CG:SHOP Challenge 2026
summary: We give an overview of the 2026 Computational Geometry Challenge targeting the problem of finding a Central Triangulation under Parallel Flip Operations in triangulations of point sets. A flip is the parallel exchange of a set of edges in a triangulation with opposing diagonals of the convex quadrilaterals containing them. The challenge objective was, given a set of triangulations of a fixed point set, to determine a central triangulation with respect to parallel flip distances. More precisely, this asks for a triangulation that minimizes the sum of flip distances to all elements of the input

AI.tldr: 2026计算几何挑战赛概述，针对点集三角剖分中的平行翻转操作下的中心三角剖分问题。挑战目标是给定一个点集的一组三角剖分，确定一个相对于平行翻转距离的中心三角剖分，即与所有输入三角剖分的翻转距离之和最小的三角剖分。
AI.motivation: 计算几何中三角剖分的Flip操作是重要的研究问题，平行翻转允许同时交换多个边。寻找"中心三角剖分"对于理解三角剖分空间的几何结构具有重要意义，但也是一个具有挑战性的优化问题。
AI.method: 通过平行翻转操作来度量三角剖分之间的距离。翻转是指在包含边的凸四边形中，用对角线交换一组边。目标是最小化一个三角剖分到所有输入三角剖分的翻转距离之和。
AI.result: 文章给出了挑战赛的概述，包括问题定义、评估标准和可能的算法方法。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛推动了平行翻转操作下中心三角剖分问题的研究，为计算几何领域相关问题的进一步探索提供了基准和方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about computational geometry (triangulation optimization using flip operations) - completely different application domain from the research profile. The profile focuses on AI/ML-driven video generation, 3D motion synthesis, and vision-language models, while this paper addresses classical geometry problems in triangulation. No overlap in methods or application areas despite both being technically under "Computer Graphics" as a broad field.

title: Hardness of High-Dimensional Linear Classification
summary: We establish new exponential in dimension lower bounds for the Maximum Halfspace Discrepancy problem, which models linear classification. Both are fundamental problems in computational geometry and machine learning in their exact and approximate forms. However, only $O(n^d)$ and respectively $\tilde O(1/\varepsilon^d)$ upper bounds are known and complemented by polynomial lower bounds that do not support the exponential in dimension dependence. We close this gap up to polylogarithmic terms by reduction from widely-believed hardness conjectures for Affine Degeneracy testing and $k$-Sum problems. Our reductions yield matching lower bounds of $\tildeΩ(n^d)$ and respectively $\tildeΩ(1/\varepsilon^d)$ based on Affine Degeneracy testing, and $\tildeΩ(n^{d/2})$ and respectively $\tildeΩ(1/\varepsilon^{d/2})$ conditioned on $k$-Sum. The first bound also holds unconditionally if the computational model is restricted to make sidedness queries, which corresponds to a widely spread setting implemented and optimized in many contemporary algorithms and computing paradigms.

AI.tldr: 论文建立了最大半空间偏差问题的指数级维度下界，填补了已知上界与下界之间的gap，基于仿射退化测试和k-Sum问题的困难性假设。
AI.motivation: 最大半空间偏差问题和线性分类是计算几何和机器学习中的基础问题，只有已知的上界O(n^d)和tilde O(1/ε^d)，缺乏支持指数维度依赖的多项式下界。
AI.method: 通过从广泛认为困难的仿射退化测试问题和k-Sum问题进行归约，证明这些问题的下界。
AI.result: 基于仿射退化测试得到tildeΩ(n^d)和tildeΩ(1/ε^d)的匹配下界；基于k-Sum得到tildeΩ(n^{d/2})和tildeΩ(1/ε^{d/2})的下界。如果限制计算模型只进行单侧查询，第一个下界无条件成立。
AI.conclusion: 解决了最大半空间偏差问题的维度依赖下界问题，证明了tildeΩ(n^d)和tildeΩ(1/ε^d)的下界，与已知上界匹配，封闭了gap（到多对数项）。

relevance_reason: This paper is about theoretical computer science and computational complexity (hardness of high-dimensional linear classification, max-halfspace discrepancy, k-Sum problem). It has absolutely no relevance to the research profile in Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on video generation models, 3D motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion - all applied computer graphics/AI topics. This is a pure theory paper with a completely different application domain.

title: DEAF: A Benchmark for Diagnostic Evaluation of Acoustic Faithfulness in Audio Language Models
summary: Recent Audio Multimodal Large Language Models (Audio MLLMs) demonstrate impressive performance on speech benchmarks, yet it remains unclear whether these models genuinely process acoustic signals or rely on text-based semantic inference. To systematically study this question, we introduce DEAF (Diagnostic Evaluation of Acoustic Faithfulness), a benchmark of over 2,700 conflict stimuli spanning three acoustic dimensions: emotional prosody, background sounds, and speaker identity. Then, we design a controlled multi-level evaluation framework that progressively increases textual influence, ranging from semantic conflicts in the content to misleading prompts and their combination, allowing us to disentangle content-driven bias from prompt-induced sycophancy. We further introduce diagnostic metrics to quantify model reliance on textual cues over acoustic signals. Our evaluation of seven Audio MLLMs reveals a consistent pattern of text dominance: models are sensitive to acoustic variations, yet predictions are predominantly driven by textual inputs, revealing a gap between high performance on standard speech benchmarks and genuine acoustic understanding.

AI.tldr: DEAF是一个用于诊断音频多模态大语言模型(Audio MLLMs)是否真正处理声学信号的基准测试，通过2700多个冲突刺激样本和渐进式文本影响评估框架，揭示当前模型普遍存在文本主导问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Audio MLLMs在语音基准测试上表现优异，但尚不清楚这些模型是真正处理声学信号还是仅依赖文本语义推理。研究目的是系统性地探究这一关键问题。
AI.method: 构建DEAF基准测试(包含情感韵律、背景声音、说话人身份三个声学维度的2700多个冲突刺激)；设计可控的多级评估框架，逐步增加文本影响力(从语义冲突到误导性提示)；引入诊断指标量化模型对文本线索 vs 声学信号的依赖程度。
AI.result: 对7个Audio MLLMs的评估揭示了一致的文本主导模式：模型对声学变化敏感，但预测主要由文本输入驱动。
AI.conclusion: 当前Audio MLLMs在标准语音基准测试的高性能与真正理解声学信号之间存在显著差距，模型普遍依赖文本线索而非真正的声学理解。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Audio Language Models (Audio MLLMs) and acoustic signal processing, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics research profile focused on 3D motion generation from 2D video. The application domain is entirely different - audio processing vs video/3D motion synthesis. While both involve multimodal models, they deal with different modalities (audio vs visual/3D). The pain points and methods are not applicable: this paper addresses text-dominance in audio models, not visual-to-3D motion extraction or video generation quality control. Even though both use benchmark evaluation frameworks, the core application domains are completely mismatched.

title: Continually self-improving AI
summary: Modern language model-based AI systems are remarkably powerful, yet their capabilities remain fundamentally capped by their human creators in three key ways. First, although a model's weights can be updated via fine-tuning, acquiring new knowledge from small, specialized corpora after pretraining remains highly data-inefficient. Second, the training of these systems relies heavily on finite, human-generated data from across history. Third, the pipelines used to train AI models are confined by the algorithms that human researchers can discover and explore. This thesis takes a small step toward overcoming these inherent limitations, presenting three chapters aimed at breaking these dependencies to create continually self-improving AI. First, to overcome this data-efficiency barrier in knowledge acquisition, we propose a synthetic data approach that diversifies and amplifies small corpora into rich knowledge representations, enabling a model to effectively update its parameters from limited source material. Second, to reduce reliance on human data, we show that given a fixed amount of such data, the model can self-generate synthetic data to bootstrap its fundamental pretraining capabilities without distillation from any off-the-shelf, instruction-tuned LM. Finally, to transcend human-engineered training paradigms, we demonstrate that by scaling search during test time over the space of algorithms, AI can search over a larger space of learning algorithm configurations than human researchers can explore manually.

AI.tldr: 本文提出三个研究方向，旨在打破语言模型对人类创造者的三大依赖：数据效率限制、人类数据依赖和人类设计的训练范式。通过合成数据增强、自生成数据预训练和算法空间搜索测试，实现AI系统的持续自我改进。
AI.motivation: 现代语言模型的能力受到三个关键限制：1) 从小规模专业语料库获取新知识数据效率低；2) 训练依赖有限的人类历史数据；3) 训练算法受限于人类研究者能发现和探索的范围。这些限制阻碍了AI的持续自我改进。
AI.method: 提出三个解决方案：1) 合成数据方法：将小规模语料库多样化和增强为丰富的知识表示；2) 自生成合成数据：在固定人类数据量下，模型自生成合成数据进行预训练，无需蒸馏现有指令微调模型；3) 算法空间搜索：在测试时扩展搜索算法配置空间。
AI.result: 1) 使模型能够从有限源材料有效更新参数；2) 模型可在无蒸馏情况下自举基础预训练能力；3) AI可探索比人类研究者手动探索更广泛的学习算法配置空间。
AI.conclusion: 通过这三个方向的研究，可以逐步打破AI系统对人类创造者的依赖，向构建持续自我改进的AI系统迈出小而重要的步伐。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Large Language Models (LLMs) and their self-improvement capabilities, focusing on synthetic data for NLP tasks and algorithm space search. It has NO relevance to the research profile which is in Computer Graphics specifically focused on: 1) 3D motion extraction from 2D video, 2) Video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3) 3D motion synthesis, and 4) visual feature extraction for motion generation. The application domain is completely different - LLMs/NLP vs Computer Graphics/3D motion generation. The methods (LLM training paradigms) are entirely unrelated to video generation models and 3D motion synthesis. This is a paper about AI research methodology for language models, not computer graphics or motion generation.

title: MemArchitect: A Policy Driven Memory Governance Layer
comment: This is an on going research work and will be updated periodically
summary:
Persistent Large Language Model (LLM) agents expose a critical governance gap in memory management. Standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks treat memory as passive storage, lacking mechanisms to resolve contradictions, enforce privacy, or prevent outdated information ("zombie memories") from contaminating the context window.
  We introduce MemArchitect, a governance layer that decouples memory lifecycle management from model weights. MemArchitect enforces explicit, rule-based policies, including memory decay, conflict resolution, and privacy controls.
  We demonstrate that governed memory consistently outperforms unmanaged memory in agentic settings, highlighting the necessity of structured memory governance for reliable and safe autonomous systems.

AI.tldr: MemArchitect是一个治理层，用于解决持久性LLM智能体中内存管理的治理缺陷。它将内存生命周期管理与模型权重解耦，并强制执行明确的基于规则的策略，包括内存衰减、冲突解决和隐私控制。
AI.motivation: 标准RAG框架将内存视为被动存储，缺乏解决矛盾、执行隐私保护或防止过时信息（"僵尸记忆"）污染上下文窗口的机制，导致持久性LLM智能体存在关键治理漏洞。
AI.method: 引入MemArchitect治理层，通过明确的规则策略管理内存生命周期，实现内存衰减、冲突解决和隐私控制功能，并与模型权重解耦。
AI.result: 在智能体设置中，受治理的内存始终优于未管理的内存，证明了结构化内存治理对于可靠和安全的自治系统的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化内存治理对于构建可靠和安全的自主系统至关重要，MemArchitect为LLM智能体中的内存管理提供了有效的治理解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agent memory governance - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It addresses memory management for persistent LLM agents (memory decay, conflict resolution, privacy control), not video generation, 3D motion synthesis, or visual feature extraction. The application domain is AI agents, not computer graphics or 3D motion generation from video.

title: Multi-Trait Subspace Steering to Reveal the Dark Side of Human-AI Interaction
summary: Recent incidents have highlighted alarming cases where human-AI interactions led to negative psychological outcomes, including mental health crises and even user harm. As LLMs serve as sources of guidance, emotional support, and even informal therapy, these risks are poised to escalate. However, studying the mechanisms underlying harmful human-AI interactions presents significant methodological challenges, where organic harmful interactions typically develop over sustained engagement, requiring extensive conversational context that are difficult to simulate in controlled settings. To address this gap, we developed a Multi-Trait Subspace Steering (MultiTraitsss) framework that leverages established crisis-associated traits and novel subspace steering framework to generate Dark models that exhibits cumulative harmful behavioral patterns. Single-turn and multi-turn evaluations show that our dark models consistently produce harmful interaction and outcomes. Using our Dark models, we propose protective measure to reduce harmful outcomes in Human-AI interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Multi-Traitss框架，通过结合危机相关特征和新型子空间引导技术，生成具有累积有害行为模式的"黑暗模型"，以研究和预防人机交互中的负面心理结果。
AI.motivation: 近期人机交互事件引发关注，LLM作为指导、情感支持甚至非正式治疗来源，这些风险可能进一步升级。然而，研究有害人机交互的机制面临重大方法论挑战：有机有害交互通常在持续互动中发展，需要广泛的对话上下文，在受控环境中难以模拟。
AI.method: 开发了Multi-Traitss (Multi-Trait Subspace Steering)框架，利用已建立的危机相关特征和新型子空间引导框架来生成黑暗模型。
AI.result: 单轮和多轮评估表明，黑暗模型持续产生有害交互和负面结果。
AI.conclusion: 使用黑暗模型提出保护措施，以减少人机交互中的有害结果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM safety, AI alignment, and studying harmful human-AI interaction patterns. It is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation from video, video generation models (like Seedance/Wanxiang), or visual feature extraction for 3D motion synthesis. The application domain is entirely different - this is psychology/AI safety research while the profile is about computer graphics and motion generation.

title: DarkDriving: A Real-World Day and Night Aligned Dataset for Autonomous Driving in the Dark Environment
summary: The low-light conditions are challenging to the vision-centric perception systems for autonomous driving in the dark environment. In this paper, we propose a new benchmark dataset (named DarkDriving) to investigate the low-light enhancement for autonomous driving. The existing real-world low-light enhancement benchmark datasets can be collected by controlling various exposures only in small-ranges and static scenes. The dark images of the current nighttime driving datasets do not have the precisely aligned daytime counterparts. The extreme difficulty to collect a real-world day and night aligned dataset in the dynamic driving scenes significantly limited the research in this area. With a proposed automatic day-night Trajectory Tracking based Pose Matching (TTPM) method in a large real-world closed driving test field (area: 69 acres), we collected the first real-world day and night aligned dataset for autonomous driving in the dark environment. The DarkDriving dataset has 9,538 day and night image pairs precisely aligned in location and spatial contents, whose alignment error is in just several centimeters. For each pair, we also manually label the object 2D bounding boxes. DarkDriving introduces four perception related tasks, including low-light enhancement, generalized low-light enhancement, and low-light enhancement for 2D detection and 3D detection of autonomous driving in the dark environment. The experimental results show that our DarkDriving dataset provides a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating low-light enhancement for autonomous driving and it can also be generalized to enhance dark images and promote detection in some other low-light driving environment, such as nuScenes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为DarkDriving的新型基准数据集，用于自动驾驶的低光增强。现有的真实低光增强基准数据集只能在较小范围内控制曝光且在静态场景中采集，当前夜间驾驶数据集的暗图像没有精确对齐的白天对应物。在大型真实封闭驾驶测试场（面积69英亩）中，通过提出的自动昼夜轨迹跟踪姿态匹配（TTPM）方法，采集了首个自动驾驶黑暗环境下的真实昼夜对齐数据集。DarkDriving数据集包含9,538对精确对齐位置和空间内容的昼夜图像，对齐误差仅为几厘米。
AI.motivation: 低光条件对自动驾驶中基于视觉的感知系统构成挑战。现有的真实低光增强数据集只能在较小曝光范围内采集且为静态场景，当前夜间驾驶数据集的暗图像没有精确对齐的白天对应物。在动态驾驶场景中采集真实世界的昼夜对齐数据集极其困难，显著限制了这一领域的研究。
AI.method: 提出自动昼夜轨迹跟踪姿态匹配（TTPM）方法，在大型真实封闭驾驶测试场（面积69英亩）中采集数据。该方法能够自动匹配昼夜图像，实现精确对齐。
AI.result: DarkDriving数据集包含9,538对昼夜图像，精确对齐位置和空间内容，对齐误差仅为几厘米。每对图像都手动标注了目标2D边界框。数据集引入四个感知相关任务，包括低光增强、广义低光增强以及低光环境下的2D检测和3D检测。实验表明该数据集可泛化到nuScenes等其他低光驾驶环境。
AI.conclusion: DarkDriving数据集为评估自动驾驶低光增强提供了全面基准，并可泛化到其他低光驾驶环境（如nuScenes）进行暗图像增强和目标检测促进。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about autonomous driving in low-light conditions (computer vision for self-driving cars), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation from video priors. The application domains are entirely different - autonomous driving perception vs. 3D motion/pose generation. The paper does not address any of the pain points: extracting 3D motion from 2D video, video generation model quality control, visual guidance for 3D motion synthesis, or bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space. It uses no relevant methods (no diffusion models, no video generation models, no 3D motion generation).

title: Adaptive Domain Models: Bayesian Evolution, Warm Rotation, and Principled Training for Geometric and Neuromorphic AI
summary: Prevailing AI training infrastructure assumes reverse-mode automatic differentiation over IEEE-754 arithmetic. The memory overhead of training relative to inference, optimizer complexity, and structural degradation of geometric properties through training are consequences of this arithmetic substrate. This paper develops an alternative training architecture grounded in three prior results: the Dimensional Type System and Deterministic Memory Management framework [6], which establishes stack-eligible gradient allocation and exact quire accumulation as design-time verifiable properties; the Program Hypergraph [8], which establishes grade preservation through geometric algebra computations as a type-level invariant; and the b-posit 2026 standard [10], which makes posit arithmetic tractable across hardware targets conventionally considered inference-only. Their composition enables depth-independent training memory bounded to approximately twice the inference footprint, grade-preserving weight updates, and exact gradient accumulation, applicable uniformly to loss-function-optimized and spike-timing-dependent neuromorphic models. We introduce Bayesian distillation, a mechanism by which the latent prior structure of a general-purpose model is extracted through the ADM training regime, resolving the data-scarcity bootstrapping problem for domain-specific training. For deployment, we introduce warm rotation, an operational pattern in which an updated model transitions into an active inference pathway without service interruption, with structural correctness formalized through PHG certificates and signed version records. The result is a class of domain-specific AI systems that are smaller and more precise than general-purpose models, continuously adaptive, verifiably correct with respect to the physical structure of their domains, and initializable from existing models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种替代性AI训练架构，通过结合维度类型系统、程序超图和b-posit 2026标准，实现深度无关的训练内存（约为推理内存的两倍）、保grade权重更新和精确梯度累积，并引入贝叶斯蒸馏和warm rotation机制解决领域特定训练的数据稀缺和部署问题。
AI.motivation: 当前AI训练基础设施基于IEEE-754算术的反向模式自动微分，存在训练内存开销大于推理、optimizer复杂性高、训练过程中几何属性结构退化等问题。这些问题源于当前的算术底层架构，限制了AI系统在资源受限环境中的应用和持续适应性。
AI.method: 提出一种基于三个先前成果的组合训练架构：1）维度类型系统和确定性内存管理框架，实现栈式梯度分配和精确quire累积；2）程序超图，建立几何代数计算的grade保持作为类型级不变量；3）b-posit 2026标准，使posit算术在传统推理专用硬件上可行。引入贝叶斯蒸馏机制从通用模型提取潜在先验结构，解决领域特定训练的数据稀缺问题；warm rotation机制使更新后的模型无缝过渡到推理路径。
AI.result: 该架构实现了：深度无关的训练内存（约为推理内存的两倍）、保grade权重更新、精确梯度累积、适用于损失函数优化和时序依赖的神经形态模型、以及通过PHG证书和签名版本记录验证的结构正确性。

title: SSP-SAM: SAM with Semantic-Spatial Prompt for Referring Expression Segmentation
summary: The Segment Anything Model (SAM) excels at general image segmentation but has limited ability to understand natural language, which restricts its direct application in Referring Expression Segmentation (RES). Toward this end, we propose SSP-SAM, a framework that fully utilizes SAM's segmentation capabilities by integrating a Semantic-Spatial Prompt (SSP) encoder. Specifically, we incorporate both visual and linguistic attention adapters into the SSP encoder, which highlight salient objects within the visual features and discriminative phrases within the linguistic features. This design enhances the referent representation for the prompt generator, resulting in high-quality SSPs that enable SAM to generate precise masks guided by language. Although not specifically designed for Generalized RES (GRES), where the referent may correspond to zero, one, or multiple objects, SSP-SAM naturally supports this more flexible setting without additional modifications. Extensive experiments on widely used RES and GRES benchmarks confirm the superiority of our method. Notably, our approach generates segmentation masks of high quality, achieving strong precision even at strict thresholds such as Pr@0.9. Further evaluation on the PhraseCut dataset demonstrates improved performance in open-vocabulary scenarios compared to existing state-of-the-art RES methods. The code and checkpoints are available at: https://github.com/WayneTomas/SSP-SAM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SSP-SAM框架，通过引入语义-空间提示(SSP)编码器，将SAM的分割能力与语言理解相结合，用于指代表达分割任务。该方法整合视觉和语言注意力适配器，增强指代物表示，生成高质量提示引导SAM生成精确掩码。
AI.motivation: SAM在通用图像分割方面表现出色，但对自然语言理解能力有限，限制了其在指代表达分割(RES)中的直接应用。研究旨在充分利用SAM的分割能力，同时赋予其语言理解能力。
AI.method: 提出SSP-SAM框架，包含SSP编码器。该编码器整合视觉和语言注意力适配器：视觉适配器突出视觉特征中的显著物体，语言适配器突出语言特征中的区分性短语。这增强了提示生成器的指代物表示，生成高质量SSP引导SAM进行精确分割。
AI.result: 在广泛使用的RES和GRES基准数据集上验证了方法的优越性。在严格阈值(如Pr@0.9)下仍能实现高精度的分割掩码。在PhraseCut数据集上的评估表明，开放词汇场景下的性能优于现有最佳RES方法。
AI.conclusion: SSP-SAM无需额外修改即可自然支持广义指代表达分割(GRES)，处理零个、一个或多个指代对象的情况。实验表明该方法达到了最先进水平，代码和模型检查点已开源。

title: Reasonably reasoning AI agents can avoid game-theoretic failures in zero-shot, provably
summary: AI agents are increasingly deployed in interactive economic environments characterized by repeated AI-AI interactions. Despite AI agents' advanced capabilities, empirical studies reveal that such interactions often fail to stably induce a strategic equilibrium, such as a Nash equilibrium. Post-training methods have been proposed to induce a strategic equilibrium; however, it remains impractical to uniformly apply an alignment method across diverse, independently developed AI models in strategic settings. In this paper, we provide theoretical and empirical evidence that off-the-shelf reasoning AI agents can achieve Nash-like play zero-shot, without explicit post-training. Specifically, we prove that `reasonably reasoning' agents, i.e., agents capable of forming beliefs about others' strategies from previous observation and learning to best respond to these beliefs, eventually behave along almost every realized play path in a way that is weakly close to a Nash equilibrium of the continuation game. In addition, we relax the common-knowledge payoff assumption by allowing stage payoffs to be unknown and by having each agent observe only its own privately realized stochastic payoffs, and we show that we can still achieve the same on-path Nash convergence guarantee. We then empirically validate the proposed theories by simulating five game scenarios, ranging from a repeated prisoner's dilemma game to stylized repeated marketing promotion games. Our findings suggest that AI agents naturally exhibit such reasoning patterns and therefore attain stable equilibrium behaviors intrinsically, obviating the need for universal alignment procedures in many real-world strategic interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究无需显式后训练的情况下，推理型AI智能体是否能在零样本条件下实现近似纳什均衡的战略行为。理论上证明了"合理推理"智能体通过从历史观测中形成关于他人策略的信念并最佳响应，最终在几乎所有实现路径上弱收敛于延续博弈的纳什均衡。经验上通过五个重复博弈场景（从重复囚徒困境到营销推广博弈）验证了这一理论。
AI.motivation: 当前AI智能体在交互式经济环境中频繁部署，但即使具备先进能力，AI-AI交互往往无法稳定诱导战略均衡（如纳什均衡）。现有后训练方法虽能诱导均衡，但在多样化、独立开发的AI模型中难以统一应用。因此需要探索无需后训练即可实现均衡的内在机制。
AI.method: 理论证明：定义"合理推理"智能体（能从历史观测形成信念并最佳响应），证明其在几乎所有实现路径上的行为弱收敛于延续博弈的纳什均衡。放宽共同知识假设：允许阶段收益未知，智能体仅观察私人实现的随机收益。经验验证：模拟五个重复博弈场景。
AI.result: 理论证明：合理推理智能体在任意博弈中，无论支付函数是否已知，都能在实现路径上收敛至纳什均衡。经验验证：五类博弈场景（重复囚徒困境、重复蜈蚣博弈、重复性别战、重复协调博弈、重复营销推广博弈）的模拟结果支持理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 推理型AI智能体天然具备在战略交互中实现稳定均衡行为的内在能力，在许多现实世界战略交互场景中无需通用的对齐程序。这一发现对AI在经济学和博弈论领域的应用具有重要意义。

title: CytoSyn: a Foundation Diffusion Model for Histopathology -- Tech Report
comment: 21 pages, 5 figures, tech report, model page: https://huggingface.co/Owkin-Bioptimus/CytoSyn
summary: Computational pathology has made significant progress in recent years, fueling advances in both fundamental disease understanding and clinically ready tools. This evolution is driven by the availability of large amounts of digitized slides and specialized deep learning methods and models. Multiple self-supervised foundation feature extractors have been developed, enabling downstream predictive applications from cell segmentation to tumor sub-typing and survival analysis. In contrast, generative foundation models designed specifically for histopathology remain scarce. Such models could address tasks that are beyond the capabilities of feature extractors, such as virtual staining. In this paper, we introduce CytoSyn, a state-of-the-art foundation latent diffusion model that enables the guided generation of highly realistic and diverse histopathology H&E-stained images, as shown in an extensive benchmark. We explored methodological improvements, training set scaling, sampling strategies and slide-level overfitting, culminating in the improved CytoSyn-v2, and compared our work to PixCell, a state-of-the-art model, in an in-depth manner. This comparison highlighted the strong sensitivity of both diffusion models and performance metrics to preprocessing-specific details such as JPEG compression. Our model has been trained on a dataset obtained from more than 10,000 TCGA diagnostic whole-slide images of 32 different cancer types. Despite being trained only on oncology slides, it maintains state-of-the-art performance generating inflammatory bowel disease images. To support the research community, we publicly release CytoSyn's weights, its training and validation datasets, and a sample of synthetic images in this repository: https://huggingface.co/Owkin-Bioptimus/CytoSyn.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了CytoSyn，一个用于组织病理学图像生成的基础潜在扩散模型，能够生成高质量、多样化的H&E染色组织病理图像。模型在超过10,000个TCGA诊断全切片图像上训练，可生成32种不同癌症类型的图像。
AI.motivation: 计算病理学近年来取得显著进展，但主要用于特征提取的自我监督基础模型较多，而专门为组织病理学设计的生成式基础模型较为稀缺。现有特征提取器无法完成虚拟染色等任务，因此需要开发专门的生成式基础模型。
AI.method: 提出CytoSyn-v2模型，采用潜在扩散模型架构，通过方法改进、训练集扩展、采样策略优化和切片级过拟合处理等技术手段提升性能，并与PixCell模型进行深入对比分析。
AI.result: CytoSyn在生成逼真多样的H&E染色组织病理图像方面达到最先进水平。模型在仅使用肿瘤切片训练的情况下，仍能有效生成炎症性肠病图像，展示了良好的泛化能力。研究还发现扩散模型和性能指标对JPEG压缩等预处理细节高度敏感。
AI.conclusion: 成功开发了CytoSyn-v2这一最先进的基础潜在扩散模型，为组织病理学图像生成提供了新工具。模型权重、训练验证数据集及合成图像样本已公开共享，有望推动该领域研究进展。

title: Efficient Dense Crowd Trajectory Prediction Via Dynamic Clustering
summary: Crowd trajectory prediction plays a crucial role in public safety and management, where it can help prevent disasters such as stampedes. Recent works address the problem by predicting individual trajectories and considering surrounding objects based on manually annotated data. However, these approaches tend to overlook dense crowd scenarios, where the challenges of automation become more pronounced due to the massiveness, noisiness, and inaccuracy of the tracking outputs, resulting in high computational costs. To address these challenges, we propose and extensively evaluate a novel cluster-based approach that groups individuals based on similar attributes over time, enabling faster execution through accurate group summarisation. Our plug-and-play method can be combined with existing trajectory predictors by using our output centroid in place of their pedestrian input. We evaluate our proposed method on several challenging dense crowd scenes. We demonstrated that our approach leads to faster processing and lower memory usage when compared with state-of-the-art methods, while maintaining the accuracy

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于聚类的人群轨迹预测方法，通过将相似的个体分组来加速处理密集人群场景。该方法可作为现有轨迹预测器的插件使用，在保持精度的同时显著提高处理速度并降低内存消耗。

AI.conclusion: 该聚类方法能够有效解决密集人群轨迹预测中的计算效率问题，可作为现有预测器的通用增强方案，在公共安全和管理领域具有应用前景。

title: TeachingCoach: A Fine-Tuned Scaffolding Chatbot for Instructional Guidance to Instructors
summary: Higher education instructors often lack timely and pedagogically grounded support, as scalable instructional guidance remains limited and existing tools rely on generic chatbot advice or non-scalable teaching center human-human consultations. We present TeachingCoach, a pedagogically grounded chatbot designed to support instructor professional development through real-time, conversational guidance. TeachingCoach is built on a data-centric pipeline that extracts pedagogical rules from educational resources and uses synthetic dialogue generation to fine-tune a specialized language model that guides instructors through problem identification, diagnosis, and strategy development. Expert evaluations show TeachingCoach produces clearer, more reflective, and more responsive guidance than a GPT-4o mini baseline, while a user study with higher education instructors highlights trade-offs between conversational depth and interaction efficiency. Together, these results demonstrate that pedagogically grounded, synthetic data driven chatbots can improve instructional support and offer a scalable design approach for future instructional chatbot systems.

AI.tldr: TeachingCoach是一个基于教育学原理的对话式聊天机器人，通过从教育资源中提取教学规则并使用合成对话数据微调专用语言模型，为高等教育教师提供实时、专业的发展指导。

title: One-to-More: High-Fidelity Training-Free Anomaly Generation with Attention Control
summary: Industrial anomaly detection (AD) is characterized by an abundance of normal images but a scarcity of anomalous ones. Although numerous few-shot anomaly synthesis methods have been proposed to augment anomalous data for downstream AD tasks, most existing approaches require time-consuming training and struggle to learn distributions that are faithful to real anomalies, thereby restricting the efficacy of AD models trained on such data. To address these limitations, we propose a training-free few-shot anomaly generation method, namely O2MAG, which leverages the self-attention in One reference anomalous image to synthesize More realistic anomalies, supporting effective downstream anomaly detection. Specifically, O2MAG manipulates three parallel diffusion processes via self-attention grafting and incorporates the anomaly mask to mitigate foreground-background query confusion, synthesizing text-guided anomalies that closely adhere to real anomalous distributions. To bridge the semantic gap between the encoded anomaly text prompts and the true anomaly semantics, Anomaly-Guided Optimization is further introduced to align the synthesis process with the target anomalous distribution, steering the generation toward realistic and text-consistent anomalies. Moreover, to mitigate faint anomaly synthesis inside anomaly masks, Dual-Attention Enhancement is adopted during generation to reinforce both self- and cross-attention on masked regions. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of O2MAG, demonstrating its superior performance over prior state-of-the-art methods on downstream AD tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了O2MAG，一种无需训练的少样本异常生成方法，利用自注意力迁移和文本引导合成更真实的异常图像，用于工业异常检测。
AI.motivation: 工业异常检测中正常图像丰富但异常图像稀缺，现有少样本异常合成方法需耗时的训练过程，且难以学习到真实异常的分布，限制了异常检测模型的效能。
AI.method: O2MAG通过三个并行扩散过程的自注意力嫁接来操作，并结合异常掩码缓解前景-背景查询混淆。引入异常引导优化来缩小编码异常文本与真实异常语义之间的语义差距。采用双注意力增强来强化掩码区域的自注意力和交叉注意力，缓解掩码内微弱异常合成问题。
AI.result: 在下游异常检测任务上验证了O2MAG的有效性，展示了其优于现有最先进方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: O2MAG能够合成与真实异常分布高度一致的文本引导异常，有效支持下游异常检测任务，无需耗时的训练过程。

title: Q-Drift: Quantization-Aware Drift Correction for Diffusion Model Sampling
summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is a practical path to deploy large diffusion models, but quantization noise can accumulate over the denoising trajectory and degrade generation quality. We propose Q-Drift, a principled sampler-side correction that treats quantization error as an implicit stochastic perturbation on each denoising step and derives a marginal-distribution-preserving drift adjustment. Q-Drift estimates a timestep-wise variance statistic from calibration, in practice requiring as few as 5 paired full-precision/quantized calibration runs. The resulting sampler correction is plug-and-play with common samplers, diffusion models, and PTQ methods, while incurring negligible overhead at inference. Across six diverse text-to-image models (spanning DiT and U-Net), three samplers (Euler, flow-matching, DPM-Solver++), and two PTQ methods (SVDQuant, MixDQ), Q-Drift improves FID over the corresponding quantized baseline in most settings, with up to 4.59 FID reduction on PixArt-Sigma (SVDQuant W3A4), while preserving CLIP scores.

AI.tldr: Q-Drift是一种针对量化扩散模型的采样器端校正方法，通过将量化误差视为隐式随机扰动，推导保持边缘分布的漂移调整，在仅需5次校准的情况下显著改善生成质量。
AI.motivation: 后训练量化(PTQ)是部署大型扩散模型的实用路径，但量化噪声会在去噪轨迹上累积并降低生成质量。现有方法难以有效处理这种时序累积的量化误差。
AI.method: 将量化误差建模为每步去噪的隐式随机扰动，推导保持边缘分布的漂移调整。通过校准估计时间步方差统计量，仅需5对全精度/量化模型的校准运行即可。
AI.result: 在6个不同的文生图模型、3种采样器和2种PTQ方法上，Q-Drift在大多数情况下改善了FID分数，在PixArt-Sigma上最高降低4.59个FID点，同时保持CLIP分数。
AI.conclusion: Q-Drift作为一种即插即用的采样器校正方法，可与常见采样器、扩散模型和PTQ方法兼容，在推理时产生可忽略的开销，为量化扩散模型的质量提升提供了一种原则性解决方案。

The paper addresses quantization in image generation models, which does not relate to any of the stated pain points about 3D motion extraction, visual guidance features, or video quality control for motion synthesis.

title: A Computationally Efficient Learning of Artificial Intelligence System Reliability Considering Error Propagation
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly prominent in emerging smart cities, yet their reliability remains a critical concern. These systems typically operate through a sequence of interconnected functional stages, where upstream errors may propagate to downstream stages, ultimately affecting overall system reliability. Quantifying such error propagation is essential for accurate modeling of AI system reliability. However, this task is challenging due to: i) data availability: real-world AI system reliability data are often scarce and constrained by privacy concerns; ii) model validity: recurring error events across sequential stages are interdependent, violating the independence assumptions of statistical inference; and iii) computational complexity: AI systems process large volumes of high-speed data, resulting in frequent and complex recurrent error events that are difficult to track and analyze. To address these challenges, this paper leverages a physics-based autonomous vehicle simulation platform with a justifiable error injector to generate high-quality data for AI system reliability analysis. Building on this data, a new reliability modeling framework is developed to explicitly characterize error propagation across stages. Model parameters are estimated using a computationally efficient, theoretically guaranteed composite likelihood expectation - maximization algorithm. Its application to the reliability modeling for autonomous vehicle perception systems demonstrates its predictive accuracy and computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文针对智能城市中AI系统可靠性建模问题，提出基于物理的自动驾驶仿真平台结合复合似然EM算法，解决了数据稀缺、误差传播建模和计算效率三大挑战。
AI.motivation: AI系统在智能城市中的应用日益广泛，但其可靠性问题突出。上游阶段的误差会级联传播到下游阶段，影响整体系统可靠性。然而，现有可靠性建模面临数据稀缺、误差事件非独立假设违背以及高维数据计算复杂等难题。
AI.method: 1) 构建物理驱动的自动驾驶仿真平台，配备合理的误差注入器生成高质量数据；2) 提出新的可靠性建模框架，显式刻画跨阶段误差传播特性；3) 采用计算高效、理论保证的复合似然期望最大化(EM)算法估计模型参数。
AI.result: 该方法在自动驾驶感知系统可靠性建模中展现出良好的预测准确性和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过仿真平台解决数据可用性问题，结合创新建模框架和高效算法，可有效量化AI系统中多阶段误差传播，为智能城市AI系统可靠性评估提供了新途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI system reliability modeling and error propagation in autonomous driving perception systems. It is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), visual feature extraction for 3D motion synthesis, and bridging 2D-3D gaps for motion generation. This paper addresses none of these - it's about reliability engineering in autonomous driving systems using simulation platforms and EM algorithms, which is a different field entirely (systems engineering/reliability analysis vs. computer graphics).

title: Training-Only Heterogeneous Image-Patch-Text Graph Supervision for Advancing Few-Shot Learning Adapters
comment: Accepted at The IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026
summary: Recent adapter-based CLIP tuning (e.g., Tip-Adapter) is a strong few-shot learner, achieving efficiency by caching support features for fast prototype matching. However, these methods rely on global uni-modal feature vectors, overlooking fine-grained patch relations and their structural alignment with class text. To bridge this gap without incurring inference costs, we introduce a novel asymmetric training-only framework. Instead of altering the lightweight adapter, we construct a high-capacity auxiliary Heterogeneous Graph Teacher that operates solely during training. This teacher (i) integrates multi-scale visual patches and text prompts into a unified graph, (ii) performs deep cross-modal reasoning via a Modality-aware Graph Transformer (MGT), and (iii) applies discriminative node filtering to extract high-fidelity class features. Crucially, we employ a cache-aware dual-objective strategy to supervise this relational knowledge directly into the Tip-Adapter's key-value cache, effectively upgrading the prototypes while the graph teacher is discarded at test time. Thus, inference remains identical to Tip-Adapter with zero extra latency or memory. Across standard 1-16-shot benchmarks, our method consistently establishes a new state-of-the-art. Ablations confirm that the auxiliary graph supervision, text-guided reasoning, and node filtering are the essential ingredients for robust few-shot adaptation. Code is available at https://github.com/MR-Sherif/TOGA.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TOGA框架，通过在训练阶段引入异构图教师来增强CLIP的少样本学习能力。该方法不改变推理时的 adapter 结构，而是在训练时利用图 Transformer 进行跨模态推理，将细粒度的patch关系和文本信息注入Tip-Adapter的key-value缓存中，实现零推理成本的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CLIP的少样本学习方法（如Tip-Adapter）依赖全局单模态特征向量，忽略了细粒度的patch关系及其与类文本的结构对齐。现有方法在推理时仍需额外计算成本，无法兼顾性能与效率。
AI.method: 提出一种非对称训练框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) 异构图教师：整合多尺度视觉patches和文本提示构建统一图结构；(2) 模态感知图Transformer(MGT)：执行深度跨模态推理；(3) 判别性节点过滤：提取高保真类别特征。采用缓存感知双目标策略，将关系知识直接监督到Tip-Adapter的key-value缓存中，推理时丢弃图教师，保持与Tip-Adapter相同的推理效率。
AI.result: 在1-16-shot标准基准上取得新的最先进性能。消融实验验证了辅助图监督、文本引导推理和节点过滤三个关键组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TOGA在不增加推理成本的前提下，显著提升了CLIP少样本分类的性能，通过图结构建模细粒度跨模态关系是提升少样本学习效果的有效途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about CLIP-based few-shot learning for image classification using heterogeneous graph neural networks. While it mentions Vision-Language Models (CLIP), this is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation from video. The paper addresses image classification adapter optimization, not 3D motion synthesis, video generation, or visual guidance for motion generation. The application domain is completely different - this is machine learning for few-shot image recognition, not computer graphics for motion synthesis.

title: From Concepts to Judgments: Interpretable Image Aesthetic Assessment
summary: Image aesthetic assessment (IAA) aims to predict the aesthetic quality of images as perceived by humans. While recent IAA models achieve strong predictive performance, they offer little insight into the factors driving their predictions. Yet for users, understanding why an image is considered pleasing or not is as valuable as the score itself, motivating growing interest in interpretability within IAA. When humans evaluate aesthetics, they naturally rely on high-level cues to justify their judgments. Motivated by this observation, we propose an interpretable IAA framework grounded in human-understandable aesthetic concepts. We learn these concepts in an accessible manner, constructing a subspace that forms the foundation of an inherently interpretable model. To capture nuanced influences on aesthetic perception beyond explicit concepts, we introduce a simple yet effective residual predictor. Experiments on photographic and artistic datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive predictive performance while offering transparent, human-understandable aesthetic judgments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的图像美学评估框架，基于人类可理解的美学概念构建可解释子空间，并引入残差预测器捕捉细微影响，在保持预测性能的同时提供透明的美学判断解释。
AI.motivation: 现有的图像美学评估模型虽然预测性能强，但缺乏对预测因素的解释；而用户理解图像为何被认为美或不美与分数本身同样重要，因此需要提高IAA的可解释性。
AI.method: 提出可解释IAA框架，基于人类可理解的美学概念学习，以构建可解释子空间作为模型基础；同时引入简单有效的残差预测器捕捉超出显式概念的细微美学影响。
AI.result: 在摄影和艺术数据集上的实验表明，该方法达到具有竞争力的预测性能，同时提供透明、人类可理解的美学判断。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保持竞争力的预测性能的同时，实现了透明、人类可理解的美学判断解释，验证了基于美学概念的可解释框架的可行性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Image Aesthetic Assessment (evaluating why 2D images are considered beautiful), which is completely unrelated to the research profile about 3D motion generation from 2D video. The application domains are entirely different - one deals with aesthetic quality of static 2D images, while the research profile focuses on video-to-3D-motion synthesis, video generation models, and extracting 3D motion information from 2D video priors. Even though the profile mentions "Quality Assessment and Filtering," this refers to video/3D motion quality control, not image aesthetic evaluation. The methods (interpretable aesthetic frameworks) are also not relevant to video generation or 3D motion synthesis tasks.

title: EDM-ARS: A Domain-Specific Multi-Agent System for Automated Educational Data Mining Research
summary: In this technical report, we present the Educational Data Mining Automated Research System (EDM-ARS), a domain-specific multi-agent pipeline that automates end-to-end educational data mining (EDM) research. We conceptualize EDM-ARS as a general framework for domain-aware automated research pipelines, where educational expertise is embedded into each stage of the research lifecycle. As a first instantiation of this framework, we focus on predictive modeling tasks. Within this scope, EDM-ARS orchestrates five specialized LLM-powered agents (ProblemFormulator, DataEngineer, Analyst, Critic, and Writer) through a state-machine coordinator that supports revision loops, checkpoint-based recovery, and sandboxed code execution. Given a research prompt and a dataset, EDM-ARS produces a complete LaTeX manuscript with real Semantic Scholar citations, validated machine learning analyses, and automated methodological peer review. We also provide a detailed description of the system architecture, the three-tier data registry design that encodes educational domain expertise, the specification of each agent, the inter-agent communication protocol, and mechanisms for error-handling and self-correction. Finally, we discuss current limitations, including single-dataset scope and formulaic paper output, and outline a phased roadmap toward causal inference, transfer learning, psychometric, and multi-dataset generalization. EDM-ARS is released as an open-source project to support the educational research community.

AI.tldr: EDM-ARS是一个领域特定的多智能体管道系统,旨在自动化教育数据挖掘(EDM)研究的端到端流程。该系统整合了五个专门的LLM驱动智能体,协调完成从问题 formulation 到论文写作的完整研究流程。
AI.motivation: 当前教育数据挖掘研究流程繁琐且耗时,需要大量人工介入进行数据处理、建模分析和论文撰写。研究旨在创建一个将教育领域专业知识嵌入每个研究阶段的自动化研究管道,以提高研究效率和标准化程度。
AI.method: EDM-ARS采用状态机协调器架构,包含五个专门智能体(ProblemFormulator、DataEngineer、Analyst、Critic和Writer),支持修订循环、基于检查点的恢复和沙盒代码执行。系统设计了编码教育领域知识的三层数据注册表,并建立了智能体间通信协议和错误处理机制。
AI.result: 给定研究提示和数据集,EDM-ARS能够生成完整的LaTeX手稿,包含真实的Semantic Scholar引文、经过验证的机器学习分析以及自动化的方法论同行评审。系统已作为开源项目发布。
AI.conclusion: EDM-ARS作为首个将教育专业知识嵌入研究全流程的自动化管道框架,展示了LLM智能体在学术研究自动化方面的潜力。当前局限性包括单数据集范围和公式化论文输出。未来计划扩展至因果推理、迁移学习、心理测量和多数据集泛化等方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about automated educational data mining research using multi-agent LLM systems. It is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, and visual feature extraction for bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The application domain is entirely different - educational technology vs computer graphics/video/motion synthesis. The methods (LLM agents for research automation vs video generation/motion models) are also completely different.

title: Insight-V++: Towards Advanced Long-Chain Visual Reasoning with Multimodal Large Language Models
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2411.14432
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable reliability and advanced capabilities through extended test-time reasoning. However, extending these capabilities to Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) remains a significant challenge due to a critical scarcity of high-quality, long-chain reasoning data and optimized training pipelines. To bridge this gap, we present a unified multi-agent visual reasoning framework that systematically evolves from our foundational image-centric model, Insight-V, into a generalized spatial-temporal architecture, Insight-V++. We first propose a scalable data generation pipeline equipped with multi-granularity assessment that autonomously synthesizes structured, complex reasoning trajectories across image and video domains without human intervention. Recognizing that directly supervising MLLMs with such intricate data yields sub-optimal results, we design a dual-agent architecture comprising a reasoning agent to execute extensive analytical chains, and a summary agent to critically evaluate and distill final outcomes. While our initial framework utilized Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), its off-policy nature fundamentally constrained reinforcement learning potential. To overcome these limitations, particularly for long-horizon video understanding, Insight-V++ introduces two novel algorithms, ST-GRPO and J-GRPO, which enhance spatial-temporal reasoning and improve evaluative robustness. Crucially, by leveraging reliable feedback from the summary agent, we guide an iterative reasoning path generation process, retraining the entire multi-agent system in a continuous, self-improving loop. Extensive experiments on base models like LLaVA-NeXT and Qwen2.5-VL demonstrate significant performance gains across challenging image and video reasoning benchmarks while preserving strong capabilities on traditional perception-focused tasks.

AI.tldr: 将LLM的高级推理能力扩展到多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)面临重大挑战，主要原因是高质量长链推理数据稀缺和训练流程不完善。Insight-V++通过统一的多智能体视觉推理框架解决了这一问题。
AI.motivation: 将LLM在扩展测试时推理中取得的卓越可靠性和先进能力扩展到多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)，但由于高质量长链推理数据和优化训练流程的严重稀缺，这一扩展仍然是一项重大挑战。
AI.method: 1) 可扩展的数据生成流水线，具有多粒度评估功能，可自主合成图像和视频领域的结构化复杂推理轨迹；2) 双智能体架构，包括推理智能体(执行广泛的分析链)和总结智能体(批判性评估和提炼最终结果)；3) 两种新算法ST-GRPO和J-GRPO，增强空间-时间推理并提高评估鲁棒性；4) 利用总结智能体的可靠反馈，通过持续自改进循环引导迭代推理路径生成过程。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-NeXT和Qwen2.5-VL等基础模型上，在具有挑战性的图像和视频推理基准上实现了显著的性能提升，同时在传统感知聚焦任务上保持了强大的能力。
AI.conclusion: Insight-V++成功地将LLM的高级推理能力扩展到多模态领域，通过可扩展的数据生成、双智能体架构、创新的强化学习算法和自改进机制，为多模态视觉推理建立了新的方法论。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for visual reasoning tasks - an AI/ML domain, NOT Computer Graphics. While the research profile focuses on 3D motion generation from video, visual guidance features, and video generation quality control in Computer Graphics, this paper addresses long-chain reasoning in MLLMs using dual-agent architectures and new training algorithms. Although VLMs are mentioned in both, the application domains are completely different: this paper uses VLMs for reasoning tasks, not for 3D motion synthesis or video generation quality control. The pain points are unrelated - this paper doesn't address extracting 3D motion from 2D video or bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space.

title: CORE: Robust Out-of-Distribution Detection via Confidence and Orthogonal Residual Scoring
comment: 26 pages, 5 figures, includes supplementary material as appendix
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is essential for deploying deep learning models reliably, yet no single method performs consistently across architectures and datasets -- a scorer that leads on one benchmark often falters on another. We attribute this inconsistency to a shared structural limitation: logit-based methods see only the classifier's confidence signal, while feature-based methods attempt to measure membership in the training distribution but do so in the full feature space where confidence and membership are entangled, inheriting architecture-sensitive failure modes. We observe that penultimate features naturally decompose into two orthogonal subspaces: a classifier-aligned component encoding confidence, and a residual the classifier discards. We discover that this residual carries a class-specific directional signature for in-distribution data -- a membership signal invisible to logit-based methods and entangled with noise in feature-based methods. We propose CORE (COnfidence + REsidual), which disentangles the two signals by scoring each subspace independently and combines them via normalized summation. Because the two signals are orthogonal by construction, their failure modes are approximately independent, producing robust detection where either view alone is unreliable. CORE achieves competitive or state-of-the-art performance across five architectures and five benchmark configurations, ranking first in three of five settings and achieving the highest grand average AUROC with negligible computational overhead.

AI.tldr: CORE方法通过解构penultimate特征的分类器对齐分量和残差分量，分别评分后归一化求和，实现鲁棒的分布外检测。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法性能不稳定，原因在于：logit方法仅看置信度信号，特征方法在完整特征空间测量 membership 但信号与噪声纠缠且继承架构敏感的失败模式。
AI.method: 发现penultimate特征可分解为两个正交子空间：分类器对齐分量（编码置信度）和残差分量（包含类特定的 membership 信号）。CORE独立评分两个子空间并归一化求和结合。
AI.result: 在5种架构和5种基准配置中取得竞争或最优性能，3项排名第一，AUROC grand average最高，计算开销可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 两信号正交构造使得失败模式近似独立，产生鲁棒检测。CORE在任一视角单独不可靠时仍有效。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection in neural networks, which is a fundamental machine learning/computer vision method. While the research profile mentions "Quality Assessment and Filtering" as a method, OOD detection is fundamentally different - it's about detecting whether inputs are outside the training distribution, not about assessing quality of generated video/motion outputs. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points: extracting 3D motion from 2D video, quality control of video generation, visual guidance for 3D motion synthesis, or bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space. The application domain is completely different - OOD detection vs Computer Graphics/3D motion generation.

title: VLM-AutoDrive: Post-Training Vision-Language Models for Safety-Critical Autonomous Driving Events
summary:
The rapid growth of ego-centric dashcam footage presents a major challenge for detecting safety-critical events such as collisions and near-collisions, scenarios that are brief, rare, and difficult for generic vision models to capture. While multimodal large language models (MLLMs) demonstrate strong general reasoning ability, they underperform in driving contexts due to domain and temporal misalignment.
  We introduce VLM-AutoDrive, a modular post-training framework for adapting pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to high-fidelity anomaly detection. The framework integrates metadata-derived captions, LLM-generated descriptions, visual question answering (VQA) pairs, and chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning supervision to enable domain-aligned and interpretable learning. Off-the-shelf VLMs such as NVIDIA's Cosmos-Reason1 7B (CR1) exhibit near-zero Collision recall in zero-shot settings; fine-tuning with VLM-AutoDrive improves Collision F1 from 0.00 to 0.69 and overall accuracy from 35.35% to 77.27%.
  VLM-AutoDrive offers a scalable recipe for adapting general-purpose VLMs to safety-critical, temporally localized perception tasks. Evaluated on real-world Nexar dashcam videos, it achieves substantial gains in Collision and Near-Collision detection while producing interpretable reasoning traces, bridging the gap between perception, causality, and decision reasoning in autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: VLM-AutoDrive通过整合元数据字幕、LLM描述、VQA对和CoT推理监督，将预训练VLM适配到高保真异常检测，在Nexar dashcam视频上实现Collision F1从0.00到0.69的显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在驾驶场景中表现不佳，因为领域和时间对齐问题。ego-centric dashcam footage增长迅速，但碰撞和近碰撞等安全关键事件短暂且罕见，难以被通用视觉模型捕获。
AI.method: 该框架整合了元数据衍生的字幕、LLM生成的描述、视觉问答(VQA)对和思维链(CoT)推理监督，实现领域对齐和可解释学习。对NVIDIA的Cosmos-Reason1 7B (CR1)进行微调。
AI.result: 零样本设置下CR1的Collision召回率接近零；使用VLM-AutoDrive微调后，Collision F1从0.00提升到0.69，总体准确率从35.35%提升到77.27%。
AI.conclusion: VLM-AutoDrive是一个可扩展的框架，能够将通用VLM适配到安全关键的、时间局部化的感知任务中。在Nexar dashcam视频上实现了Collision和Near-Collision检测的重大改进，同时产生可解释的推理轨迹，弥合了自动驾驶中感知、因果关系和决策推理之间的差距。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous driving safety (detecting collisions in dashcam videos), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. While both mention Vision-Language Models, the application domains are entirely different: the paper addresses driving event detection, whereas the research profile focuses on extracting 3D motion from 2D video, video generation for motion synthesis, and bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space. The pain points and goals are fundamentally mismatched - this is an autonomous driving AI paper, not a computer graphics/motion synthesis paper.

title: The Validity Gap in Health AI Evaluation: A Cross-Sectional Analysis of Benchmark Composition
summary:
Background: Clinical trials rely on transparent inclusion criteria to ensure generalizability. In contrast, benchmarks validating health-related large language models (LLMs) rarely characterize the "patient" or "query" populations they contain. Without defined composition, aggregate performance metrics may misrepresent model readiness for clinical use.
  Methods: We analyzed 18,707 consumer health queries across six public benchmarks using LLMs as automated coding instruments to apply a standardized 16-field taxonomy profiling context, topic, and intent.
  Results: We identified a structural "validity gap." While benchmarks have evolved from static retrieval to interactive dialogue, clinical composition remains misaligned with real-world needs. Although 42% of the corpus referenced objective data, this was polarized toward wellness-focused wearable signals (17.7%); complex diagnostic inputs remained rare, including laboratory values (5.2%), imaging (3.8%), and raw medical records (0.6%). Safety-critical scenarios were effectively absent: suicide/self-harm queries comprised <0.7% of the corpus and chronic disease management only 5.5%. Benchmarks also neglected vulnerable populations (pediatrics/older adults <11%) and global health needs.
  Conclusions: Evaluation benchmarks remain misaligned with real-world clinical needs, lacking raw clinical artifacts, adequate representation of vulnerable populations, and longitudinal chronic care scenarios. The field must adopt standardized query profiling--analogous to clinical trial reporting--to align evaluation with the full complexity of clinical practice.

AI.tldr: 研究分析了18,707个消费者健康查询，发现健康相关大型语言模型(LLM)基准测试存在"有效性差距"，与真实临床需求严重脱节。
AI.motivation: 临床试验有透明纳入标准确保可推广性，但验证健康相关LLM的基准测试很少描述其"患者"或"查询"人群，缺乏定义成分的聚合性能指标可能无法准确反映模型临床使用的准备程度。
AI.method: 使用LLM作为自动编码工具，对6个公共基准测试中的18,707个消费者健康查询应用标准化16字段分类法，分析上下文、主题和意图。
AI.result: 发现结构性"有效性差距"：尽管42%引用客观数据，但偏向可穿戴设备健康信号(17.7%)；复杂诊断输入罕见(实验室值5.2%、影像3.8%、原始病历0.6%)。安全关键场景几乎缺失：自杀/自残<0.7%、慢性病管理5.5%。弱势人群代表不足(儿科/老年<11%)。
AI.conclusion: 评估基准与真实临床需求脱节，缺乏原始临床数据、弱势人群充分代表和纵向慢病护理场景。需采用标准化查询分析框架，类似于临床试验报告，以使评估与临床实践的全面复杂性相一致。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Health AI and LLM benchmark evaluation in clinical settings, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on video generation, 3D motion synthesis, and visual feature extraction for motion generation. Even though both mention "LLM" and "quality assessment," the application domains are fundamentally different - this is healthcare/medical AI while the profile is about computer graphics and motion generation. There is zero overlap in application domain, methods (in the relevant sense), or research goals.

title: MicroVision: An Open Dataset and Benchmark Models for Detecting Vulnerable Road Users and Micromobility Vehicles
summary: Micromobility is a growing mode of transportation, raising new challenges for traffic safety and planning due to increased interactions in areas where vulnerable road users (VRUs) share the infrastructure with micromobility, including parked micromobility vehicles (MMVs). Approaches to support traffic safety and planning increasingly rely on detecting road users in images -- a computer-vision task relying heavily on the quality of the images to train on. However, existing open image datasets for training such models lack focus and diversity in VRUs and MMVs, for instance, by categorizing both pedestrians and MMV riders as "person", or by not including new MMVs like e-scooters. Furthermore, datasets are often captured from a car perspective and lack data from areas where only VRUs travel (sidewalks, cycle paths). To help close this gap, we introduce the MicroVision dataset: an open image dataset and annotations for training and evaluating models for detecting the most common VRUs (pedestrians, cyclists, e-scooterists) and stationary MMVs (bicycles, e-scooters), from a VRU perspective. The dataset, recorded in Gothenburg (Sweden), consists of more than 8,000 anonymized, full-HD images with more than 30,000 carefully annotated VRUs and MMVs, captured over an entire year and part of almost 2,000 unique interaction scenes. Along with the dataset, we provide first benchmark object-detection models based on state-of-the-art architectures, which achieved a mean average precision of up to 0.723 on an unseen test set. The dataset and model can support traffic safety to distinguish between different VRUs and MMVs, or help monitoring systems identify the use of micromobility. The dataset and model weights can be accessed at https://doi.org/10.71870/eepz-jd52.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MicroVision数据集，一个用于检测弱势道路用户（VRU）和静止微出行车辆（MMV）的开源图像数据集。该数据集包含8000多张高清图像和30000多个标注，从VRU视角拍摄，涵盖行人、骑行者、电动滑板车使用者以及停放的自行车和电动滑板车。
AI.motivation: 现有开放图像数据集在VRU和MMV方面缺乏关注度和多样性，例如将行人和MMV骑行者统一标注为"人"，且缺乏来自人行道、自行车道等仅VRU活动区域的图像数据。这些问题制约了交通安全检测和规划模型的发展。
AI.method: 数据集在瑞典哥德堡录制，跨越整年，包含近2000个独特交互场景。提供了基于最先进架构的基准目标检测模型进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 基准模型在测试集上实现了最高0.723的平均精度（mAP），能够有效区分不同的VRU和MMV类型。
AI.conclusion: MicroVision数据集和预训练模型可支持交通安全领域区分不同类型的VRU和MMV，或帮助监控系统识别微出行工具的使用情况，为相关研究和应用提供了重要的数据基础。

The research profile focuses on extracting 3D motion from 2D video priors and video generation models, while this paper addresses a computer vision task in the transportation domain. The application domain mismatch is fundamental - this is not about graphics, motion synthesis, or video generation for visualization purposes.

title: Consumer-to-Clinical Language Shifts in Ambient AI Draft Notes and Clinician-Finalized Documentation: A Multi-level Analysis
summary: Ambient AI generates draft clinical notes from patient-clinician conversations, often using lay or consumer-oriented phrasing to support patient understanding instead of standardized clinical terminology. How clinicians revise these drafts for professional documentation conventions remains unclear. We quantified clinician editing for consumer-to- clinical normalization using a dictionary-confirmed transformation framework. We analyzed 71,173 AI-draft and finalized-note section pairs from 34,726 encounters. Confirmed transformations were defined as replacing a consumer expression with its dictionary-mapped clinical equivalent in the same section. Editing significantly reduced terminology density across all sections (p < 0.001). The Assessment and Plan accounted for the largest transformation volume (59.3%). Our analysis identified 7,576 transformation events across 4,114 note sections (5.8%), representing 1.2% consumer-term deletions. Transformation intensity varied across individual clinicians (p < 0.001). Overall, clinician post-editing demonstrates consistent shifts from conversational phrasing toward standardized, section- appropriate clinical terminology, supporting section-aware ambient AI design.

AI.tldr: 研究分析临床医生如何编辑AI生成的临床笔记，将消费者导向的通俗用语转换为标准化临床术语。研究分析了71,173对AI草稿和最终笔记部分，发现医生编辑表现出从对话措辞向标准化临床术语的一致性转变。
AI.motivation: 环境AI从医患对话生成临床笔记，常使用通俗或消费者导向的措辞以支持患者理解，但医生如何将这些草稿修订为符合专业文档规范的做法仍不清楚。
AI.method: 使用字典确认的转换框架进行量化分析。分析了34,726次就诊的71,173对AI草稿和最终笔记部分。确认的转换定义为在同一部分用字典映射的临床术语替换消费者表达。
AI.result: 编辑显著降低了所有部分的术语密度(p<0.001)。评估和计划部分占最大转换量(59.3%)。分析识别出4,114个笔记部分中的7,576个转换事件(5.8%)，代表1.2%的消费者术语删除。转换强度因个体医生而异(p<0.001)。
AI.conclusion: 临床医生的后期编辑表现出从对话措辞向标准化、符合部分要求的临床术语的一致性转变，支持面向部分的环境AI设计。

The paper is about medical/NLP domain - analyzing AI-generated clinical notes and how doctors convert consumer language to clinical terminology. This paper is in healthcare AI/medical informatics, not computer graphics or any related visual/motion generation field.

title: FaithSteer-BENCH: A Deployment-Aligned Stress-Testing Benchmark for Inference-Time Steering
summary: Inference-time steering is widely regarded as a lightweight and parameter-free mechanism for controlling large language model (LLM) behavior, and prior work has often suggested that simple activation-level interventions can reliably induce targeted behavioral changes. However, such conclusions are typically drawn under relatively relaxed evaluation settings that overlook deployment constraints, capability trade-offs, and real-world robustness. We therefore introduce \textbf{FaithSteer-BENCH}, a stress-testing benchmark that evaluates steering methods at a fixed deployment-style operating point through three gate-wise criteria: controllability, utility preservation, and robustness. Across multiple models and representative steering approaches, we uncover several systematic failure modes that are largely obscured under standard evaluation, including illusory controllability, measurable cognitive tax on unrelated capabilities, and substantial brittleness under mild instruction-level perturbations, role prompts, encoding transformations, and data scarcity. Gate-wise benchmark results show that existing methods do not necessarily provide reliable controllability in deployment-oriented practical settings. In addition, mechanism-level diagnostics indicate that many steering methods induce prompt-conditional alignment rather than stable latent directional shifts, further explaining their fragility under stress. FaithSteer-BENCH therefore provides a unified benchmark and a clearer analytical lens for future method design, reliability evaluation, and deployment-oriented research in steering.

AI.tldr: 提出了FaithSteer-BENCH基准测试，用于在部署场景下对LLM steering方法进行压力测试，揭示了现有方法在可控性、效用保持和鲁棒性方面的系统性失败模式。
AI.motivation: 先前研究认为简单的激活级干预可以可靠地控制LLM行为，但这些结论是在相对宽松的评估设置下得出的，忽视了部署约束、能力权衡和实际鲁棒性。
AI.method: 引入FaithSteer-BENCH压力测试基准，通过三个门控标准评估steering方法：可控性、效用保持和鲁棒性。跨多个模型和代表性steering方法进行测试。
AI.result: 发现多种系统性失败模式：虚假可控性、对无关能力的可测量认知负担、在轻微指令级扰动、角色提示、编码转换和数据稀缺下的显著脆弱性。许多方法诱导的是提示条件对齐而非稳定的潜在方向偏移。
AI.conclusion: 现有方法在面向部署的实际设置中并不一定能提供可靠的可控性。FaithSteer-BENCH为未来的方法设计、可靠性评估和面向部署的steering研究提供了统一基准和更清晰的分析视角。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM (Large Language Model) steering and behavior control, not about video generation, 3D motion synthesis, or any Computer Graphics application. While the research profile focuses on video-to-3D motion extraction and video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, this paper addresses completely different domain - it tests inference-time steering methods for language models. The application domains are entirely different: computer graphics/video motion generation vs. LLM interpretability and control. Even though both involve "steering" concepts, they operate in completely different modalities and are unrelated for this research profile.

title: LRConv-NeRV: Low Rank Convolution for Efficient Neural Video Compression
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Neural Representations for Videos (NeRV) encode entire video sequences within neural network parameters, offering an alternative paradigm to conventional video codecs. However, the convolutional decoder of NeRV remains computationally expensive and memory intensive, limiting its deployment in resource-constrained environments. This paper proposes LRConv-NeRV, an efficient NeRV variant that replaces selected dense 3x3 convolutional layers with structured low-rank separable convolutions, trained end-to-end within the decoder architecture. By progressively applying low-rank factorization from the largest to earlier decoder stages, LRConv-NeRV enables controllable trade-offs between reconstruction quality and efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that applying LRConv only to the final decoder stage reduces decoder complexity by 68%, from 201.9 to 64.9 GFLOPs, and model size by 9.3%, while incurring negligible quality loss and achieving approximately 9.2% bitrate reduction. Under INT8 post-training quantization, LRConv-NeRV preserves reconstruction quality close to the dense NeRV baseline, whereas more aggressive factorization of early decoder stages leads to disproportionate quality degradation. Compared to existing work under layer-aligned settings, LRConv-NeRV achieves a more favorable efficiency versus quality trade-off, offering substantial GFLOPs and parameter reductions while maintaining higher PSNR/MS-SSIM and improved temporal stability. Temporal flicker analysis using LPIPS further shows that the proposed solution preserves temporal coherence close to the NeRV baseline, results establish LRConv-NeRV as a potential architectural alternative for efficient neural video decoding under low-precision and resource-constrained settings.

AI.tldr: LRConv-NeRV是一种高效的视频神经表示方法，通过将卷积解码器中的部分3x3卷积层替换为低秩可分离卷积，在大幅降低计算复杂度和模型体积的同时，仅带来可忽略不计的画质损失。
AI.motivation: NeRV虽然提供了一种新的视频编码范式，但其卷积解码器计算量大、内存占用高，难以部署在资源受限的环境中。需要一种高效的变体来降低计算和存储开销。
AI.method: 将选定的密集3x3卷积层替换为结构化低秩可分离卷积，在解码器架构中进行端到端训练。从最大解码器阶段逐步应用低秩分解，实现重建质量和效率之间的可控权衡。
AI.result: 仅在最终解码器阶段应用LRConv可将解码器复杂度降低68%（从201.9到64.9 GFLOPs），模型大小减少9.3%，同时带来约9.2%的码率降低。在INT8量化下仍能保持接近基准的重建质量。
AI.conclusion: LRConv-NeRV在效率和画质之间实现了更好的权衡，是一种适用于低精度和资源受限场景的高效神经视频解码架构替代方案。

The paper is about neural video COMPRESSION (efficient encoding/decoding), not video generation or 3D motion synthesis. While both deal with "video," compression and generation are fundamentally different tasks with no overlap in goals or methods relevant to the research profile's pain points.

title: CycleCap: Improving VLMs Captioning Performance via Self-Supervised Cycle Consistency Fine-Tuning
summary: Visual-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in image captioning, visual question answering, and visual reasoning. Yet they remain prone to vision-language misalignment, often producing overly generic or hallucinated descriptions. Existing approaches address this via instruction tuning-requiring costly, large-scale annotated datasets or via complex test-time frameworks for caption refinement. In this work, we revisit image-text alignment through the lens of cycle consistency: given an image and a caption generated by an image-to-text model, the backward mapping through a text-to-image model should reconstruct an image that closely matches the original. In our setup, a VLM serves as the image-to-text component, while a pre-trained text-to-image model closes the loop by reconstructing the image from the generated caption. Building on this, we introduce CycleCap, a fine-tuning scheme to improve image captioning using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a reward based on the similarity between the original and reconstructed images, computed on-the-fly. Unlike previous work that uses cycle consistency loss for preference dataset construction, our method leverages cycle consistency directly as a self-supervised training signal. This enables the use of raw images alone, eliminating the need for curated image-text datasets, while steering the VLM to produce more accurate and grounded text descriptions. Applied to four VLMs ranging from 1B to 7B parameters, CycleCap yields consistent improvements across captioning and hallucination benchmarks, surpassing state-of-the-art methods that rely on supervised cycle consistency training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CycleCap方法，通过循环一致性将VLM生成的caption再输入文本到图像模型重建图像，利用原始图像与重建图像的相似度作为奖励信号进行GRPO微调，从而提升图像描述的准确性和减少幻觉。
AI.motivation: 当前VLM容易产生vision-language misalignment，生成过于笼统或幻觉性的描述。现有方法需要大规模标注数据集或复杂的推理时框架，本文希望利用循环一致性作为自监督训练信号，仅需原始图像即可训练，无需人工标注的图像-文本对。
AI.method: 构建image-to-text(VLM)和text-to-image模型的循环框架：VLM生成caption，再通过text-to-image模型从caption重建图像。利用原始图像与重建图像的相似度作为奖励，通过Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)对VLM进行微调。
AI.result: 在1B到7B参数的四个VLM上，CycleCap在captioning和hallucination基准测试中均取得一致提升，超越了依赖监督循环一致性训练的前沿方法。
AI.conclusion: 循环一致性可直接作为自监督训练信号，使模型仅使用原始图像即可产生更准确、更具依据的文本描述，为减少VLM幻觉和提升图像描述质量提供了一种高效且可扩展的方案。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses VLM captioning and hallucination reduction (NLP/Vision-language alignment), while the research profile focuses on Computer Graphics for 3D motion synthesis from video. Although both mention VLM, they operate in completely different application domains - the paper is about improving image descriptions, not about video-to-3D motion extraction or video generation for graphics. This is a case of using similar methods (VLM) but in wrong application domain.

title: Fast and Generalizable NeRF Architecture Selection for Satellite Scene Reconstruction
summary: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) have emerged as a powerful approach for photorealistic 3D reconstruction from multi-view images. However, deploying NeRF for satellite imagery remains challenging. Each scene requires individual training, and optimizing architectures via Neural Architecture Search (NAS) demands hours to days of GPU time. While existing approaches focus on architectural improvements, our SHAP analysis reveals that multi-view consistency, rather than model architecture, determines reconstruction quality. Based on this insight, we develop PreSCAN, a predictive framework that estimates NeRF quality prior to training using lightweight geometric and photometric descriptors. PreSCAN selects suitable architectures in < 30 seconds with < 1 dB prediction error, achieving 1000$\times$ speedup over NAS. We further demonstrate PreSCAN's deployment utility on edge platforms (Jetson Orin), where combining its predictions with offline cost profiling reduces inference power by 26% and latency by 43% with minimal quality loss. Experiments on DFC2019 datasets confirm that PreSCAN generalizes across diverse satellite scenes without retraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PreSCAN框架,用于在训练前预测NeRF在卫星图像上的重建质量。通过SHAP分析发现多视图一致性是决定重建质量的关键因素,而非模型架构。PreSCAN利用轻量级几何和光度描述符,在30秒内选择合适架构,预测误差小于1dB,相比NAS提速1000倍。在Jetson Orin边缘平台上,结合离线成本分析可降低26%功耗和43%延迟,且质量损失最小。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像的NeRF训练需要大量GPU时间,且现有方法关注架构改进而忽视关键因素。研究者希望通过SHAP分析找出影响重建质量的真正因素,并开发快速预测框架以加速NeRF在卫星 imagery部署。
AI.method: 1)使用SHAP分析确定多视图一致性是影响NeRF质量的关键因素 2)开发PreSCAN框架,利用轻量级几何和光度描述符预测NeRF质量 3)在边缘平台Jetson Orin上结合离线成本分析进行部署优化
AI.result: PreSCAN在30秒内完成架构选择,预测误差<1dB,比NAS提速1000倍。在Jetson Orin上实现26%功耗降低和43%延迟降低。DFC2019数据集验证了方法的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 多视图一致性而非模型架构决定了NeRF重建质量。PreSCAN可有效预测NeRF质量,实现快速架构选择和高效边缘部署,为卫星图像3D重建提供实用解决方案。

The methods (NeRF for scene reconstruction vs. video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance for motion) and pain points (computational cost optimization vs. bridging 2D-3D motion gap) have no overlap.

title: Interpretability without actionability: mechanistic methods cannot correct language model errors despite near-perfect internal representations
comment: 27 pages, 5 figures, 10 tables. Code available at https://github.com/sanjaybasu/interpretability-triage
summary: Language models encode task-relevant knowledge in internal representations that far exceeds their output performance, but whether mechanistic interpretability methods can bridge this knowledge-action gap has not been systematically tested. We compared four mechanistic interpretability methods -- concept bottleneck steering (Steerling-8B), sparse autoencoder feature steering, logit lens with activation patching, and linear probing with truthfulness separator vector steering (Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct) -- for correcting false-negative triage errors using 400 physician-adjudicated clinical vignettes (144 hazards, 256 benign). Linear probes discriminated hazardous from benign cases with 98.2% AUROC, yet the model's output sensitivity was only 45.1%, a 53-percentage-point knowledge-action gap. Concept bottleneck steering corrected 20% of missed hazards but disrupted 53% of correct detections, indistinguishable from random perturbation (p=0.84). SAE feature steering produced zero effect despite 3,695 significant features. TSV steering at high strength corrected 24% of missed hazards while disrupting 6% of correct detections, but left 76% of errors uncorrected. Current mechanistic interpretability methods cannot reliably translate internal knowledge into corrected outputs, with implications for AI safety frameworks that assume interpretability enables effective error correction.

title: LGESynthNet: Controlled Scar Synthesis for Improved Scar Segmentation in Cardiac LGE-MRI Imaging
summary: Segmentation of enhancement in LGE cardiac MRI is critical for diagnosing various ischemic and non-ischemic cardiomyopathies. However, creating pixel-level annotations for these images is challenging and labor-intensive, leading to limited availability of annotated data. Generative models, particularly diffusion models, offer promise for synthetic data generation, yet many rely on large training datasets and often struggle with fine-grained conditioning control, especially for small or localized features. We introduce LGESynthNet, a latent diffusion-based framework for controllable enhancement synthesis, enabling explicit control over size, location, and transmural extent. Formulated as inpainting using a ControlNet-based architecture, the model integrates: (a) a reward model for conditioning-specific supervision, (b) a captioning module for anatomically descriptive text prompts, and (c) a biomedical text encoder. Trained on just 429 images (79 patients), it produces realistic, anatomically coherent samples. A quality control filter selects outputs with high conditioning-fidelity, which when used for training augmentation, improve downstream segmentation and detection performance, by up-to 6 and 20 points respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LGESynthNet，一个基于潜在扩散模型的框架，用于心脏MRI中LGE（晚期钆增强）的可控合成。该方法仅使用429张图像训练，通过ControlNet架构实现对增强区域大小、位置和透壁程度的显式控制。
AI.motivation: LGE心脏MRI的增强分割对诊断缺血性和非缺血性心肌病至关重要，但像素级标注耗时且难以获取，导致标注数据有限。现有生成模型依赖大规模训练数据，且难以精细控制小病灶或局部特征。
AI.method: 采用ControlNet架构的修复任务（inpainting）框架，集成三个关键模块：(a)奖励模型用于条件特定监督，(b)描述解剖结构的标题生成模块，(c)生物医学文本编码器。使用质量控制过滤器筛选高保真度样本用于训练增强。
AI.result: 仅用429张图像（79例患者）训练即可生成逼真、解剖结构一致的样本。合成数据用于训练增强后，下游分割性能提升最高6个百分点，检测性能提升最高20个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种数据高效的LGE增强合成方法，通过条件控制和多模块集成实现了小样本条件下的高质量合成，所生成的样本可有效提升下游任务性能。
