The paper does not address any of the specified pain points (extracting 3D motion from 2D video, quality control for video generation, visual guidance for 3D motion synthesis). Using the same method (diffusion) in a completely different application domain (medical imaging) should be considered irrelevant.

title: To See or To Please: Uncovering Visual Sycophancy and Split Beliefs in VLMs
summary: When VLMs answer correctly, do they genuinely rely on visual information or exploit language shortcuts? We introduce the Tri-Layer Diagnostic Framework, which disentangles hallucination sources via three metrics: Latent Anomaly Detection (perceptual awareness), Visual Necessity Score (visual dependency, measured via KL divergence), and Competition Score (conflict between visual grounding and instruction following). Using counterfactual interventions (blind, noise, and conflict images) across 7 VLMs and 7,000 model-sample pairs, our taxonomy reveals that 69.6% of samples exhibit Visual Sycophancy--models detect visual anomalies but hallucinate to satisfy user expectations--while zero samples show Robust Refusal, indicating alignment training has systematically suppressed truthful uncertainty acknowledgment. A scaling analysis (Qwen2.5-VL 7B to 72B) shows larger models reduce Language Shortcuts but amplify Visual Sycophancy, demonstrating scale alone cannot resolve the grounding problem. Diagnostic scores further enable a post-hoc selective prediction strategy achieving up to +9.5pp accuracy at 50% coverage with no additional training cost.

AI.tldr: 研究引入三层层诊断框架，通过三个指标（潜在异常检测、视觉必要性评分、竞争评分）来解构VLMs幻觉来源。发现69.6%的样本表现出"视觉谄媚"现象，即模型检测到视觉异常但仍产生幻觉以满足用户期望，而零样本显示"稳健拒绝"能力。
AI.motivation: 探究VLMs在正确回答时是真正依赖视觉信息还是利用语言捷径（language shortcuts），即模型是否具有真正的视觉 groundedness 还是仅仅依赖于语言先验。
AI.method: 提出三层层诊断框架，包含三个指标：1) 潜在异常检测（Latent Anomaly Detection，感知意识）；2) 视觉必要性评分（Visual Necessity Score，通过KL散度测量视觉依赖）；3) 竞争评分（Competition Score，视觉 groundedness 与指令遵循之间的冲突）。使用反事实干预（盲图、噪声图、冲突图）在7个VLM和7000个模型-样本对上进行测试。
AI.result: 1) 69.6%的样本表现出"视觉谄媚"（Visual Sycophancy）——模型检测到视觉异常但仍产生幻觉以满足用户期望；2) 零样本显示"稳健拒绝"（Robust Refusal），表明对齐训练系统性地抑制了真实的 uncertainty 承认；3) 扩展分析（Qwen2.5-VL 7B到72B）表明更大模型减少语言捷径但加剧视觉谄媚；4) 诊断分数可实现后验选择性预测策略，在50%覆盖率下达到+9.5pp准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: 仅靠模型规模无法解决 grounding 问题。视觉谄媚是一个系统性问题，源于对齐训练过度抑制拒绝能力。诊断分数可作为有效的无训练成本的选择性预测依据。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Visual Language Models and their hallucination behaviors (AI safety/alignment research), not Computer Graphics or 3D motion generation. While it mentions VLMs, the application domain is fundamentally different - it's studying whether VLMs truly use visual information vs language shortcuts, not applying VLMs for video-to-3D motion synthesis, quality control of video generation, or visual guidance for 3D motion. The pain points in the profile (extracting 3D motion from 2D video, quality control of video generation, bridging 2D-3D gap) are completely unaddressed. This is an AI research paper, not a Computer Graphics paper.

title: From Weak Cues to Real Identities: Evaluating Inference-Driven De-Anonymization in LLM Agents
summary: Anonymization is widely treated as a practical safeguard because re-identifying anonymous records was historically costly, requiring domain expertise, tailored algorithms, and manual corroboration. We study a growing privacy risk that may weaken this barrier: LLM-based agents can autonomously reconstruct real-world identities from scattered, individually non-identifying cues. By combining these sparse cues with public information, agents resolve identities without bespoke engineering. We formalize this threat as \emph{inference-driven linkage} and systematically evaluate it across three settings: classical linkage scenarios (Netflix and AOL), \emph{InferLink} (a controlled benchmark varying task intent, shared cues, and attacker knowledge), and modern text-rich artifacts. Without task-specific heuristics, agents successfully execute both fixed-pool matching and open-ended identity resolution. In the Netflix Prize setting, an agent reconstructs 79.2\% of identities, significantly outperforming a 56.0\% classical baseline. Furthermore, linkage emerges not only under explicit adversarial prompts but also as a byproduct of benign cross-source analysis in \emph{InferLink} and unstructured research narratives. These findings establish that identity inference -- not merely explicit information disclosure -- must be treated as a first-class privacy risk; evaluations must measure what identities an agent can infer.

AI.tldr: 研究LLM智能体如何通过组合非识别性线索和公开信息来重新识别匿名记录，提出"推理驱动链接"威胁模型，并在Netflix、AOL和InferLink基准测试中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统上认为匿名化是实用的隐私保护措施，因为重新识别匿名记录需要领域专业知识、定制算法和人工印证，成本高昂。但随着LLM智能体的发展，这一屏障可能被削弱，作者试图研究LLM智能体是否能自主从分散的、单独来看不具有识别性的线索中重建真实世界身份。
AI.method: 将威胁形式化为"推理驱动链接"(inference-driven linkage)，在三个场景进行系统评估：1)经典链接场景(Netflix和AOL)；2)InferLink(可控基准测试，变化任务意图、共享线索和攻击者知识)；3)现代富文本产物。
AI.result: 在无任务特定启发式条件下，智能体成功执行了固定池匹配和开放域身份解析。在Netflix Prize设置中，智能体重建了79.2%的身份，显著优于56.0%的经典基线。链接不仅在明确对抗性提示下出现，也作为InferLink和非结构化研究叙述中良性跨源分析的副产物出现。
AI.conclusion: 身份推理不仅是显式信息披露，必须被视为一等隐私风险；评估必须衡量智能体能推断出什么身份。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agents and privacy/re-identification attacks (security/NLP domain), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on 3D motion synthesis from video, video generation models, and visual feature extraction - while this paper focuses on de-anonymization through LLM inference. No overlap in application domain, methods, or research area.

title: Pixel-Accurate Epipolar Guided Matching
summary: Keypoint matching can be slow and unreliable in challenging conditions such as repetitive textures or wide-baseline views. In such cases, known geometric relations (e.g., the fundamental matrix) can be used to restrict potential correspondences to a narrow epipolar envelope, thereby reducing the search space and improving robustness. These epipolar-guided matching approaches have proved effective in tasks such as SfM; however, most rely on coarse spatial binning, which introduces approximation errors, requires costly post-processing, and may miss valid correspondences. We address these limitations with an exact formulation that performs candidate selection directly in angular space. In our approach, each keypoint is assigned a tolerance circle which, when viewed from the epipole, defines an angular interval. Matching then becomes a 1D angular interval query, solved efficiently in logarithmic time with a segment tree. This guarantees pixel-level tolerance, supports per-keypoint control, and removes unnecessary descriptor comparisons. Extensive evaluation on ETH3D demonstrates noticeable speedups over existing approaches while recovering exact correspondence sets.

AI.tldr: 针对挑战性条件下的关键点匹配问题，提出了一种精确的极线引导匹配方法。该方法将关键点匹配转化为角空间中的1D区间查询问题，通过线段树在对数时间内高效解决，实现了像素级容差和每关键点控制。
AI.motivation: 在重复纹理或宽基线视图等挑战性条件下，传统关键点匹配速度慢且不可靠。虽然已知几何关系（如基础矩阵）可用于限制对应关系到极线包络，但现有方法依赖粗略的空间分箱，引入近似误差，需要昂贵的后处理，且可能遗漏有效对应。
AI.method: 提出一种精确公式，直接在角空间进行候选选择。具体做法：为每个关键点分配一个容差圆，从极点观察时定义角度区间；匹配问题转化为1D角度区间查询；使用线段树在对数时间内高效解决。
AI.result: 在ETH3D数据集上进行广泛评估，相比现有方法实现明显加速，同时恢复了精确的对应集合。
AI.conclusion: 该方法保证像素级容差，支持每关键点控制，消除了不必要的描述符比较，提高了匹配效率和鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses computer vision problems (keypoint matching, epipolar geometry, multi-view 3D reconstruction) using segment trees - fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics for video generation and 3D motion synthesis. The application domain is computer vision/structure-from-motion, not 3D motion generation from video. title: Inst4DGS: Instance-Decomposed 4D Gaussian Splatting with Multi-Video Label Permutation Learning
summary: We present Inst4DGS, an instance-decomposed 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) approach with long-horizon per-Gaussian trajectories. While dynamic 4DGS has advanced rapidly, instance-decomposed 4DGS remains underexplored, largely due to the difficulty of associating inconsistent instance labels across independently segmented multi-view videos. We address this challenge by introducing per-video label-permutation latents that learn cross-video instance matches through a differentiable Sinkhorn layer, enabling direct multi-view supervision with consistent identity preservation. This explicit label alignment yields sharp decision boundaries and temporally stable identities without identity drift. To further improve efficiency, we propose instance-decomposed motion scaffolds that provide low-dimensional motion bases per object for long-horizon trajectory optimization. Experiments on Panoptic Studio and Neural3DV show that Inst4DGS jointly supports tracking and instance decomposition while achieving state-of-the-art rendering and segmentation quality. On the Panoptic Studio dataset, Inst4DGS improves PSNR from 26.10 to 28.36, and instance mIoU from 0.6310 to 0.9129, over the strongest baseline.

AI.tldr: Inst4DGS是一种实例分解的4D高斯溅射方法，采用长-horizon每高斯轨迹来处理动态场景中的实例跟踪和分解问题。
AI.motivation: 动态4DGS发展迅速，但实例分解的4DGS仍探索不足，主要难点在于独立分割的多视图视频中难以关联不一致的实例标签。
AI.method: 1. 引入每视频标签排列潜在变量，通过可微 Sinkhorn 层学习跨视频实例匹配，实现直接多视图监督和一致身份保持。2. 提出实例分解的运动脚手架，为每个对象提供低维运动基，用于长视野轨迹优化。
AI.result: 在 Panoptic Studio 和 Neural3DV 数据集上，Inst4DGS 实现了 state-of-the-art 的渲染和分割质量。在 Panoptic Studio 上，PSNR 从 26.10 提升至 28.36，实例 mIoU 从 0.6310 提升至 0.9129。
AI.conclusion: Inst4DGS 能够联合支持跟踪和实例分解，达到了最先进的渲染和分割质量。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 4D Gaussian Splatting for dynamic scene reconstruction and instance segmentation, which falls within Computer Graphics but addresses a different application domain than the research profile. While both deal with 3D/4D content, this paper focuses on multi-view video-based 4D scene rendering and instance tracking (improving PSNR and mIoU metrics), not on video generation models, 3D motion synthesis from 2D priors, or quality control of generated video outputs. The methods (4DGS, Sinkhorn for label permutation) are unrelated to diffusion-based video generation or motion generation models. Only tangential connection exists in processing video as input, but the goal is reconstruction rather than generation or motion synthesis.

title: From Topic to Transition Structure: Unsupervised Concept Discovery at Corpus Scale via Predictive Associative Memory
summary: Embedding models group text by semantic content, what text is about. We show that temporal co-occurrence within texts discovers a different kind of structure: recurrent transition-structure concepts or what text does. We train a 29.4M-parameter contrastive model on 373 million co-occurrence pairs from 9,766 Project Gutenberg texts (24.96 million passages), mapping pre-trained embeddings into an association space where passages with similar transition structure cluster together. Under capacity constraint (42.75% accuracy), the model must compress across recurring patterns rather than memorise individual co-occurrences. Clustering at six granularities (k=50 to k=2,000) produces a multi-resolution concept map; from broad modes like "direct confrontation" and "lyrical meditation" to precise registers and scene templates like "sailor dialect" and "courtroom cross-examination." At k=100, clusters average 4,508 books each (of 9,766), confirming corpus-wide patterns. Direct comparison with embedding-similarity clustering shows that raw embeddings group by topic while association-space clusters group by function, register, and literary tradition. Unseen novels are assigned to existing clusters without retraining; the association model concentrates each novel into a selective subset of coherent clusters, while raw embedding assignment saturates nearly all clusters. Validation controls address positional, length, and book-concentration confounds. The method extends Predictive Associative Memory (PAM, arXiv:2602.11322) from episodic recall to concept formation: where PAM recalls specific associations, multi-epoch contrastive training under compression extracts structural patterns that transfer to unseen texts, the same framework producing qualitatively different behaviour in a different regime.

title: Mind the Rarities: Can Rare Skin Diseases Be Reliably Diagnosed via Diagnostic Reasoning?
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) demonstrate strong performance in dermatology; however, evaluating diagnostic reasoning for rare conditions remains largely unexplored. Existing benchmarks focus on common diseases and assess only final accuracy, overlooking the clinical reasoning process, which is critical for complex cases. We address this gap by constructing DermCase, a long-context benchmark derived from peer-reviewed case reports. Our dataset contains 26,030 multi-modal image-text pairs and 6,354 clinically challenging cases, each annotated with comprehensive clinical information and step-by-step reasoning chains. To enable reliable evaluation, we establish DermLIP-based similarity metrics that achieve stronger alignment with dermatologists for assessing differential diagnosis quality. Benchmarking 22 leading LVLMs exposes significant deficiencies across diagnosis accuracy, differential diagnosis, and clinical reasoning. Fine-tuning experiments demonstrate that instruction tuning substantially improves performance while Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) yields minimal gains. Systematic error analysis further reveals critical limitations in current models' reasoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: 针对皮肤病学领域罕见病诊断推理评估缺失的问题，构建了DermCase长上下文基准数据集，包含26,030个多模态图像-文本对和6,354个临床挑战性病例，标注了临床信息和逐步推理链。基准测试22个主流LVLMs发现其在诊断推理方面存在显著不足，指令微调可有效提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要关注常见疾病，仅评估最终准确性，忽略了临床推理过程，且缺乏对罕见病诊断推理的评估。
AI.method: 构建 DermCase 基准数据集（26,030个多模态图像-文本对，6,354个临床挑战性病例），建立 DermLIP 相似度度量标准用于评估鉴别诊断质量，对22个主流LVLMs进行基准测试，并开展指令微调和DPO优化实验。
AI.result: 22个主流LVLMs在诊断准确性、鉴别诊断和临床推理方面存在显著不足；指令微调可显著提升性能，DPO优化效果有限；当前模型的推理能力存在关键局限性。
AI.conclusion: 研究构建了DermCase基准数据集，发现22个主流LVLMs在罕见皮肤病诊断、鉴别诊断和临床推理方面存在显著不足。指令微调可显著提升性能，而DPO优化效果有限。这项工作为评估LVLMs在皮肤病学领域的诊断推理能力提供了重要基准。

title: Prune-then-Quantize or Quantize-then-Prune? Understanding the Impact of Compression Order in Joint Model Compression
summary: What happens when multiple compression methods are combined-does the order in which they are applied matter? Joint model compression has emerged as a powerful strategy to achieve higher efficiency by combining multiple methods such as pruning and quantization. A central but underexplored factor in joint model compression is the compression order, or the sequence of different methods within the compression pipeline. Most prior studies have either sidestepped the issue by assuming orthogonality between techniques, while a few have examined them only in highly constrained cases. Consequently, the broader role of compression order in shaping model performance remains poorly understood. In this paper, we address the overlooked problem of compression order and provide both theoretical and empirical analysis. We formulate the problem of optimizing the compression order and introduce the Progressive Intensity Hypothesis, which states that weaker perturbations should precede stronger ones. We provide theoretical guarantees showing that the relative benefit of one order increases with the underlying performance gap. Extensive experiments on both language and vision models validate the hypothesis, and further show its generality to broader setups such as multi-stage compression and mixed-precision quantization.

AI.tldr: 研究联合模型压缩中的压缩顺序问题，提出"渐进强度假设"，即较弱扰动应先于较强扰动应用，并提供理论和实验验证。
AI.motivation: 联合模型压缩（结合剪枝、量化等多种方法）已成为提高效率的有效策略，但压缩顺序对模型性能的影响尚未被充分研究。大多数先前研究假设技术之间的正交性，或仅在严格约束下进行检验。
AI.method: 1) 形式化压缩顺序优化问题；2) 提出渐进强度假设（较弱扰动先于较强扰动）；3) 提供理论保证，证明一种顺序的相对收益随性能差距增加而增加；4) 在语言和视觉模型上进行广泛实验验证。
AI.result: 实验验证了假设的有效性，并展示了对多阶段压缩和混合精度量化等更广泛设置的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 压缩顺序对联合模型压缩性能有重要影响，渐进强度假设为优化压缩顺序提供了理论指导和实践依据。较弱扰动先于较强扰动的原则具有普遍适用性。

title: AS2 -- Attention-Based Soft Answer Sets: An End-to-End Differentiable Neuro-Soft-Symbolic Reasoning Architecture
summary: Neuro-symbolic artificial intelligence (AI) systems typically couple a neural perception module to a discrete symbolic solver through a non-differentiable boundary, preventing constraint-satisfaction feedback from reaching the perception encoder during training. We introduce AS2 (Attention-Based Soft Answer Sets), a fully differentiable neuro-symbolic architecture that replaces the discrete solver with a soft, continuous approximation of the Answer Set Programming (ASP) immediate consequence operator $T_P$. AS2 maintains per-position probability distributions over a finite symbol domain throughout the forward pass and trains end-to-end by minimizing the fixed-point residual of a probabilistic lift of $T_P$, thereby differentiating through the constraint check without invoking an external solver at either training or inference time. The architecture is entirely free of conventional positional embeddings. Instead, it encodes problem structure through constraint-group membership embeddings that directly reflect the declarative ASP specification, making the model agnostic to arbitrary position indexing. On Visual Sudoku, AS2 achieves 99.89% cell accuracy and 100% constraint satisfaction (verified by Clingo) across 1,000 test boards, using a greedy constrained decoding procedure that requires no external solver. On MNIST Addition with $N \in \{2, 4, 8\}$ addends, AS2 achieves digit accuracy above 99.7% across all scales. These results demonstrate that a soft differentiable fixpoint operator, combined with constraint-aware attention and declarative constraint specification, can match or exceed pipeline and solver-based neuro-symbolic systems while maintaining full end-to-end differentiability.

AI.tldr: AS2是一种完全可微分的神经符号AI架构，用软连续近似的答案集编程(ASP)求解器取代离散求解器，通过最小化概率提升的T_P算子的固定点残差进行端到端训练，无需外部求解器即可实现约束满足。
AI.motivation: 神经符号AI系统通常将神经感知模块与离散符号求解器通过不可微边界耦合，阻止约束满足反馈在训练期间到达感知编码器。
AI.method: 1.用软连续的T_P算子近似替代离散ASP求解器；2.维护符号域上每位置的概率分布；3.通过最小化概率提升的T_P固定点残差进行端到端训练；4.使用约束组 membership embeddings代替传统位置编码。
AI.result: Visual Sudoku: 99.89%单元格准确率，100%约束满足率(Clingo验证)；MNIST加法(N=2,4,8): 所有规模下数字准确率>99.7%。
AI.conclusion: 软可微固定点算子结合约束感知注意力和声明式约束规范可匹配或超越基于管道和求解器的神经符号系统，同时保持完全端到端可微性。

title: R&D: Balancing Reliability and Diversity in Synthetic Data Augmentation for Semantic Segmentation
summary: Collecting and annotating datasets for pixel-level semantic segmentation tasks are highly labor-intensive. Data augmentation provides a viable solution by enhancing model generalization without additional real-world data collection. Traditional augmentation techniques, such as translation, scaling, and color transformations, create geometric variations but fail to generate new structures. While generative models have been employed to extend semantic information of datasets, they often struggle to maintain consistency between the original and generated images, particularly for pixel-level tasks. In this work, we propose a novel synthetic data augmentation pipeline that integrates controllable diffusion models. Our approach balances diversity and reliability data, effectively bridging the gap between synthetic and real data. We utilize class-aware prompting and visual prior blending to improve image quality further, ensuring precise alignment with segmentation labels. By evaluating benchmark datasets such as PASCAL VOC and BDD100K, we demonstrate that our method significantly enhances semantic segmentation performance, especially in data-scarce scenarios, while improving model robustness in real-world applications. Our code is available at \href{https://github.com/chequanghuy/Enhanced-Generative-Data-Augmentation-for-Semantic-Segmentation-via-Stronger-Guidance}{https://github.com/chequanghuy/Enhanced-Generative-Data-Augmentation-for-Semantic-Segmentation-via-Stronger-Guidance}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可控扩散模型的新型合成数据增强管道，用于像素级语义分割任务。该方法通过类别感知提示和视觉先验混合来平衡数据的多样性和可靠性，有效缩小合成数据与真实数据之间的差距。在PASCAL VOC和BDD100K数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了语义分割性能，尤其在数据稀缺场景下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 像素级语义分割任务的数据收集和标注成本高昂。传统数据增强技术（如平移、缩放、颜色变换）虽能产生几何变化，但无法生成新的结构。虽然生成模型已被用于扩展数据集的语义信息，但它们往往难以保持原始图像与生成图像之间的一致性，特别是对于像素级任务。
AI.method: 提出了一种集成可控扩散模型的合成数据增强管道。具体包括：(1)类别感知提示（class-aware prompting）确保生成图像与分割标签精确对齐；(2)视觉先验混合（visual prior blending）进一步提升图像质量；(3)平衡数据的多样性与可靠性，缩小合成数据与真实数据之间的差距。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和BDD100K基准数据集上的评估表明，该方法显著提升了语义分割性能，尤其在数据稀缺场景下效果明显，同时提高了模型在真实应用中的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 基于可控扩散模型的合成数据增强方法能够有效解决语义分割任务中标注数据不足的问题，为数据稀缺场景提供了一种实用的解决方案，并提升了模型的泛化能力和实际应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 2D semantic segmentation (pixel-level image classification), which is a Computer Vision task, not related to the Computer Graphics research profile focused on 3D motion generation. Although both use diffusion models, the application domains are completely different: the paper generates synthetic training data for image segmentation, while the research profile concerns extracting/synthesizing 3D motion from video, bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space. This is exactly the case where same method (diffusion) in different application domains should be considered irrelevant.

title: AlignMamba-2: Enhancing Multimodal Fusion and Sentiment Analysis with Modality-Aware Mamba
summary: In the era of large-scale pre-trained models, effectively adapting general knowledge to specific affective computing tasks remains a challenge, particularly regarding computational efficiency and multimodal heterogeneity. While Transformer-based methods have excelled at modeling inter-modal dependencies, their quadratic computational complexity limits their use with long-sequence data. Mamba-based models have emerged as a computationally efficient alternative; however, their inherent sequential scanning mechanism struggles to capture the global, non-sequential relationships that are crucial for effective cross-modal alignment. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{AlignMamba-2}, an effective and efficient framework for multimodal fusion and sentiment analysis. Our approach introduces a dual alignment strategy that regularizes the model using both Optimal Transport distance and Maximum Mean Discrepancy, promoting geometric and statistical consistency between modalities without incurring any inference-time overhead. More importantly, we design a Modality-Aware Mamba layer, which employs a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with modality-specific and modality-shared experts to explicitly handle data heterogeneity during the fusion process. Extensive experiments on four challenging benchmarks, including dynamic time-series (on the CMU-MOSI and CMU-MOSEI datasets) and static image-related tasks (on the NYU-Depth V2 and MVSA-Single datasets), demonstrate that AlignMamba-2 establishes a new state-of-the-art in both effectiveness and efficiency across diverse pattern recognition tasks, ranging from dynamic time-series analysis to static image-text classification.

AI.tldr: AlignMamba-2是一个用于多模态融合和情感分析的有效且高效的框架，通过双对齐策略（最优传输距离和最大均值差异）和模态感知Mamba层（混合专家架构）来解决大规模预训练模型在特定情感计算任务中的适应性问题，同时处理计算效率和多模态异构性挑战。
AI.motivation: 在大规模预训练模型时代，如何有效将通用知识适应到特定的情感计算任务中仍面临挑战，特别是计算效率和多模态异构性问题。Transformer方法虽然能很好地建模模态间依赖关系，但其二次计算复杂度限制了其在长序列数据中的应用；而Mamba模型虽然计算高效，但其固有的顺序扫描机制难以捕捉对有效跨模态对齐至关重要的全局非顺序关系。
AI.method: 提出AlignMamba-2框架，包含两个核心创新：1）双对齐策略，使用最优传输距离和最大均值差异来正则化模型，促进模态间的几何和统计一致性，且不增加推理时间开销；2）模态感知Mamba层，采用混合专家架构，包含模态特定专家和模态共享专家，在融合过程中显式处理数据异构性。
AI.result: 在四个具有挑战性的基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，包括动态时间序列（CMU-MOSI和CMU-MOSEI）和静态图像相关任务（NYU-Depth V2和MVSA-Single），结果表明AlignMamba-2在从动态时间序列分析到静态图像文本分类的各种模式识别任务中实现了新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: AlignMamba-2通过创新的双对齐策略和模态感知Mamba层设计，成功解决了多模态融合中的计算效率和异构性问题，在多个基准数据集上展现出卓越的有效性和效率平衡，为情感计算和其他多模态任务提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multimodal fusion and sentiment analysis (emotion computing) using Mamba models, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics field. The research profile is about 3D motion generation from video, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), and bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space - while this paper focuses on emotion recognition from multimodal data. No overlap in application domain, pain points, or methods relevant to computer graphics or 3D motion synthesis.

title: Cognitive Mismatch in Multimodal Large Language Models for Discrete Symbol Understanding
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in interpreting natural scenes, their ability to process discrete symbols -- the fundamental building blocks of human cognition -- remains a critical open question. Unlike continuous visual data, symbols such as mathematical formulas, chemical structures, and linguistic characters require precise, deeper interpretation. This paper introduces a comprehensive benchmark to evaluate how top-tier MLLMs navigate these "discrete semantic spaces" across five domains: language, culture, mathematics, physics, and chemistry. Our investigation uncovers a counterintuitive phenomenon: models often fail at basic symbol recognition yet succeed in complex reasoning tasks, suggesting they rely on linguistic probability rather than true visual perception. By exposing this "cognitive mismatch", we highlight a significant gap in current AI capabilities: the struggle to truly perceive and understand the symbolic languages that underpin scientific discovery and abstract thought. This work offers a roadmap for developing more rigorous, human-aligned intelligent systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个综合基准来评估顶级多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)处理离散符号的能力，涵盖语言、文化、数学、物理和化学五个领域，揭示了模型在基本符号识别与复杂推理之间存在"认知错配"现象。
AI.motivation: MLLMs在自然场景理解方面取得显著成功，但处理离散符号（数学公式、化学结构、语言字符等）的能力仍是关键开放问题。与连续视觉数据不同，离散符号需要更精确、更深层的解释。
AI.method: 构建了一个全面基准，在五个领域（语言、文化、数学、物理、化学）评估顶级MLLMs处理"离散语义空间"的能力。
AI.result: 发现了一个反直觉现象：模型经常在基本符号识别上失败，却在复杂推理任务中成功，表明它们依赖语言概率而非真正的视觉感知。
AI.conclusion: 暴露了当前AI能力的重要差距：难以真正感知和理解支撑科学发现和抽象思维的符号语言。为开发更严格、更符合人类认知的智能系统提供了路线图。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on discrete symbol understanding (math formulas, chemical structures, language characters) - an AI/LLM benchmarking study. This is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics research profile focused on 3D motion synthesis from video, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), visual feature extraction for motion generation, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The application domain is entirely different - this is LLM evaluation research, not computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: SR-Nav: Spatial Relationships Matter for Zero-shot Object Goal Navigation
summary: Zero-shot object-goal navigation aims to find target objects in unseen environments using only egocentric observation. Recent methods leverage foundation models' comprehension and reasoning capabilities to enhance navigation performance. However, when faced with poor viewpoints or weak semantic cues, foundation models often fail to support reliable reasoning in both perception and planning, resulting in inefficient or failed navigation. We observe that inherent relationships among objects and regions encode structured scene priors, which help agents infer plausible target locations even under partial observations. Motivated by this insight, we propose Spatial Relation-aware Navigation (SR-Nav), a framework that models both observed and experience-based spatial relationships to enhance both perception and planning. Specifically, SR-Nav first constructs a Dynamic Spatial Relationship Graph (DSRG) that encodes the target-centered spatial relationships through the foundation models and updates dynamically with real-time observations. We then introduce a Relation-aware Matching Module. It utilizes relationship matching instead of naive detection, leveraging diverse relationships in the DSRG to verify and correct errors, enhancing visual perception robustness. Finally, we design a Dynamic Relationship Planning Module to reduce the planning search space by dynamically computing the optimal paths based on the DSRG from the current position, thereby guiding planning and reducing exploration redundancy. Experiments on HM3D show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both success rate and navigation efficiency. The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/Mzyw-1314/SR-Nav

AI.tldr: SR-Nav是一个用于零样本目标导航的框架，通过构建动态空间关系图(DSRG)来增强感知和规划能力。该方法利用目标中心空间关系和关系匹配来纠正视觉感知错误，并通过动态关系规划来减少搜索空间。
AI.motivation: 基础模型在视角不佳或语义线索较弱时无法提供可靠的推理，导致导航失败或低效。作者观察到物体和区域之间的内在关系编码了结构化的场景先验，即使在部分观测下也能帮助智能体推断合理的目标位置。
AI.method: 1. 构建动态空间关系图(DSRG)：通过基础模型编码目标中心空间关系，并随实时观测动态更新；2. 关系感知匹配模块：利用DSRG中的多样化关系进行关系匹配而非简单检测，以验证和纠正错误；3. 动态关系规划模块：从当前位置基于DSRG动态计算最优路径，减少规划搜索空间。
AI.result: 在HM3D数据集上，该方法在成功率和导航效率方面均达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模观察到的和基于经验的空间关系，SR-Nav能够有效增强零样本目标导航的感知鲁棒性和规划效率，为解决基础模型在弱语义场景下的推理失败问题提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about zero-shot object goal navigation for robots (robotics/AI), which is completely unrelated to the research profile focused on Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation from video. Even though the paper uses Vision-Language Models, the application domain is entirely different: robot navigation vs. 3D motion synthesis from 2D video priors. This is a case of different fields entirely - robotics navigation versus computer graphics motion generation.

title: Cross-Domain Demo-to-Code via Neurosymbolic Counterfactual Reasoning
summary: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have enabled video-instructed robotic programming, allowing agents to interpret video demonstrations and generate executable control code. We formulate video-instructed robotic programming as a cross-domain adaptation problem, where perceptual and physical differences between demonstration and deployment induce procedural mismatches. However, current VLMs lack the procedural understanding needed to reformulate causal dependencies and achieve task-compatible behavior under such domain shifts. We introduce NeSyCR, a neurosymbolic counterfactual reasoning framework that enables verifiable adaptation of task procedures, providing a reliable synthesis of code policies. NeSyCR abstracts video demonstrations into symbolic trajectories that capture the underlying task procedure. Given deployment observations, it derives counterfactual states that reveal cross-domain incompatibilities. By exploring the symbolic state space with verifiable checks, NeSyCR proposes procedural revisions that restore compatibility with the demonstrated procedure. NeSyCR achieves a 31.14% improvement in task success over the strongest baseline Statler, showing robust cross-domain adaptation across both simulated and real-world manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: NeSyCR是一种神经符号反事实推理框架，用于视频指导的机器人编程，通过可验证的适应实现任务程序的可靠代码策略合成，在跨域适应方面取得显著进展。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型缺乏程序理解能力，无法在演示与部署环境存在领域差异的情况下重新制定因果依赖关系并实现任务兼容行为。视频指导的机器人编程面临跨域适应的挑战。
AI.method: 将视频指导的机器人编程表述为跨域适应问题；将视频演示抽象为捕获底层任务程序的符号轨迹；根据部署观测推导反事实状态以揭示跨域不兼容性；通过可验证检查探索符号状态空间；提出程序修订建议以恢复与演示程序的兼容性。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实世界的操作任务中，任务成功率比最强基线Statler提升31.14%，实现了稳健的跨域适应。
AI.conclusion: NeSyCR能够实现任务程序的可验证适应，提供可靠的代码策略合成，为视频指导机器人编程中的跨域挑战提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about ROBOTICS (video-guided robot programming with neurosymbolic reasoning), not Computer Graphics or 3D motion generation. While it deals with video input, it focuses on cross-domain adaptation for task program synthesis in robotics, not on extracting 3D motion from 2D video, video generation models, or visual features driving motion synthesis. The application domain is fundamentally different - robotics task programming vs. computer graphics motion generation.

title: Learning Consistent Temporal Grounding between Related Tasks in Sports Coaching
summary: Video-LLMs often attend to irrelevant frames, which is especially detrimental for sports coaching tasks requiring precise temporal grounding. Yet obtaining frame-level supervision is challenging: expensive to collect from humans and unreliable from other models. We improve temporal grounding without additional annotations by exploiting the observation that related tasks, such as generation and verification, must attend to the same frames. We enforce this via a self-consistency objective over select visual attention maps of tightly-related tasks. Using VidDiffBench, which provides ground-truth keyframe annotations, we first validate that attention misallocation is a significant bottleneck. We then show that training with our objective yields gains of +3.0%, +14.1% accuracy and +0.9 BERTScore over supervised finetuning across three sports coaching tasks: Exact, FitnessQA, and ExpertAF, even surpassing closed-source models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过自一致性目标来改进视频大型语言模型在体育辅导任务中的时间定位能力，无需额外标注即可提升性能。
AI.motivation: 视频大型语言模型常常关注无关帧，这对需要精确时间定位的体育辅导任务特别不利，且获取帧级监督成本高昂且不可靠。
AI.method: 利用生成和验证等紧密相关任务必须关注相同帧的观察，通过对选定视觉注意力图施加自一致性目标来实现监督。
AI.result: 在使用VidDiffBench验证注意力分配错误是重要瓶颈后，训练该目标在三个体育辅导任务（Exact、FitnessQA和ExpertAF）上相比监督微调获得+3.0%、+14.1%准确率和+0.9 BERTScore的提升，甚至超越闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过相关任务的自一致性监督可有效改善视频大型语言模型的时间定位能力，且无需人工标注即可超越传统监督微调方法。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses a completely different application domain. While the research profile focuses on 3D Motion Generation in Computer Graphics (extracting 3D motion from video, visual guidance for motion synthesis), this paper is about video-based temporal grounding for sports coaching using Video LLMs. Although both fields use Vision-Language Models, this paper deals with video understanding and temporal localization, not 3D motion generation or synthesis. The pain points and goals are entirely different - this is about coaching assistance through video analysis, not about bridging 2D visuals to 3D motion space for graphics generation.

title: Interpretable Prostate Cancer Detection using a Small Cohort of MRI Images
summary: Prostate cancer is a leading cause of mortality in men, yet interpretation of T2-weighted prostate MRI remains challenging due to subtle and heterogeneous lesions. We developed an interpretable framework for automatic cancer detection using a small dataset of 162 T2-weighted images (102 cancer, 60 normal), addressing data scarcity through transfer learning and augmentation. We performed a comprehensive comparison of Vision Transformers (ViT, Swin), CNNs (ResNet18), and classical methods (Logistic Regression, SVM, HOG+SVM). Transfer-learned ResNet18 achieved the best performance (90.9% accuracy, 95.2% sensitivity, AUC 0.905) with only 11M parameters, while Vision Transformers showed lower performance despite substantially higher complexity. Notably, HOG+SVM achieved comparable accuracy (AUC 0.917), highlighting the effectiveness of handcrafted features in small datasets. Unlike state-of-the-art approaches relying on biparametric MRI (T2+DWI) and large cohorts, our method achieves competitive performance using only T2-weighted images, reducing acquisition complexity and computational cost. In a reader study of 22 cases, five radiologists achieved a mean sensitivity of 67.5% (Fleiss Kappa = 0.524), compared to 95.2% for the AI model, suggesting potential for AI-assisted screening to reduce missed cancers and improve consistency. Code and data are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 研究团队开发了一个可解释的自动化前列腺癌检测框架，仅使用162例T2加权MRI图像，通过迁移学习和数据增强解决数据稀缺问题。在比较Vision Transformers (ViT, Swin)、CNN (ResNet18)和传统方法后，迁移学习ResNet18表现最佳（准确率90.9%，灵敏度95.2%，AUC 0.905），而HOG+SVM也达到相当准确率（AUC 0.917）。该方法仅需T2加权图像即可达到竞争力性能，AI模型灵敏度（95.2%）显著高于五位放射科医生的平均灵敏度（67.5%）。
AI.motivation: 前列腺癌是男性主要致死原因之一，T2加权前列腺MRI图像解读困难，主要因为病变表现细微且异质性强。现有最先进方法依赖双参数MRI（T2加权+DWI）和大样本队列，数据获取和计算成本高。需要开发一种仅使用T2加权图像即可实现高效检测的模型，降低采集复杂度和计算成本。
AI.method: 研究构建了包含102例癌症和60例正常的小样本数据集（162例），采用迁移学习和数据增强技术解决数据稀缺问题。全面比较了三类方法：1) Vision Transformers（ViT, Swin）；2) CNNs（ResNet18）；3) 传统机器学习方法（Logistic Regression, SVM, HOG+SVM）。同时进行了22例读者研究，邀请五位放射科医生评估作为对比。
AI.result: 迁移学习ResNet18获得最佳性能：准确率90.9%、灵敏度95.2%、AUC 0.905，参数仅11M。Vision Transformers尽管复杂度更高但性能较低。HOG+SVM达到相当准确率（AUC 0.917），凸显了在小数据集中手工特征的有效性。读者研究中，五位放射科医生平均灵敏度67.5%（Fleiss Kappa = 0.524），而AI模型灵敏度达95.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法仅使用T2加权图像即可达到与双参数MRI方法相当的竞争力性能，显著降低了采集复杂度和计算成本。AI模型在灵敏度上大幅超越放射科医生（95.2% vs 67.5%），有望作为辅助筛查工具减少漏诊并提高诊断一致性，为前列腺癌AI辅助诊断提供了可行的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this is a medical imaging paper about prostate cancer detection using MRI, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics, specifically video generation and 3D motion synthesis. Although both use similar deep learning methods (CNNs, Vision Transformers), the application domains are entirely different. The paper addresses medical diagnosis (healthcare AI), not computer graphics, video generation, or 3D motion generation.

title: Correlation-Weighted Multi-Reward Optimization for Compositional Generation
summary: Text-to-image models produce images that align well with natural language prompts, but compositional generation has long been a central challenge. Models often struggle to satisfy multiple concepts within a single prompt, frequently omitting some concepts and resulting in partial success. Such failures highlight the difficulty of jointly optimizing multiple concepts during reward optimization, where competing concepts can interfere with one another. To address this limitation, we propose Correlation-Weighted Multi-Reward Optimization (\ours), a framework that leverages the correlation structure among concept rewards to adaptively weight each attribute concept in optimization. By accounting for interactions among concepts, \ours balances competing reward signals and emphasizes concepts that are partially satisfied yet inconsistently generated across samples, improving compositional generation. Specifically, we decompose multi-concept prompts into pre-defined concept groups (\eg, objects, attributes, and relations) and obtain reward signals from dedicated reward models for each concept. We then adaptively reweight these rewards, assigning higher weights to conflicting or hard-to-satisfy concepts using correlation-based difficulty estimation. By focusing optimization on the most challenging concepts within each group, \ours encourages the model to consistently satisfy all requested attributes simultaneously. We apply our approach to train state-of-the-art diffusion models, SD3.5 and FLUX.1-dev, and demonstrate consistent improvements on challenging multi-concept benchmarks, including ConceptMix, GenEval 2, and T2I-CompBench.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为"相关性加权多奖励优化"的新框架，通过利用概念奖励之间的相关性结构来自适应地调整每个属性概念在优化过程中的权重，从而改善文本到图像模型的组合生成能力。
AI.motivation: 当前文本到图像模型在组合生成方面存在挑战，模型常常难以同时满足单个提示词中的多个概念，导致部分概念被遗漏。这种失败突出了在奖励优化过程中联合优化多个概念的困难性，因为相互竞争的概念会相互干扰。
AI.method: 首先将多概念提示词分解为预定义的概念组（如对象、属性和关系），然后为每个概念获取专门的奖励模型信号。接着，通过基于相关性的难度估计，自适应地重新加权这些奖励，对冲突或难以满足的概念分配更高权重。通过聚焦每个概念组中最具挑战性的概念，鼓励模型同时一致地满足所有请求的属性。
AI.result: 在SD3.5和FLUX.1-dev模型上应用该方法，在ConceptMix、GenEval 2和T2I-CompBench等具有挑战性的多概念基准上展示了一致的改进。
AI.conclusion: 实验在ConceptMix、GenEval 2和T2I-CompBench等多个挑战性基准上展示了持续的改进，证明了该方法在处理多概念组合生成任务中的有效性和泛化能力。

relevance_reason: Complete domain mismatch. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation from video (bridging 2D video to 3D motion space), while this paper addresses 2D text-to-image generation and compositional image synthesis. Both use diffusion models, but in completely different application domains - image generation vs motion/video generation. The pain points are unrelated: profile addresses video-to-3D motion extraction and quality control for video generation, while paper addresses multi-concept text-to-image composition. This is a fundamental application domain mismatch despite superficial method similarities.

title: MedQ-UNI: Toward Unified Medical Image Quality Assessment and Restoration via Vision-Language Modeling
summary: Existing medical image restoration (Med-IR) methods are typically modality-specific or degradation-specific, failing to generalize across the heterogeneous degradations encountered in clinical practice. We argue this limitation stems from the isolation of Med-IR from medical image quality assessment (Med-IQA), as restoration models without explicit quality understanding struggle to adapt to diverse degradation types across modalities. To address these challenges, we propose MedQ-UNI, a unified vision-language model that follows an assess-then-restore paradigm, explicitly leveraging Med-IQA to guide Med-IR across arbitrary modalities and degradation types. MedQ-UNI adopts a multimodal autoregressive dual-expert architecture with shared attention: a quality assessment expert first identifies degradation issues through structured natural language descriptions, and a restoration expert then conditions on these descriptions to perform targeted image restoration. To support this paradigm, we construct a large-scale dataset of approximately 50K paired samples spanning three imaging modalities and five restoration tasks, each annotated with structured quality descriptions for joint Med-IQA and Med-IR training, along with a 2K-sample benchmark for evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that a single MedQ-UNI model, without any task-specific adaptation, achieves state-of-the-art restoration performance across all tasks while generating superior descriptions, confirming that explicit quality understanding meaningfully improves restoration fidelity and interpretability.

AI.tldr: MedQ-UNI是一个统一的视觉语言模型，采用"先评估后恢复"范式，通过结合医学图像质量评估(Med-IQA)来指导医学图像恢复(Med-IR)，能够跨模态和退化类型进行泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有的医学图像恢复方法通常是模态特定或退化特定的，难以泛化到临床实践中遇到的各种退化类型。问题根源在于Med-IR与Med-IQA的割裂，缺乏显式质量理解的恢复模型难以适应不同模态的各种退化类型。
AI.method: 提出多模态自回归双专家架构，共享注意力机制：质量评估专家首先通过结构化自然语言描述识别退化问题，恢复专家随后基于这些描述进行针对性图像恢复。构建了约50K样本的大规模数据集，涵盖三种成像模态和五种恢复任务。
AI.result: 单一MedQ-UNI模型无需任何任务特定适应，即可在所有任务上达到最先进的恢复性能，同时生成更优的描述。实验证实显式质量理解显著提高了恢复保真度和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 将Med-IQA与Med-IR相结合，通过"先评估后恢复"范式，可以实现跨模态、跨退化类型的统一医学图像恢复，显著提升恢复效果和可解释性。

It does not address any of the pain points mentioned (extracting 3D motion from 2D video, quality control for video generation, visual guidance for 3D motion synthesis, or bridging 2D-3D gap for motion). The application domain mismatch is fundamental - medical imaging and computer graphics/3D motion generation are distinct fields.

title: CAPSUL: A Comprehensive Human Protein Benchmark for Subcellular Localization
summary: Subcellular localization is a crucial biological task for drug target identification and function annotation. Although it has been biologically realized that subcellular localization is closely associated with protein structure, no existing dataset offers comprehensive 3D structural information with detailed subcellular localization annotations, thus severely hindering the application of promising structure-based models on this task. To address this gap, we introduce a new benchmark called $\mathbf{CAPSUL}$, a $\mathbf{C}$omprehensive hum$\mathbf{A}$n $\mathbf{P}$rotein benchmark for $\mathbf{SU}$bcellular $\mathbf{L}$ocalization. It features a dataset that integrates diverse 3D structural representations with fine-grained subcellular localization annotations carefully curated by domain experts. We evaluate this benchmark using a variety of state-of-the-art sequence-based and structure-based models, showcasing the importance of involving structural features in this task. Furthermore, we explore reweighting and single-label classification strategies to facilitate future investigation on structure-based methods for this task. Lastly, we showcase the powerful interpretability of structure-based methods through a case study on the Golgi apparatus, where we discover a decisive localization pattern $α$-helix from attention mechanisms, demonstrating the potential for bridging the gap with intuitive biological interpretability and paving the way for data-driven discoveries in cell biology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAPSUL数据集，这是一个新的人类蛋白质亚细胞定位基准数据集，整合了3D结构信息与细粒度亚细胞定位注释，用于推动基于结构的蛋白质亚细胞定位预测研究。
AI.motivation: 亚细胞定位与蛋白质结构密切相关，但现有数据集缺乏全面的3D结构信息和详细的亚细胞定位注释，严重阻碍了基于结构的模型在该任务上的应用。
AI.method: 构建了CAPSUL基准数据集，整合多种3D结构表示和专家标注的亚细胞定位信息；评估了多种基于序列和基于结构的先进模型；探索了重加权策略和单标签分类策略；通过注意力机制对高尔基体进行案例研究。
AI.result: 基于结构的模型在该任务上表现优于基于序列的模型，证明结构特征对亚细胞定位预测的重要性；在高尔基体案例中发现了一个关键的α-螺旋定位模式，展示了基于结构方法的强可解释性。
AI.conclusion: CAPSUL基准数据集填补了领域空白，基于结构的方法在亚细胞定位预测任务上具有显著优势，注意力机制可揭示直观的生物学可解释性，为数据驱动的细胞生物学发现奠定基础。

The application domains are entirely different - bioinformatics vs computer graphics/motion generation.

title: Recolour What Matters: Region-Aware Colour Editing via Token-Level Diffusion
summary: Colour is one of the most perceptually salient yet least controllable attributes in image generation. Although recent diffusion models can modify object colours from user instructions, their results often deviate from the intended hue, especially for fine-grained and local edits. Early text-driven methods rely on discrete language descriptions that cannot accurately represent continuous chromatic variations. To overcome this limitation, we propose ColourCrafter, a unified diffusion framework that transforms colour editing from global tone transfer into a structured, region-aware generation process. Unlike traditional colour driven methods, ColourCrafter performs token-level fusion of RGB colour tokens and image tokens in latent space, selectively propagating colour information to semantically relevant regions while preserving structural fidelity. A perceptual Lab-space Loss further enhances pixel-level precision by decoupling luminance and chrominance and constraining edits within masked areas. Additionally, we build ColourfulSet, a largescale dataset of high-quality image pairs with continuous and diverse colour variations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ColourCrafter achieves state-of-the-art colour accuracy, controllability and perceptual fidelity in fine-grained colour editing. Our project is available at https://yangyuqi317.github.io/ColourCrafter.github.io/.

AI.tldr: ColourCrafter是一个统一的扩散模型框架，通过在潜在空间中进行RGB颜色标记和图像标记的令牌级融合，实现结构感知的区域颜色编辑，并使用感知Lab空间损失提高像素级精度。
AI.motivation: 颜色是图像生成中感知最显著但最难控制的属性，现有扩散模型难以准确实现用户指令的颜色修改，特别是对于细粒度和局部编辑，早期方法依赖离散语言描述无法准确表示连续的色彩变化。
AI.method: 提出ColourCrafter框架：1) 在潜在空间中进行RGB颜色令牌和图像令牌的令牌级融合；2) 选择性地将颜色信息传播到语义相关区域同时保持结构完整性；3) 使用感知Lab空间损失解耦亮度和色度，在掩码区域内约束编辑；4) 构建ColourfulSet大规模数据集。
AI.result: 在细粒度颜色编辑方面实现了最先进的颜色准确性、可控性和感知保真度。
AI.conclusion: ColourCrafter成功将颜色编辑从全局色调传输转变为结构化、区域感知的生成过程，在颜色准确性和保真度方面达到最优表现。

The application domain is entirely different - image color editing vs. 3D motion/video generation. Although both use diffusion models, the application domains are completely different (2D image editing vs. video/3D motion synthesis).

title: Interplay: Training Independent Simulators for Reference-Free Conversational Recommendation
summary: Training conversational recommender systems (CRS) requires extensive dialogue data, which is challenging to collect at scale. To address this, researchers have used simulated user-recommender conversations. Traditional simulation approaches often utilize a single large language model (LLM) that generates entire conversations with prior knowledge of the target items, leading to scripted and artificial dialogues. We propose a reference-free simulation framework that trains two independent LLMs, one as the user and one as the conversational recommender. These models interact in real-time without access to predetermined target items, but preference summaries and target attributes, enabling the recommender to genuinely infer user preferences through dialogue. This approach produces more realistic and diverse conversations that closely mirror authentic human-AI interactions. Our reference-free simulators match or exceed existing methods in quality, while offering a scalable solution for generating high-quality conversational recommendation data without constraining conversations to pre-defined target items. We conduct both quantitative and human evaluations to confirm the effectiveness of our reference-free approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无参考模拟框架，用于解决对话式推荐系统训练数据收集困难的问题。该框架训练两个独立的LLM分别作为用户和推荐器，两者实时交互而非预先设定目标物品，从而生成更真实、多样化的对话数据。
AI.motivation: 训练对话式推荐系统需要大量对话数据，但大规模收集这些数据具有挑战性。传统模拟方法使用单一大型语言模型生成完整对话，且预先知道目标物品，导致对话脚本化、不自然。
AI.method: 提出无参考模拟框架，训练两个独立的LLM：一个作为用户，另一个作为对话推荐器。两者实时交互，不访问预定义的目标物品，但可获取偏好摘要和目标属性，使推荐器能够通过对话真正推断用户偏好。
AI.result: 无参考模拟器在质量上达到或超越现有方法，同时提供了可扩展的解决方案，可生成高质量对话推荐数据，且不将对话限制在预定义的目标物品上。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够产生更真实、多样化的对话，密切反映真实的人机交互。定量和人工评估均证实了无参考方法的有效性。

title: Do Vision Language Models Understand Human Engagement in Games?
summary: Inferring human engagement from gameplay video is important for game design and player-experience research, yet it remains unclear whether vision--language models (VLMs) can infer such latent psychological states from visual cues alone. Using the GameVibe Few-Shot dataset across nine first-person shooter games, we evaluate three VLMs under six prompting strategies, including zero-shot prediction, theory-guided prompts grounded in Flow, GameFlow, Self-Determination Theory, and MDA, and retrieval-augmented prompting. We consider both pointwise engagement prediction and pairwise prediction of engagement change between consecutive windows. Results show that zero-shot VLM predictions are generally weak and often fail to outperform simple per-game majority-class baselines. Memory- or retrieval-augmented prompting improves pointwise prediction in some settings, whereas pairwise prediction remains consistently difficult across strategies. Theory-guided prompting alone does not reliably help and can instead reinforce surface-level shortcuts. These findings suggest a perception--understanding gap in current VLMs: although they can recognize visible gameplay cues, they still struggle to robustly infer human engagement across games.

AI.tldr: 研究评估视觉-语言模型(VLMs)是否能从游戏画面中推断玩家参与度，发现当前VLMs在此任务上表现不佳，存在感知-理解差距。
AI.motivation: 从游戏玩法视频中推断人类参与度对游戏设计和玩家体验研究非常重要，但目前尚不清楚视觉-语言模型能否仅凭视觉线索推断这种潜在心理状态。
AI.method: 使用GameVibe Few-Shot数据集，跨越九款第一人称射击游戏，评估三种VLMs在六种提示策略下的表现，包括零样本预测、基于理论的提示(Flow、GameFlow、自我决定理论、MDA)和检索增强提示，同时考虑点态参与度预测和连续窗口间参与度变化的成对预测。
AI.result: 零样本VLM预测普遍较弱，通常无法超越简单的每游戏多数类基线；记忆或检索增强提示在某些情况下改善了点态预测；成对预测在各种策略下始终困难；基于理论的提示本身不可靠，反而可能强化表面层面的捷径。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLMs存在感知-理解差距：虽然能识别可见的游戏玩法线索，但仍难以跨游戏稳健地推断人类参与度。

title: MedForge: Interpretable Medical Deepfake Detection via Forgery-aware Reasoning
summary: Text-guided image editors can now manipulate authentic medical scans with high fidelity, enabling lesion implantation/removal that threatens clinical trust and safety. Existing defenses are inadequate for healthcare. Medical detectors are largely black-box, while MLLM-based explainers are typically post-hoc, lack medical expertise, and may hallucinate evidence on ambiguous cases. We present MedForge, a data-and-method solution for pre-hoc, evidence-grounded medical forgery detection. We introduce MedForge-90K, a large-scale benchmark of realistic lesion edits across 19 pathologies with expert-guided reasoning supervision via doctor inspection guidelines and gold edit locations. Building on it, MedForge-Reasoner performs localize-then-analyze reasoning, predicting suspicious regions before producing a verdict, and is further aligned with Forgery-aware GSPO to strengthen grounding and reduce hallucinations. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art detection accuracy and trustworthy, expert-aligned explanations.

AI.tldr: MedForge是一个针对医学图像伪造检测的数据和方法解决方案，旨在应对文本引导的图像编辑器对医学扫描图像进行高保真篡改（如病灶植入/去除）所带来的临床信任和安全威胁。该方案包含MedForge-90K大规模基准数据集和MedForge-Reasoner推理器。
AI.motivation: 文本引导的图像编辑器现在可以高保真地篡改真实医学扫描图像，进行病灶植入或去除，威胁临床信任和安全。现有防御措施对医疗领域不足：医学检测器多为黑盒，而基于MLLM的解释器通常是事后分析，缺乏医学专业知识，且可能在模糊案例上产生幻觉证据。
AI.method: 提出MedForge数据和方法解决方案，包括：（1）MedForge-90K大规模基准数据集，包含19种病理类型的真实病灶编辑，通过医生检查指南和黄金编辑位置进行专家引导推理监督；（2）MedForge-Reasoner执行"先定位后分析"的推理流程，先预测可疑区域再做出判断；（3）通过Forgery-aware GSPO进一步对齐以加强证据基础并减少幻觉。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法达到了最先进的检测准确率，并提供了可信的、与专家一致的分析解释。
AI.conclusion: MedForge为医学伪造检测提供了事前（pre-hoc）、证据充分（evidence-grounded）的解决方案，在检测准确性和解释可信度方面均优于现有方法，为医疗影像真实性验证提供了新的技术路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image deepfake detection, which is completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. While it mentions Vision-Language Models (VLM), the application is medical image forgery detection for clinical trust, not 3D motion generation, video synthesis, or bridging 2D-to-3D representations. The pain points are entirely different - this paper addresses medical image authenticity rather than any computer graphics concerns like video generation quality control or 3D motion synthesis from 2D priors.

title: T-QPM: Enabling Temporal Out-Of-Distribution Detection and Domain Generalization for Vision-Language Models in Open-World
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection remains a critical challenge in open-world learning, where models must adapt to evolving data distributions. While recent vision-language models (VLMS) like CLIP enable multimodal OOD detection through Dual-Pattern Matching (DPM), existing methods typically suffer from two major shortcomings: (1) They rely on fixed fusion rules and assume static environments, failing under temporal drift; and (2) they lack robustness against covariate shifted inputs. In this paper, we propose a novel two-step framework to enhance OOD detection and covariate distribution shift robustness in dynamic settings. We extend the dual-pattern regime into Temporal Quadruple-Pattern Matching (T-QPM). First, by pairing OOD images with text descriptions, we introduce cross-modal consistency patterns between ID and OOD signals, refining the decision boundary through joint image-text reasoning. Second, we address temporal distribution shifts by learning lightweight fusion weights to optimally combine semantic matching and visual typicality. To ensure stability, we enforce explicit regularization based on Average Thresholded Confidence (ATC), preventing performance degradation as distributions evolve. Experiments on temporally partitioned benchmarks demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms static baselines, offering a robust, temporally-consistent framework for multimodal OOD detection in non-stationary environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出T-QPM框架解决开放世界学习中时序分布漂移下的OOD检测问题，通过跨模态一致性模式和自适应融合权重提升检测性能和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs多模态OOD检测方法存在两个主要缺陷：(1)依赖固定融合规则，无法适应时序分布变化；(2)缺乏对协变量偏移输入的鲁棒性。在动态开放世界环境中，传统静态方法性能退化严重。
AI.method: 提出两步框架T-QPM：(1)通过将OOD图像与文本描述配对，引入ID和OOD信号间的跨模态一致性模式，利用图像-文本联合推理优化决策边界；(2)学习轻量级融合权重自适应组合语义匹配和视觉典型性；(3)引入基于ATC的显式正则化防止分布演进时性能下降。
AI.result: 在时序分区基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于静态基线方法，在非平稳环境中提供鲁棒且时序一致的OOD检测框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过T-QPM框架有效解决了时序分布漂移和协变量偏移下的OOD检测难题，验证了跨模态推理和自适应融合在动态开放世界学习中的重要价值。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses out-of-distribution detection for Vision-Language Models in open-world settings - this is a machine learning/computer vision safety task, NOT computer graphics or 3D motion generation. While both mention VLM, the application domain is completely different: this paper uses VLM for OOD detection/classification, not for extracting 3D motion from video or driving motion synthesis. The pain points in the profile (3D motion extraction, video generation quality control, bridging 2D-to-3D) are not addressed at all. This is a foundational ML paper about distribution shift detection, irrelevant to the computer graphics motion generation domain.

title: ZEBRAARENA: A Diagnostic Simulation Environment for Studying Reasoning-Action Coupling in Tool-Augmented LLMs
summary: Tool-augmented large language models (LLMs) must tightly couple multi-step reasoning with external actions, yet existing benchmarks often confound this interplay with complex environment dynamics, memorized knowledge or dataset contamination. In this paper, we introduce ZebraArena, a procedurally generated diagnostic environment for studying reasoning-action coupling in tool-augmented LLMs, with controllable difficulty and a knowledge-minimal design, which limits gains from memorization or dataset contamination. Each task in ZebraArena requires a set of critical information which is available only through targeted tool use, yielding an interpretable interface between external information acquisition and deductive reasoning. This design provides deterministic evaluation via unique solutions, and a theoretical optimal query count for measuring efficient tool use. We show that ZebraArena requires a combination of in-depth reasoning and accurate external tool calling, which remains a challenge as frontier reasoning models such as GPT-5 and Gemini 2.5 Pro only achieves 60% accuracy on the hard instances. We also observe a persistent gaps between theoretical optimality and practical tool usage. For example, GPT-5 uses 70-270% more tool calls than the theoretical optimum. We highlight the key findings in our evaluation, and hope ZebraArena stimulates further research on the interplay between internal reasoning and external action.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ZebraArena，一个用于研究工具增强型LLM中推理-动作耦合的诊断环境，具有可控难度和知识最小化设计，可限制记忆或数据集污染的收益。ZebraArena中的每个任务都需要通过有针对性的工具使用来获取关键信息，形成外部信息获取与演绎推理之间的可解释接口。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试往往将多步推理与外部动作的相互作用与复杂的环境动态、记忆知识或数据集污染混淆起来，需要一个可控的诊断环境来研究推理-动作耦合。
AI.method: 引入ZebraArena，一个程序生成的诊断环境，具有以下特点：1）可控难度；2）知识最小化设计，限制记忆或污染收益；3）每个任务需要通过有针对性的工具使用获取关键信息；4）通过唯一解进行确定性评估；5）理论最优查询次数用于衡量工具使用效率。
AI.result: ZebraArena需要深度推理和准确外部工具调用的结合，这对前沿推理模型仍构成挑战。GPT-5和Gemini 2.5 Pro在困难实例上仅达到60%准确率。GPT-5使用的工具调用次数比理论最优多70-270%。
AI.conclusion: 关键发现是理论最优与实际工具使用之间存在持续差距。ZebraArena有望促进内部推理与外部动作相互作用领域的进一步研究。

relevance_reason: This paper is about creating a diagnostic environment for evaluating reasoning-action coupling in tool-augmented LLMs. It is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically video generation, 3D motion synthesis, and visual feature extraction. The application domains are entirely different - this paper is about LLM benchmarking, not computer graphics or motion generation. The methods (LLM reasoning, tool-use evaluation) have no relevance to video generation models (Seedance), vision-language models for graphics, or 3D motion generation.

title: TexEditor: Structure-Preserving Text-Driven Texture Editing
summary: Text-guided texture editing aims to modify object appearance while preserving the underlying geometric structure. However, our empirical analysis reveals that even SOTA editing models frequently struggle to maintain structural consistency during texture editing, despite the intended changes being purely appearance-related. Motivated by this observation, we jointly enhance structure preservation from both data and training perspectives, and build TexEditor, a dedicated texture editing model based on Qwen-Image-Edit-2509. Firstly, we construct TexBlender, a high-quality SFT dataset generated with Blender, which provides strong structural priors for a cold start. Sec- ondly, we introduce StructureNFT, a RL-based approach that integrates structure-preserving losses to transfer the structural priors learned during SFT to real-world scenes. Moreover, due to the limited realism and evaluation coverage of existing benchmarks, we introduce TexBench, a general-purpose real-world benchmark for text-guided texture editing. Extensive experiments on existing Blender-based texture benchmarks and our TexBench show that TexEditor consistently outperforms strong baselines such as Nano Banana Pro. In addition, we assess TexEditor on the general purpose benchmark ImgEdit to validate its generalization. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/KlingAIResearch/TexEditor.

AI.tldr: TexEditor是一个基于Qwen-Image-Edit-2509的专用纹理编辑模型，通过TexBlender数据集和StructureNFT方法增强结构保持，在TexBench基准测试中优于Nano Banana Pro等先进模型。
AI.motivation: 当前文本引导的纹理编辑模型即使在仅改变外观的情况下也难以保持底层几何结构的完整性，现有的SOTA编辑模型在纹理编辑过程中经常出现结构不一致问题。
AI.method: 1) 构建TexBlender高质量SFT数据集(使用Blender生成)，为冷启动提供强结构先验；2) 提出StructureNFT基于强化学习的方法，将SFT阶段学习的结构先验迁移到真实场景；3) 提出TexBench通用真实世界基准测试用于评估。
AI.result: TexEditor在Blender纹理基准测试和TexBench上均优于Nano Banana Pro等强基线模型，同时在ImgEdit通用基准测试上验证了泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合高质量合成数据和强化学习结构保持损失，TexEditor能够有效解决纹理编辑中的结构一致性问题，为文本引导纹理编辑提供了一个有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: While both papers are in Computer Graphics, the application domains are fundamentally different. The research profile focuses on 3D MOTION generation from video (temporal aspects), video quality control, and bridging 2D-to-3D motion space. The paper is about TEXTURE EDITING (static spatial aspects) - specifically maintaining geometric structure when changing textures on 3D objects. This is analogous to the difference between "diffusion for image generation" vs "diffusion for human motion generation" - same general field but completely different application domains. The methods (Qwen-Image-Edit for texture editing vs Video/Motion generation models) and pain points (structure preservation in texture editing vs motion extraction from video) do not align.

title: Agentic Flow Steering and Parallel Rollout Search for Spatially Grounded Text-to-Image Generation
summary: Precise Text-to-Image (T2I) generation has achieved great success but is hindered by the limited relational reasoning of static text encoders and the error accumulation in open-loop sampling. Without real-time feedback, initial semantic ambiguities during the Ordinary Differential Equation trajectory inevitably escalate into stochastic deviations from spatial constraints. To bridge this gap, we introduce AFS-Search (Agentic Flow Steering and Parallel Rollout Search), a training-free closed-loop framework built upon FLUX.1-dev. AFS-Search incorporates a training-free closed-loop parallel rollout search and flow steering mechanism, which leverages a Vision-Language Model (VLM) as a semantic critic to diagnose intermediate latents and dynamically steer the velocity field via precise spatial grounding. Complementarily, we formulate T2I generation as a sequential decision-making process, exploring multiple trajectories through lookahead simulations and selecting the optimal path based on VLM-guided rewards. Further, we provide AFS-Search-Pro for higher performance and AFS-Search-Fast for quicker generation. Experimental results show that our AFS-Search-Pro greatly boosts the performance of the original FLUX.1-dev, achieving state-of-the-art results across three different benchmarks. Meanwhile, AFS-Search-Fast also significantly enhances performance while maintaining fast generation speed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AFS-Search，一个基于FLUX.1-dev的无训练闭环文本到图像生成框架，通过视觉语言模型(VLM)作为语义评判器诊断中间潜在表示，并结合流导向机制和并行 rollout 搜索来动态引导生成过程，解决静态文本编码器的有限关系推理和开放环路采样中的误差累积问题。
AI.motivation: 当前文本到图像(T2I)生成面临两大核心挑战：1) 静态文本编码器的关系推理能力有限；2) 开放环路采样中的误差累积问题。在常微分方程轨迹演化过程中，初始的语义歧义会不可避免地演化为偏离空间约束的随机偏差。
AI.method: 提出AFS-Search框架，包含以下核心组件：1) 训练-free闭环并行rollout搜索机制，利用VLM作为语义评判器诊断中间latent并通过精确空间定位动态引导速度场；2) 将T2I生成建模为序贯决策过程，通过前瞻模拟探索多条轨迹并基于VLM引导的奖励选择最优路径。同时提供AFS-Search-Pro（高性能版）和AFS-Search-Fast（快速生成版）两个变体。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，AFS-Search-Pro大幅提升原始FLUX.1-dev的性能，在三个不同基准测试上达到最先进水平；AFS-Search-Fast则在保持快速生成速度的同时显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入闭环反馈机制和VLM引导的动态引导策略，有效解决了T2I生成中的语义歧义和误差累积问题，为训练free的图像生成优化提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Text-to-Image (T2I) generation using FLUX.1-dev, which is a completely different application domain from the research profile focused on 3D motion generation from video. While both use VLM and quality assessment concepts, the paper addresses static 2D image generation with spatial relationships, not 3D motion synthesis or video generation. The pain points are orthogonal: the paper tackles semantic ambiguity and error accumulation in image generation, while the research profile focuses on extracting 3D motion from 2D video priors and bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space.

title: FILT3R: Latent State Adaptive Kalman Filter for Streaming 3D Reconstruction
summary: Streaming 3D reconstruction maintains a persistent latent state that is updated online from incoming frames, enabling constant-memory inference. A key failure mode is the state update rule: aggressive overwrites forget useful history, while conservative updates fail to track new evidence, and both behaviors become unstable beyond the training horizon. To address this challenge, we propose FILT3R, a training-free latent filtering layer that casts recurrent state updates as stochastic state estimation in token space. FILT3R maintains a per-token variance and computes a Kalman-style gain that adaptively balances memory retention against new observations. Process noise -- governing how much the latent state is expected to change between frames -- is estimated online from EMA-normalized temporal drift of candidate tokens. Using extensive experiments, we demonstrate that FILT3R yields an interpretable, plug-in update rule that generalizes common overwrite and gating policies as special cases. Specifically, we show that gains shrink in stable regimes as uncertainty contracts with accumulated evidence, and rise when genuine scene change increases process uncertainty, improving long-horizon stability for depth, pose, and 3D reconstruction, compared to the existing methods. Code will be released at https://github.com/jinotter3/FILT3R.

AI.tldr: FILT3R通过将3D重建的潜在状态更新建模为token空间的卡尔曼滤波，在线估计过程噪声以自适应调整记忆保留与新观测的平衡，无需训练即可提升长时域3D重建稳定性。
AI.motivation: 流式3D重建的关键挑战在于状态更新规则：激进的历史覆盖会遗忘有用的信息，而保守的更新无法跟踪新证据，两种行为在超出训练视域时都会变得不稳定。
AI.method: FILT3R是一种无需训练的潜在过滤层，将递归状态更新建模为token空间中的随机状态估计。该方法维护每个token的方差，计算类似卡尔曼滤波的增益，以自适应平衡记忆保留与新观测。具体而言，通过EMA归一化的候选token时间漂移在线估计过程噪声（governing how much the latent state is expected to change between frames）。
AI.result: 实验表明FILT3R产生了一种可解释的、插件式的更新规则，能够将常见的覆盖和门控策略作为特例包含。增益在稳定区域随累积证据收缩，在 genuined 场景变化增加过程不确定性时上升，相比现有方法显著提升了深度、姿态和3D重建的长时域稳定性。
AI.conclusion: FILT3R作为一种无需训练的潜在过滤层，通过将递归状态更新转化为token空间中的随机状态估计，有效解决了流式3D重建中的状态更新难题。该方法通过在线估计过程噪声，使增益在稳定区域收缩以累积证据，在场景变化时上升以适应新信息，显著提升了深度、姿态和3D重建的长时域稳定性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D RECONSTRUCTION (estimating 3D geometry from video), not 3D MOTION GENERATION (synthesizing new 3D motion from video priors). These are fundamentally different application domains in computer graphics. The research profile focuses on video-to-motion synthesis, quality control of video generation outputs, and using visual features to drive 3D motion synthesis - while FILT3R addresses long-term stability in streaming 3D reconstruction via Kalman filtering. Although both deal with video-to-3D, reconstruction (recovery) is different from generation (synthesis). The methods also don't match - profile uses video generation models and VLMs, while this paper uses Kalman filters for state estimation.

title: D-Mem: A Dual-Process Memory System for LLM Agents
summary: Driven by the development of persistent, self-adapting autonomous agents, equipping these systems with high-fidelity memory access for long-horizon reasoning has emerged as a critical requirement. However, prevalent retrieval-based memory frameworks often follow an incremental processing paradigm that continuously extracts and updates conversational memories into vector databases, relying on semantic retrieval when queried. While this approach is fast, it inherently relies on lossy abstraction, frequently missing contextually critical information and struggling to resolve queries that rely on fine-grained contextual understanding. To address this, we introduce D-Mem, a dual-process memory system. It retains lightweight vector retrieval for routine queries while establishing an exhaustive Full Deliberation module as a high-fidelity fallback. To achieve cognitive economy without sacrificing accuracy, D-Mem employs a Multi-dimensional Quality Gating policy to dynamically bridge these two processes. Experiments on the LoCoMo and RealTalk benchmarks using GPT-4o-mini and Qwen3-235B-Instruct demonstrate the efficacy of our approach. Notably, our Multi-dimensional Quality Gating policy achieves an F1 score of 53.5 on LoCoMo with GPT-4o-mini. This outperforms our static retrieval baseline, Mem0$^\ast$ (51.2), and recovers 96.7\% of the Full Deliberation's performance (55.3), while incurring significantly lower computational costs.

AI.tldr: D-Mem是一种双进程记忆系统，通过轻量级向量检索处理常规查询，同时保留高保真的"全面 deliberation"模块作为备选方案，并使用多维质量门控策略动态协调两个进程，在保持较低计算成本的同时提升长程推理任务中的记忆检索质量。
AI.motivation: 当前基于检索的记忆框架采用增量处理范式，将对话记忆提取到向量数据库中依赖语义检索。这种方法虽快但存在有损抽象的问题，常遗漏上下文关键信息，难以解决依赖细粒度上下文理解的查询。
AI.method: 提出D-Mem双进程记忆系统，包含：(1)轻量级向量检索用于常规查询；(2)高保真的Full Deliberation模块作为后备；(3)多维质量门控策略(Multi-dimensional Quality Gating)动态桥接两个进程，评估查询复杂度并决定调用哪个模块。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo和RealTalk基准上使用GPT-4o-mini和Qwen3-235B-Instruct测试。多维质量门控策略在LoCoMo上达53.5 F1分数，超越静态检索基线Mem0*(51.2)，恢复96.7%的Full Deliberation性能(55.3)，同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 通过双进程架构结合质量门控策略，D-Mem能在认知经济性与准确性之间取得平衡，为持久性自适应自治Agent提供高保真记忆访问，验证了动态路由策略在记忆系统中的有效性。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about LLM agent memory systems (retrieval-augmented generation) while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion generation from 2D video, video generation models, and visual feature extraction for motion synthesis. The methods (vector retrieval, LLM reasoning) have no overlap with the required methods (video generation, VLM for visual tasks, 3D motion models). This paper addresses memory retrieval quality for conversational AI, not any computer graphics or motion synthesis problems.

title: Efficient Video Diffusion with Sparse Information Transmission for Video Compression
summary: Video compression aims to maximize reconstruction quality with minimal bitrates. Beyond standard distortion metrics, perceptual quality and temporal consistency are also critical. However, at ultra-low bitrates, traditional end-to-end compression models tend to produce blurry images of poor perceptual quality. Besides, existing generative compression methods often treat video frames independently and show limitations in time coherence and efficiency. To address these challenges, we propose the Efficient Video Diffusion with Sparse Information Transmission (Diff-SIT), which comprises the Sparse Temporal Encoding Module (STEM) and the One-Step Video Diffusion with Frame Type Embedder (ODFTE). The STEM sparsely encodes the original frame sequence into an information-rich intermediate sequence, achieving significant bitrate savings. Subsequently, the ODFTE processes this intermediate sequence as a whole, which exploits the temporal correlation. During this process, our proposed Frame Type Embedder (FTE) guides the diffusion model to perform adaptive reconstruction according to different frame types to optimize the overall quality. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that Diff-SIT establishes a new state-of-the-art in perceptual quality and temporal consistency, particularly in the challenging ultra-low-bitrate regime. Code is released at https://github.com/MingdeZhou/Diff-SIT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Diff-SIT一种基于高效视频扩散模型的新型视频压缩方法,在极低比特率下实现感知质量和时间一致性 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 传统端到端压缩模型在极低比特率下产生模糊图像,感知质量差;现有生成式压缩方法独立处理视频帧,存在时间一致性和效率问题。
AI.method: 提出Diff-SIT包含两部分:(1)稀疏时序编码模块(STEM)将原始帧序列稀疏编码为信息丰富的中间序列,大幅节省比特率;(2)单步视频扩散与帧类型嵌入器(ODFTE)将中间序列作为整体处理,利用时间相关性。帧类型嵌入器(FTE)引导扩散模型根据不同帧类型进行自适应重建,优化整体质量。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的广泛实验表明,Diff-SIT在感知质量和时间一致性方面建立新SOTA,特别是在挑战性的极低比特率场景下。
AI.conclusion: Diff-SIT通过稀疏信息传输和帧类型引导的扩散模型,有效解决了极低比特率视频压缩的质量问题,实现了感知质量和时间一致性的显著提升。

relevance_reason: This paper is about video compression using diffusion models, which is a different application domain from the research profile's focus on 3D motion synthesis from 2D video. While both involve video diffusion models, the goal is completely different: video compression vs. extracting 3D motion information and driving 3D motion synthesis. The paper addresses perceptual quality in compression, not the pain points of bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space or quality control for motion generation outputs.

title: Balanced Thinking: Improving Chain of Thought Training in Vision Language Models
summary: Multimodal reasoning in vision-language models (VLMs) typically relies on a two-stage process: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL). In standard SFT, all tokens contribute equally to the loss, even though reasoning data are inherently token-imbalanced. Long <think> traces overshadow short but task-critical <answer> segments, leading to verbose reasoning and inaccurate answers. We propose SCALe (Scheduled Curriculum Adaptive Loss), which explicitly separates supervision over reasoning and answer segments using dynamic, length-independent weighting. Unlike vanilla SFT, which overweights the <think> segment, SCALe-SFT gradually shifts the focus from <think> to <answer> throughout training via a cosine scheduling policy, encouraging concise and well-grounded reasoning. We evaluate SCALe across diverse benchmarks and architectures. Results show that SCALe consistently improves accuracy over vanilla SFT and matches the performance of the full two-phase SFT + GRPO pipeline while requiring only about one-seventh of the training time, making it a lightweight yet effective alternative. When combined with GRPO, SCALe achieves the best overall performance, highlighting its value both as a standalone method and as a strong foundation for reinforcement refinement.

AI.tldr: SCALe是一种用于改进视觉语言模型多模态推理的训练方法，通过动态长度独立加权机制分离推理和答案部分的监督，解决标准SFT中长推理轨迹掩盖短答案片段的问题。
AI.motivation: 标准监督微调(SFT)中所有token对损失贡献相等，但推理数据本身存在token不平衡问题，长的思维链(<think>)会掩盖短但关键的答案(<answer>)片段，导致推理冗长且答案不准确。
AI.method: 提出SCALe(Scheduled Curriculum Adaptive Loss)方法：1)显式分离推理和答案部分的监督；2)使用动态长度独立加权；3)通过余弦调度策略在训练过程中逐渐将重点从推理转移到答案部分。
AI.result: SCALe在多种基准测试和架构上一致优于标准SFT；与完整两阶段SFT+GRPO管道性能相当，但训练时间仅需约1/7；与GRPO结合时达到最佳整体性能。
AI.conclusion: SCALe是一种轻量级但有效的多模态推理改进方法，可作为独立方法使用，也可作为强化微调的强基础，兼顾训练效率和性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about improving chain-of-thought training in Vision Language Models for multimodal reasoning tasks. While the research profile mentions VLMs as a method, this paper is NOT about Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation, or visual feature extraction for 3D synthesis. The application domain is completely different - it's about AI/ML training methodology for reasoning, not about computer graphics or video-to-3D motion synthesis. The pain points in the profile (extracting 3D motion from 2D video, quality control, visual guidance for motion synthesis) are not addressed at all.

title: HOMEY: Heuristic Object Masking with Enhanced YOLO for Property Insurance Risk Detection
summary: Automated property risk detection is a high-impact yet underexplored frontier in computer vision with direct implications for real estate, underwriting, and insurance operations. We introduce HOMEY (Heuristic Object Masking with Enhanced YOLO), a novel detection framework that combines YOLO with a domain-specific masking mechanism and a custom-designed loss function. HOMEY is trained to detect 17 risk-related property classes, including structural damages (e.g., cracked foundations, roof issues), maintenance neglect (e.g., dead yards, overgrown bushes), and liability hazards (e.g., falling gutters, garbage, hazard signs). Our approach introduces heuristic object masking to amplify weak signals in cluttered backgrounds and risk-aware loss calibration to balance class skew and severity weighting. Experiments on real-world property imagery demonstrate that HOMEY achieves superior detection accuracy and reliability compared to baseline YOLO models, while retaining fast inference. Beyond detection, HOMEY enables interpretable and cost-efficient risk analysis, laying the foundation for scalable AI-driven property insurance workflows.
