title: Thinking with Constructions: A Benchmark and Policy Optimization for Visual-Text Interleaved Geometric Reasoning
summary: Geometric reasoning inherently requires "thinking with constructions" -- the dynamic manipulation of visual aids to bridge the gap between problem conditions and solutions. However, existing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are largely confined to passive inference with static diagrams, lacking the strategic knowledge of when and how to construct effective visual aids. To address this, we present a framework for Visual-Text Interleaved Chain-of-Thought. We first introduce GeoAux-Bench, the first benchmark comprising 4,334 geometry problems that aligns textual construction steps with ground-truth visual updates. Our pilot study reveals two critical insights: (1) interleaved visual-textual aids outperform single-modality counterparts, which cannot losslessly capture geometric synergy; and (2) valid constructions act as entropy reducers, strongly correlating with reduced reasoning perplexity. Building on these findings, we propose Action Applicability Policy Optimization (A2PO), a reinforcement learning paradigm for mastering strategic construction. A2PO employs Adaptive Reward Shaping to regulate the timing and quality of visual aids via counterfactual sampling to distinguish necessary from redundant constructions. Experiments demonstrate our approach enables MLLMs to leverage selective auxiliary constructions, yielding a 3.51% gain over strong baselines. Code and data are available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文提出视觉-文本交错思维链框架，用于提升多模态大语言模型的几何推理能力。引入GeoAux-Bench基准数据集（含4334道几何问题）和A2PO强化学习方法，使模型能够选择性利用辅助构造，实现3.51%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 几何推理本质需要"通过构造思考"——动态操作视觉辅助来弥合问题条件与解决方案之间的差距。然而现有多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）局限于静态图表的被动推理，缺乏何时及如何构造有效视觉辅助的战略知识。
AI.method: 提出视觉-文本交错思维链框架。首先构建GeoAux-Bench基准，包含4334道将文本构造步骤与真实视觉更新对齐的几何问题。基于此提出行动适用性策略优化（A2PO），采用自适应奖励塑造通过反事实采样区分必要与冗余构造，来规范视觉辅助的时机和质量。
AI.result: 实验表明：（1）交错视觉-文本辅助优于单一模态，无法无损捕捉几何协同效应；（2）有效构造作为熵减器，与推理困惑度降低强相关。最终方法使MLLMs能选择性利用辅助构造，在基线模型上提升3.51%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法使多模态大语言模型能够利用选择性辅助构造进行几何推理，为视觉-文本交错推理提供了有效范式。代码和数据已开源。

relevance_reason: This paper is about geometric reasoning in multimodal LLMs (AI/NLP research), not Computer Graphics. While VLM is mentioned in the methods, the application domain is completely different - it focuses on 2D geometric problem solving with visual auxiliaries, NOT 3D motion generation, video generation models, or visual guidance for motion synthesis. The pain points in the profile are about extracting 3D motion from 2D video, quality control for video generation, and bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space - none of which are addressed by this geometric reasoning paper. This is AI research for math problem solving, not computer graphics for motion/video generation.

title: From Snapshots to Symphonies: The Evolution of Protein Prediction from Static Structures to Generative Dynamics and Multimodal Interactions
summary: The protein folding problem has been fundamentally transformed by artificial intelligence, evolving from static structure prediction toward the modeling of dynamic conformational ensembles and complex biomolecular interactions. This review systematically examines the paradigm shift in AI driven protein science across five interconnected dimensions: unified multimodal representations that integrate sequences, geometries, and textual knowledge; refinement of static prediction through MSA free architectures and all atom complex modeling; generative frameworks, including diffusion models and flow matching, that capture conformational distributions consistent with thermodynamic ensembles; prediction of heterogeneous interactions spanning protein ligand, protein nucleic acid, and protein protein complexes; and functional inference of fitness landscapes, mutational effects, and text guided property prediction. We critically analyze current bottlenecks, including data distribution biases, limited mechanistic interpretability, and the disconnect between geometric metrics and biophysical reality, while identifying future directions toward physically consistent generative models, multimodal foundation architectures, and experimental closed loop systems. This methodological transformation marks artificial intelligence's transition from a structural analysis tool into a universal simulator capable of understanding and ultimately rewriting the dynamic language of life.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能驱动蛋白质科学从静态结构预测向动态构象集合建模和复杂生物分子相互作用建模的范式转变，涵盖多模态表示、无MSA架构、生成式框架、异质相互作用预测和功能推断五个维度。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质折叠问题因人工智能发生根本性变革，传统静态结构预测已无法满足研究需求，需向动态构象集成和复杂相互作用建模方向发展。
AI.method: 系统综述方法，从五个相互关联的维度分析AI驱动蛋白质科学的范式转变：统一多模态表示、静态预测精化、生成式框架、异质相互作用预测和功能推断。
AI.result: 识别出当前发展瓶颈（数据分布偏差、机制可解释性有限、几何指标与生物物理现实脱节），并指明未来方向（物理一致的生成模型、多模态基础架构、实验闭环系统）。
AI.conclusion: 人工智能正从结构分析工具演变为能够理解和最终改写生命动态语言的通用模拟器，标志着AI在生物分子研究中的根本性转型。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about AI-driven protein structure prediction and dynamics in computational biology/biophysics, not Computer Graphics or 3D motion synthesis. While it mentions generative frameworks, the application domain is fundamentally different - it deals with protein folding and molecular dynamics, not video-to-3D motion generation or visual guidance for graphics. The target subjects (proteins vs human/robot motion) and research problems are entirely unrelated.

title: MANAR: Memory-augmented Attention with Navigational Abstract Conceptual Representation
summary: MANAR (Memory-augmented Attention with Navigational Abstract Conceptual Representation), contextualization layer generalizes standard multi-head attention (MHA) by instantiating the principles of Global Workspace Theory (GWT). While MHA enables unconstrained all-to-all communication, it lacks the functional bottleneck and global integration mechanisms hypothesized in cognitive models of consciousness. MANAR addresses this by implementing a central workspace through a trainable memory of abstract concepts and an Abstract Conceptual Representation (ACR). The architecture follows a two-stage logic that maps directly to GWT mechanics: (i) an integration phase, where retrieved memory concepts converge to form a collective "mental image" (the ACR) based on input stimuli; and (ii) a broadcasting phase, where this global state navigates and informs the contextualization of individual local tokens. We demonstrate that efficient linear-time scaling is a fundamental architectural byproduct of instantiating GWT functional bottleneck, as routing global information through a constant-sized ACR resolves the quadratic complexity inherent in standard attention. MANAR is a compatible re-parameterization of MHA with identical semantic roles for its projections, enabling knowledge transfer from pretrained transformers via weight-copy and thus overcoming the adoption barriers of structurally incompatible linear-time alternatives. MANAR enables non-convex contextualization, synthesizing representations that provably lie outside the convex hull of input tokens - a mathematical reflection of the creative synthesis described in GWT. Empirical evaluations confirm that MANAR matches or exceeds strong baselines across language (GLUE score of 85.1), vision (83.9% ImageNet-1K), and speech (2.7% WER on LibriSpeech), positioning it as an efficient and expressive alternative to quadratic attention.

AI.tldr: MANAR是一种基于全局工作空间理论(GWT)的记忆增强注意力机制，通过可训练的抽象概念记忆和抽象概念表示(ACR)实现线性时间缩放的注意力机制，同时保持与预训练变换器的兼容性。
AI.motivation: 标准多头注意力(MHA)缺乏认知模型中假设的功能瓶颈和全局整合机制，且存在二次复杂度问题。MANAR旨在通过实现中央工作空间来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 采用两阶段逻辑：(1)整合阶段-检索的记忆概念根据输入刺激汇聚形成集体"心理图像"(ACR)；(2)广播阶段-全局状态导航并通知各个局部标记的上下文处理。
AI.result: 实现线性时间缩放；语言任务GLUE分数85.1；视觉任务ImageNet-1K准确率83.9%；语音任务LibriSpeech WER 2.7%。
AI.conclusion: MANAR是二次注意力的高效表达替代方案，能够实现非凸上下文处理，综合生成位于输入标记凸包之外的表示。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about improving transformer attention mechanisms (memory-augmented attention for reducing computational complexity) for general AI tasks (NLP, image classification, speech recognition). It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation, or bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space. The research profile is about applied computer graphics (video-to-3D motion synthesis), while this paper is about fundamental neural network architecture research. Different application domain entirely.

title: Foundations and Architectures of Artificial Intelligence for Motor Insurance
summary: This handbook presents a systematic treatment of the foundations and architectures of artificial intelligence for motor insurance, grounded in large-scale real-world deployment. It formalizes a vertically integrated AI paradigm that unifies perception, multimodal reasoning, and production infrastructure into a cohesive intelligence stack for automotive risk assessment and claims processing. At its core, the handbook develops domain-adapted transformer architectures for structured visual understanding, relational vehicle representation learning, and multimodal document intelligence, enabling end-to-end automation of vehicle damage analysis, claims evaluation, and underwriting workflows. These components are composed into a scalable pipeline operating under practical constraints observed in nationwide motor insurance systems in Thailand. Beyond model design, the handbook emphasizes the co-evolution of learning algorithms and MLOps practices, establishing a principled framework for translating modern artificial intelligence into reliable, production-grade systems in high-stakes industrial environments.

AI.tldr: 本手册系统介绍了用于汽车保险的人工智能基础和架构，基于大规模实际部署经验。提出了垂直整合的AI范式，将感知、多模态推理和生产基础设施统一到汽车风险评估和理赔处理的智能栈中。
AI.motivation: 解决汽车保险行业中车辆损伤分析、理赔评估和承保工作流程的端到端自动化需求，将现代人工智能转化为高风险工业环境中的生产级可靠系统。
AI.method: 开发领域自适应的Transformer架构，用于结构化视觉理解、关系车辆表示学习和多模态文档智能，构建可扩展的管道并在泰国全国汽车保险系统中验证。
AI.result: 实现了车辆损伤分析、理赔评估和承保工作流程的端到端自动化，建立了将学习算法与MLOps实践相结合的原则框架。
AI.conclusion: 成功将现代人工智能转化为可在高风险工业环境中可靠运行的生产级系统，为汽车保险行业提供了系统性的人工智能解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI for motor insurance (vehicle damage analysis, claims assessment, underwriting automation), which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics field focused on 3D motion generation from video. The application domain is automotive insurance, not computer graphics or motion synthesis. Despite possibly using some computer vision techniques, the domain and goals are entirely different - this addresses industrial insurance workflows rather than 3D motion generation or video generation models.

title: OnlinePG: Online Open-Vocabulary Panoptic Mapping with 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Open-vocabulary scene understanding with online panoptic mapping is essential for embodied applications to perceive and interact with environments. However, existing methods are predominantly offline or lack instance-level understanding, limiting their applicability to real-world robotic tasks. In this paper, we propose OnlinePG, a novel and effective system that integrates geometric reconstruction and open-vocabulary perception using 3D Gaussian Splatting in an online setting. Technically, to achieve online panoptic mapping, we employ an efficient local-to-global paradigm with a sliding window. To build local consistency map, we construct a 3D segment clustering graph that jointly leverages geometric and semantic cues, fusing inconsistent segments within sliding window into complete instances. Subsequently, to update the global map, we construct explicit grids with spatial attributes for the local 3D Gaussian map and fuse them into the global map via robust bidirectional bipartite 3D Gaussian instance matching. Finally, we utilize the fused VLM features inside the 3D spatial attribute grids to achieve open-vocabulary scene understanding. Extensive experiments on widely used datasets demonstrate that our method achieves better performance among online approaches, while maintaining real-time efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了OnlinePG，一个基于3D Gaussian Splatting的在线开放词汇全景映射系统，用于具身智能的场景理解。该系统通过滑动窗口的局部-全局范式，结合3D片段聚类图和双向 bipartite 3D Gaussian实例匹配，实现实时开放词汇场景感知。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多为离线或缺乏实例级理解，难以应用于实际机器人任务，需要一种能够在线进行开放词汇场景理解的系统。
AI.method: 1) 使用滑动窗口的局部-全局范式实现在线全景映射；2) 构建3D片段聚类图，结合几何和语义线索融合滑动窗口中的不一致片段；3) 构建具有空间属性的显式网格，通过双向 bipartite 3D Gaussian实例匹配将局部高斯图融合到全局地图；4) 利用融合在3D空间属性网格中的VLM特征实现开放词汇场景理解。
AI.result: 在广泛使用的数据集上进行了大量实验，表明该方法在在线方法中实现了更好的性能，同时保持了实时效率。
AI.conclusion: OnlinePG能够有效实现基于3D Gaussian Splatting的在线开放词汇全景映射，在性能和效率上优于现有在线方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D scene mapping for robotics using 3D Gaussian Splatting and VLM features - a completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on video generation models for 3D motion synthesis and bridging 2D video to 3D motion, while this paper addresses open-vocabulary scene understanding for embodied AI/robotics. Although both use VLMs, the goal and application are entirely different: one is for scene reconstruction, the other is for video-to-motion generation. No overlap with video generation quality control or 3D motion synthesis from video priors.

title: Analysis Of Linguistic Stereotypes in Single and Multi-Agent Generative AI Architectures
summary: Many works in the literature show that LLM outputs exhibit discriminatory behaviour, triggering stereotype-based inferences based on the dialect in which the inputs are written. This bias has been shown to be particularly pronounced when the same inputs are provided to LLMs in Standard American English (SAE) and African-American English (AAE). In this paper, we replicate existing analyses of dialect-sensitive stereotype generation in LLM outputs and investigate the effects of mitigation strategies, including prompt engineering (role-based and Chain-Of-Thought prompting) and multi-agent architectures composed of generate-critique-revise models. We define eight prompt templates to analyse different ways in which dialect bias can manifest, such as suggested names, jobs, and adjectives for SAE or AAE speakers. We use an LLM-as-judge approach to evaluate the bias in the results. Our results show that stereotype-bearing differences emerge between SAE- and AAE-related outputs across all template categories, with the strongest effects observed in adjective and job attribution. Baseline disparities vary substantially by model, with the largest SAE-AAE differential observed in Claude Haiku and the smallest in Phi-4 Mini. Chain-Of-Thought prompting proved to be an effective mitigation strategy for Claude Haiku, whereas the use of a multi-agent architecture ensured consistent mitigation across all the models. These findings suggest that for intersectionality-informed software engineering, fairness evaluation should include model-specific validation of mitigation strategies, and workflow-level controls (e.g., agentic architectures involving critique models) in high-impact LLM deployments. The current results are exploratory in nature and limited in scope, but can lead to extensions and replications by increasing the dataset size and applying the procedure to different languages or dialects.

AI.tldr: 研究复制了现有关于LLM输出中方言敏感刻板印象生成的分析，并调查了缓解策略（包括提示工程和多智能体架构）的效果。研究发现SAE和AAE相关输出之间存在刻板印象差异，形容词和工作归因方面最为显著。Chain-Of-Thought提示对Claude Haiku有效，多智能体架构可在所有模型中实现一致的缓解。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明LLM输出表现出歧视性行为，基于输入方言产生刻板印象推断，这种偏见在SAE和AAE对比中尤为明显，但缓解策略效果尚不明确。
AI.method: 使用8个提示模板分析方言偏见不同表现方式，采用LLM-as-judge方法评估结果偏见，测试了角色扮演提示、Chain-Of-Thought提示和多智能体架构（生成-批评-修订模型）。
AI.result: 所有模板类别中都出现SAE和AAE相关输出间的刻板印象差异，形容词和工作归因效应最强。Claude Haiku的SAE-AAE差异最大，Phi-4 Mini最小。Chain-Of-Thought提示对Claude Haiku有效，多智能体架构确保所有模型一致的缓解效果。
AI.conclusion: 公平性评估应包括模型特定的缓解策略验证和高影响LLM部署中的工作流级控制（如包含批评模型的智能体架构）。研究结果具有探索性，可通过扩大数据集规模扩展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about NLP/LLM bias and linguistic stereotypes in language models, which is completely unrelated to the research profile. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion generation from video, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), visual feature extraction, and quality assessment for motion synthesis. The paper addresses none of these pain points - it's about dialect bias in LLM outputs, not about 3D motion generation, video generation, or visual features for computer graphics. The only shared element is "generative AI" but this is too superficial to establish relevance.

title: 3DreamBooth: High-Fidelity 3D Subject-Driven Video Generation Model
summary: Creating dynamic, view-consistent videos of customized subjects is highly sought after for a wide range of emerging applications, including immersive VR/AR, virtual production, and next-generation e-commerce. However, despite rapid progress in subject-driven video generation, existing methods predominantly treat subjects as 2D entities, focusing on transferring identity through single-view visual features or textual prompts. Because real-world subjects are inherently 3D, applying these 2D-centric approaches to 3D object customization reveals a fundamental limitation: they lack the comprehensive spatial priors necessary to reconstruct the 3D geometry. Consequently, when synthesizing novel views, they must rely on generating plausible but arbitrary details for unseen regions, rather than preserving the true 3D identity. Achieving genuine 3D-aware customization remains challenging due to the scarcity of multi-view video datasets. While one might attempt to fine-tune models on limited video sequences, this often leads to temporal overfitting. To resolve these issues, we introduce a novel framework for 3D-aware video customization, comprising 3DreamBooth and 3Dapter. 3DreamBooth decouples spatial geometry from temporal motion through a 1-frame optimization paradigm. By restricting updates to spatial representations, it effectively bakes a robust 3D prior into the model without the need for exhaustive video-based training. To enhance fine-grained textures and accelerate convergence, we incorporate 3Dapter, a visual conditioning module. Following single-view pre-training, 3Dapter undergoes multi-view joint optimization with the main generation branch via an asymmetrical conditioning strategy. This design allows the module to act as a dynamic selective router, querying view-specific geometric hints from a minimal reference set. Project page: https://ko-lani.github.io/3DreamBooth/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的3D感知视频定制框架(3DreamBooth和3Dapter),用于创建动态的、视图一致的定制主体视频。现有的主体驱动视频生成方法主要将主体视为2D实体,缺乏重建3D几何体所需的空间先验,导致在合成新视图时生成任意细节而非保留真实3D身份。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的主体本质上是3D的,但现有2D中心方法缺乏重建3D几何体所需的全面的空间先验。在合成新视图时必须为不可见区域生成看似合理但任意的细节,而非保留真实3D身份。实现真正的3D感知定制具有挑战性,因为缺乏多视图视频数据集,在有限视频序列上微调往往导致时间过拟合。
AI.method: 1. 3DreamBooth通过单帧优化范式将空间几何与时间运动解耦,通过仅更新空间表示将强大的3D先验嵌入模型,无需 exhaustive视频训练。2. 3Dapter作为视觉 conditioning模块,用于增强细粒度纹理和加速收敛。3. 3Dapter经过单视图预训练后,通过不对称conditioning策略与主生成分支进行多视图联合优化,使模块作为动态选择性路由器,从最小参考集中查询视图特定几何提示。
AI.result: 成功构建了一个用于3D感知视频定制的novel框架,能够创建动态的、视图一致的定制主体视频。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过引入3DreamBooth和3Dapter有效解决了3D感知定制难题,通过单帧优化范式和解耦空间几何与时间运动的方法,在不需要大量多视图视频数据的情况下实现了robust的3D先验嵌入。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses 3D-aware video generation but focuses on creating videos OF 3D subjects (view-consistent rendering), not on 3D MOTION generation from 2D visual guidance. This is a different application domain - the research profile specifically targets extracting 3D motion information and driving 3D motion synthesis, while this paper targets video synthesis of customized 3D objects/subjects. The methods (spatial-temporal decoupling for video generation) are also different from what's needed (visual features driving 3D motion synthesis, quality control of motion outputs). Only tangentially related in that both deal with 3D+video but solve fundamentally different problems in computer graphics.

title: NeuroGame Transformer: Gibbs-Inspired Attention Driven by Game Theory and Statistical Physics
comment: This work has been submitted to IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics for possible publication
summary: Standard attention mechanisms in transformers are limited by their pairwise formulation, which hinders the modeling of higher-order dependencies among tokens. We introduce the NeuroGame Transformer (NGT) to overcome this by reconceptualizing attention through a dual perspective: tokens are treated simultaneously as players in a cooperative game and as interacting spins in a statistical physics system. Token importance is quantified using two complementary game-theoretic concepts -- Shapley values for global, permutation-based attribution and Banzhaf indices for local, coalition-level influence. These are combined via a learnable gating parameter to form an external magnetic field, while pairwise interaction potentials capture synergistic relationships. The system's energy follows an Ising Hamiltonian, with attention weights emerging as marginal probabilities under the Gibbs distribution, efficiently computed via mean-field equations. To ensure scalability despite the exponential coalition space, we develop importance-weighted Monte Carlo estimators with Gibbs-distributed weights. This approach avoids explicit exponential factors, ensuring numerical stability for long sequences. We provide theoretical convergence guarantees and characterize the fairness-sensitivity trade-off governed by the interpolation parameter. Experimental results demonstrate that the NeuroGame Transformer achieves strong performance across SNLI, and MNLI-matched, outperforming some major efficient transformer baselines. On SNLI, it attains a test accuracy of 86.4\% (with a peak validation accuracy of 86.6\%), surpassing ALBERT-Base and remaining highly competitive with RoBERTa-Base. Code is available at https://github.com/dbouchaffra/NeuroGame-Transformer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeuroGame Transformer (NGT)，通过将注意力机制重新概念化为合作博弈和统计物理系统的双重视角，解决传统Transformer中成对公式化无法建模高阶 token 依赖的问题。
AI.motivation: 标准注意力机制的成对 formulation 限制了模型对 token 间高阶依赖关系的建模能力，需要一种新的方法来捕捉更复杂的交互关系。
AI.method: 1. 将 token 同时视为合作博弈中的玩家和统计物理中的自旋；2. 使用 Shapley 值（全局排列归因）和 Banzhaf 指数（局部联盟影响）通过可学习门控参数结合形成外部磁场；3. 成对交互势捕捉协同关系；4. 系统能量遵循 Ising Hamiltonian，注意力权重作为 Gibbs 分布下的边缘概率通过平均场方程计算；5. 开发重要性加权蒙特卡洛估计器确保长序列数值稳定性。
AI.result: 在 SNLI 和 MNLI-matched 数据集上取得强劲性能。SNLI 测试准确率 86.4%（验证集峰值 86.6%），超越 ALBERT-Base，与 RoBERTa-Base 高度竞争力。
AI.conclusion: NGT 通过结合博弈论和统计物理方法，为Transformer注意力机制提供了一种新颖的高阶依赖建模方案，具有理论收敛保证和公平性-敏感性权衡特性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper focuses on Natural Language Processing (text classification on SNLI/MNLI datasets) using a game-theoretic variant of Transformer attention. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion synthesis from video, video generation models, and visual feature extraction. While both use "Transformers," the application domains are entirely different (NLP text understanding vs. 3D computer graphics motion generation). The paper does not address any of the stated pain points related to video-to-3D motion extraction or video generation quality control.

title: Remedying Target-Domain Astigmatism for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Object Detection
summary: Cross-domain few-shot object detection (CD-FSOD) aims to adapt pretrained detectors from a source domain to target domains with limited annotations, suffering from severe domain shifts and data scarcity problems. In this work, we find a previously overlooked phenomenon: models exhibit dispersed and unfocused attention in target domains, leading to imprecise localization and redundant predictions, just like a human cannot focus on visual objects. Therefore, we call it the target-domain Astigmatism problem. Analysis on attention distances across transformer layers reveals that regular fine-tuning inherently shows a trend to remedy this problem, but results are still far from satisfactory, which we aim to enhance in this paper. Biologically inspired by the human fovea-style visual system, we enhance the fine-tuning's inherent trend through a center-periphery attention refinement framework, which contains (1) a Positive Pattern Refinement module to reshape attention toward semantic objects using class-specific prototypes, simulating the visual center region; (2) a Negative Context Modulation module to enhance boundary discrimination by modeling background context, simulating the visual periphery region; and (3) a Textual Semantic Alignment module to strengthen center-periphery distinction through cross-modal cues. Our bio-inspired approach transforms astigmatic attention into focused patterns, substantially improving adaptation to target domains. Experiments on six challenging CD-FSOD benchmarks consistently demonstrate improved detection accuracy and establish new state-of-the-art results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了跨域小样本目标检测(CD-FSOD)中的"散光(Astigmatism)"问题，即模型在目标域中注意力分散、定位不准确。解决方案是受人类中央凹视觉系统启发的中心-外围注意力精炼框架，包含正样本模式精炼、负上下文调制和文本语义对齐三个模块。
AI.motivation: 跨域小样本目标检测面临严重的领域偏移和数据稀缺问题。作者发现了一个被忽视的现象：模型在目标域中表现出注意力分散和聚焦不足的问题，导致定位不准确和冗余预测，类似于人类无法聚焦视觉目标，因此称之为"目标域散光问题"。
AI.method: 提出了中心-外围注意力精炼框架，包含三个模块：(1)正样本模式精炼模块(Positive Pattern Refinement)：使用类特定原型重塑注意力指向语义对象，模拟视觉中心区域；(2)负上下文调制模块(Negative Context Modulation)：通过建模背景上下文增强边界区分能力，模拟视觉外围区域；(3)文本语义对齐模块(Textual Semantic Alignment)：通过跨模态线索加强中心-外围区分。
AI.result: 在6个具有挑战性的CD-FSOD基准数据集上进行了实验，结果表明该方法持续提升了检测精度，建立了新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 受生物启发的中心-外围注意力精炼框架能够将"散光"注意力转化为聚焦模式，显著改善了目标域的自适应性能。该方法通过模拟人类视觉系统的中央凹工作方式，有效解决了跨域小样本目标检测中的注意力分散问题。

relevance_reason: This paper is about cross-domain few-shot OBJECT DETECTION in 2D images, which is completely unrelated to the research profile focused on Computer Graphics, 3D MOTION GENERATION from video, and video generation models. While both involve computer vision, the application domains are entirely different: object detection vs. 3D motion synthesis from video. The methods (attention for object detection) do not address any of the pain points about extracting 3D motion from 2D video or bridging 2D-3D gaps.

title: A Concept is More Than a Word: Diversified Unlearning in Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
summary: Concept unlearning has emerged as a promising direction for reducing the risks of harmful content generation in text-to-image diffusion models by selectively erasing undesirable concepts from a model's parameters. Existing approaches typically rely on keywords to identify the target concept to be unlearned. However, we show that this keyword-based formulation is inherently limited: a visual concept is multi-dimensional, can be expressed in diverse textual forms, and often overlap with related concepts in the latent space, making keyword-only unlearning, which imprecisely indicate the target concept is brittle and prone to over-forgetting. This occurs because a single keyword represents only a narrow point estimate of the concept, failing to cover its full semantic distribution and entangled variations in the latent space. To address this limitation, we propose Diversified Unlearning, a distributional framework that represents a concept through a set of contextually diverse prompts rather than a single keyword. This richer representation enables more precise and robust unlearning. Through extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and state-of-the-art baselines, we demonstrate that integrating Diversified Unlearning as an add-on component into existing unlearning pipelines consistently achieves stronger erasure, better retention of unrelated concepts, and improved robustness against adversarial recovery attacks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Diversified Unlearning方法，通过使用多样化的提示词集而非单一关键词来表示概念，从而在文本到图像扩散模型中实现更精确、更鲁棒的概念擦除。
AI.motivation: 现有基于关键词的概念擦除方法存在根本性局限：单一关键词只是概念的点估计，无法覆盖完整语义分布，且容易与相关概念在潜在空间中产生混淆，导致过度遗忘或擦除不完整的问题。
AI.method: 提出分布式的Diversified Unlearning框架，使用一组上下文多样化的提示词来表示目标概念，而非单一关键词。这种更丰富的表示能够更精确地捕捉概念的多维性和语义分布。
AI.result: 实验表明，将Diversified Unlearning作为插件集成到现有擦除流程中，在多个基准测试和SOTA基线方法上，均实现了更强的擦除效果、更好的无关概念保留，以及更强的对抗恢复攻击鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多样化提示词表示概念的分布式方法能够有效解决传统关键词擦除的局限性，为 diffusion model 的安全部署提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about concept unlearning in text-to-image diffusion models for image generation/editing purposes, which is entirely different from the research profile focused on 3D motion generation from 2D video priors. While both mention diffusion models, the application domains are completely unrelated - this paper deals with removing unwanted concepts from image generators, not extracting 3D motion from video or driving motion synthesis. The pain points and methods address completely different problems.

title: CoDA: Exploring Chain-of-Distribution Attacks and Post-Hoc Token-Space Repair for Medical Vision-Language Models
summary: Medical vision--language models (MVLMs) are increasingly used as perceptual backbones in radiology pipelines and as the visual front end of multimodal assistants, yet their reliability under real clinical workflows remains underexplored. Prior robustness evaluations often assume clean, curated inputs or study isolated corruptions, overlooking routine acquisition, reconstruction, display, and delivery operations that preserve clinical readability while shifting image statistics. To address this gap, we propose CoDA, a chain-of-distribution framework that constructs clinically plausible pipeline shifts by composing acquisition-like shading, reconstruction and display remapping, and delivery and export degradations. Under masked structural-similarity constraints, CoDA jointly optimizes stage compositions and parameters to induce failures while preserving visual plausibility. Across brain MRI, chest X-ray, and abdominal CT, CoDA substantially degrades the zero-shot performance of CLIP-style MVLMs, with chained compositions consistently more damaging than any single stage. We also evaluate multimodal large language models (MLLMs) as technical-authenticity auditors of imaging realism and quality rather than pathology. Proprietary multimodal models show degraded auditing reliability and persistent high-confidence errors on CoDA-shifted samples, while the medical-specific MLLMs we test exhibit clear deficiencies in medical image quality auditing. Finally, we introduce a post-hoc repair strategy based on teacher-guided token-space adaptation with patch-level alignment, which improves accuracy on archived CoDA outputs. Overall, our findings characterize a clinically grounded threat surface for MVLM deployment and show that lightweight alignment improves robustness in deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoDA框架，系统性地评估医学视觉-语言模型(MVLMs)在真实临床工作流中面对 pipeline shifts 时的鲁棒性。研究发现链式组合的pipeline退化比单一阶段更能显著降低模型性能，且多模态大语言模型在图像质量审计方面存在明显不足。
AI.motivation: 现有MVLM鲁棒性评估假设输入干净或仅研究单一 corruption，忽略了临床工作流中保持可读性但改变图像统计的常见操作（如采集、重建、显示、传输）。需要构建临床可信的pipeline偏移来评估真实威胁。
AI.method: 提出CoDA框架，通过组合采集类着色、重建与显示重映射、交付与导出退化构建临床 plausible 的pipeline偏移。在掩码结构相似性约束下联合优化阶段组合和参数，诱导失败同时保持视觉可信度。对brain MRI、chest X-ray、abddominal CT进行测试，评估MLLMs作为技术真实性审计员，并提出基于教师引导的token空间适应+patch级对齐的后修复策略。
AI.result: CoDA大幅降低CLIP风格MVLMs的零样本性能，链式组合比任何单一阶段破坏性更强。专有MLLMs审计可靠性下降且对CoDA偏移样本持续出现高置信度错误，医学专用MLLMs在质量审计方面存在明显缺陷。修复策略可改善归档CoDA输出的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了MVLM部署的临床相关威胁面，轻量级对齐可提高部署鲁棒性。强调了评估医学AI模型时需考虑真实临床工作流中的pipeline退化问题。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about Medical Vision-Language Models (analyzing MRI, X-ray, CT scans for clinical diagnostics), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation from 2D video. Although both involve Vision-Language Models and quality assessment, the medical imaging domain is entirely unrelated to 3D motion synthesis, video generation, and the computer graphics pain points described. The methods, while having superficial similarities (VLM, quality assessment), serve completely different application goals.

title: Proceedings of the 2nd Workshop on Advancing Artificial Intelligence through Theory of Mind
comment: workshop proceedings. contains arXiv:2601.03389, arXiv:2511.15895, arXiv:2512.23482, arXiv:2601.01599
summary: This volume includes a selection of papers presented at the 2nd Workshop on Advancing Artificial Intelligence through Theory of Mind held at AAAI 2026 in Singapore on 26th January 2026. The purpose of this volume is to provide an open access and curated anthology for the ToM and AI research community.

AI.tldr: 本文是AAAI 2026"通过心智理论推进人工智能"研讨会论文集的导言，介绍了论文集的来源和目的。
AI.motivation: 为ToM和AI研究社区提供开放获取的精选论文集，促进该领域学术交流。
AI.method: 收录第二届心智理论人工智能推进研讨会（AAAI 2026，新加坡，2026年1月26日）发表的论文。
AI.result: 形成ToM与AI领域的开放获取论文选集。
AI.conclusion: 为ToM与AI研究社区提供经过整理的论文资源，推动该领域发展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Theory of Mind (ToM) in AI - a completely different field from Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. It addresses mental state understanding in AI systems, not video generation, motion synthesis, or visual feature extraction. There's no connection to the research profile's methods (Video Generation Models, VLM, 3D Motion Generation) or pain points (2D-to-3D motion extraction, quality control, visual guidance). The application domain is entirely different - this is AI theory research, not computer graphics.

title: dTRPO: Trajectory Reduction in Policy Optimization of Diffusion Large Language Models
summary: Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) introduce a new paradigm for language generation, which in turn presents new challenges for aligning them with human preferences. In this work, we aim to improve the policy optimization for dLLMs by reducing the cost of the trajectory probability calculation, thereby enabling scaled-up offline policy training. We prove that: (i) under reference policy regularization, the probability ratio of the newly unmasked tokens is an unbiased estimate of that of intermediate diffusion states, and (ii) the probability of the full trajectory can be effectively estimated with a single forward pass of a re-masked final state. By integrating these two trajectory reduction strategies into a policy optimization objective, we propose Trajectory Reduction Policy Optimization (dTRPO). We evaluate dTRPO on 7B dLLMs across instruction-following and reasoning benchmarks. Results show that it substantially improves the core performance of state-of-the-art dLLMs, achieving gains of up to 9.6% on STEM tasks, up to 4.3% on coding tasks, and up to 3.0% on instruction-following tasks. Moreover, dTRPO exhibits strong training efficiency due to its offline, single-forward nature, and achieves improved generation efficiency through high-quality outputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Trajectory Reduction Policy Optimization (dTRPO)方法，通过两种轨迹约简策略降低扩散大语言模型的策略优化计算成本，使其能在离线环境下进行大规模训练。实验在7B参数dLLM上验证，在STEM任务提升9.6%、编码任务提升4.3%、指令跟随任务提升3.0%。
AI.motivation: 扩散大语言模型(dLLMs)作为一种新的语言生成范式，其与人类偏好对齐面临独特挑战。离线策略训练的计算成本过高，限制了模型性能的进一步提升。
AI.method: 提出两种轨迹约简策略：1)在参考策略正则化下，新解掩 token 的概率比是中间扩散状态的无偏估计；2)通过单次前向传播即可有效估计完整轨迹概率。将这两策略整合到策略优化目标中形成dTRPO方法。
AI.result: 在7B dLLM上，STEM任务提升9.6%，编码任务提升4.3%，指令跟随任务提升3.0%。
AI.conclusion: dTRPO能显著提升现有最先进dLLM的核心性能，且具有离线、单次前向的高效训练优势，生成质量也更高。

relevance_reason: This paper is about diffusion models for LANGUAGE generation (NLP domain), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. While both use diffusion models, the application domain is entirely different - this paper focuses on training efficient language models through trajectory reduction policy optimization, not video generation, visual feature extraction, or 3D motion synthesis. The pain points, methods, and field are all misaligned with the research profile.

title: CausalVAD: De-confounding End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Causal Intervention
summary: Planning-oriented end-to-end driving models show great promise, yet they fundamentally learn statistical correlations instead of true causal relationships. This vulnerability leads to causal confusion, where models exploit dataset biases as shortcuts, critically harming their reliability and safety in complex scenarios. To address this, we introduce CausalVAD, a de-confounding training framework that leverages causal intervention. At its core, we design the sparse causal intervention scheme (SCIS), a lightweight, plug-and-play module to instantiate the backdoor adjustment theory in neural networks. SCIS constructs a dictionary of prototypes representing latent driving contexts. It then uses this dictionary to intervene on the model's sparse vectorized queries. This step actively eliminates spurious associations induced by confounders, thereby eliminating spurious factors from the representations for downstream tasks. Extensive experiments on benchmarks like nuScenes show CausalVAD achieves state-of-the-art planning accuracy and safety. Furthermore, our method demonstrates superior robustness against both data bias and noisy scenarios configured to induce causal confusion.

AI.tldr: CausalVAD是一个利用因果干预的去混淆训练框架，通过稀疏因果干预方案(SCIS)构建原型字典并干预模型查询，以消除虚假关联，在nuScenes上达到最优性能并提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 端到端驾驶模型从根本上学习的是统计相关性而非真正的因果关系，这种脆弱性导致因果混淆，模型会利用数据集偏差作为捷径，严重损害了其在复杂场景中的可靠性和安全性。
AI.method: 提出了稀疏因果干预方案(SCIS)，该方案通过构建包含潜在驾驶情境的原型字典，并利用该字典对模型的稀疏向量化查询进行干预，从而主动消除由混淆因素引起的虚假关联，消除下游任务表示中的虚假因素。
AI.result: 在nuScenes等基准测试上的广泛实验表明，CausalVAD实现了最先进的规划精度和安全性，同时展现出对数据偏差和噪声场景诱导的因果混淆的卓越鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CausalVAD通过稀疏因果干预方案(SCIS)实现了解耦混淆因素的训练框架，在nuScenes数据集上达到了最先进的规划精度和安全性。该方法展现出对数据偏差和噪声场景诱导的因果混淆具有卓越的鲁棒性，为端到端自动驾驶系统的可靠性提升提供了新的解决思路。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about autonomous driving and causal inference for end-to-end driving systems (CausalVAD), not Computer Graphics or 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on extracting 3D motion from 2D video, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), and bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space. CausalVAD addresses causal confusion in autonomous driving planning, which has no relevance to computer graphics or motion synthesis. This is a robotics/autonomous driving paper, not a computer graphics paper.

title: Can LLM generate interesting mathematical research problems?
summary: This paper is the second one in a series of work on the mathematical creativity of LLM. In the first paper, the authors proposed three criteria for evaluating the mathematical creativity of LLM and constructed a benchmark dataset to measure it. This paper further explores the mathematical creativity of LLM, with a focus on investigating whether LLM can generate valuable and cutting-edge mathematical research problems. We develop an agent to generate unknown problems and produced 665 research problems in differential geometry. Through human verification, we find that many of these mathematical problems are unknown to experts and possess unique research value.

AI.tldr: 本文是LLM数学创造力系列工作的第二篇，专注于研究LLM是否能生成有价值的尖端数学研究问题，作者开发了一个智能体生成了665个微分几何研究问题。
AI.motivation: 探索大型语言模型是否能生成具有独特研究价值的未知数学问题，扩展了第一篇论文中提出的数学创造力评估标准。
AI.method: 开发了一个用于生成未知数学问题的智能体，生成了665个微分几何领域的研究问题，并通过人类专家进行验证。
AI.result: 通过人类验证发现，许多数学问题是专家此前未知的，并具有独特的研究价值。
AI.conclusion: LLM能够生成有价值的尖端数学研究问题，这表明LLM在数学创造力方面具有潜力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about using LLMs to generate mathematical research problems in differential geometry, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics research profile. The research profile focuses on video generation, 3D motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, and quality control for video/motion generation - all within Computer Graphics. This paper addresses none of the pain points mentioned (3D motion from 2D video, video generation quality control, visual guidance for 3D motion synthesis, bridging 2D-3D). It uses LLMs for mathematical problem generation, not for video/motion generation or visual understanding. The application domain is mathematics, not computer graphics or motion/video generation.

title: HAViT: Historical Attention Vision Transformer
summary: Vision Transformers have excelled in computer vision but their attention mechanisms operate independently across layers, limiting information flow and feature learning. We propose an effective cross-layer attention propagation method that preserves and integrates historical attention matrices across encoder layers, offering a principled refinement of inter-layer information flow in Vision Transformers. This approach enables progressive refinement of attention patterns throughout the transformer hierarchy, enhancing feature acquisition and optimization dynamics. The method requires minimal architectural changes, adding only attention matrix storage and blending operations. Comprehensive experiments on CIFAR-100 and TinyImageNet demonstrate consistent accuracy improvements, with ViT performance increasing from 75.74% to 77.07% on CIFAR-100 (+1.33%) and from 57.82% to 59.07% on TinyImageNet (+1.25%). Cross-architecture validation shows similar gains across transformer variants, with CaiT showing 1.01% enhancement. Systematic analysis identifies the blending hyperparameter of historical attention (alpha = 0.45) as optimal across all configurations, providing the ideal balance between current and historical attention information. Random initialization consistently outperforms zero initialization, indicating that diverse initial attention patterns accelerate convergence and improve final performance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/banik-s/HAViT.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种跨层注意力传播方法，通过保存和整合Transformer编码器层的历史注意力矩阵，实现注意力模式的渐进式细化，提升ViT在CIFAR-100和TinyImageNet上的分类准确率。
AI.motivation: Vision Transformer的注意力机制在各层独立运作，限制了层间信息流动和特征学习，需要一种原则性的方法来改进层间信息流。
AI.method: 提出跨层注意力传播方法，保存历史注意力矩阵并与当前层注意力进行混合，只需添加注意力矩阵存储和混合操作，引入混合超参数alpha=0.45控制历史与当前注意力的平衡。
AI.result: CIFAR-100准确率从75.74%提升至77.07%（+1.33%），TinyImageNet从57.82%提升至59.07%（+1.25%），CaiT提升1.01%。随机初始化优于零初始化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以最小架构改动实现层间信息流的原则性细化，验证了历史注意力模式对优化动态的积极作用，alpha=0.45为最优配置。

relevance_reason: Complete application domain mismatch. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation from video, video generation models, and bridging 2D-to-3D. The paper (HAViT) is about improving Vision Transformers for image classification on CIFAR-100 and TinyImageNet. This is a fundamental disconnect - image classification is not related to video generation, 3D motion synthesis, or the specific pain points mentioned. While both involve "Vision" components, the methods and applications are completely different domains.

title: ProRL Agent: Rollout-as-a-Service for RL Training of Multi-Turn LLM Agents
summary: Multi-turn LLM agents are increasingly important for solving complex, interactive tasks, and reinforcement learning (RL) is a key ingredient for improving their long-horizon behavior. However, RL training requires generating large numbers of sandboxed rollout trajectories, and existing infrastructures often couple rollout orchestration with the training loop, making systems hard to migrate and maintain. Under the rollout-as-a-service philosophy, we present ProRL Agent , a scalable infrastructure that serves the full agentic rollout lifecycle through an API service. ProRL Agent also provides standardized and extensible sandbox environments that support diverse agentic tasks in rootless HPC settings. We validate ProRL Agent through RL training on software engineering, math, STEM, and coding tasks. ProRL Agent is open-sourced and integrated as part of NVIDIA NeMo Gym.

AI.tldr: ProRL Agent是一个可扩展的基础设施，采用rollout-as-a-service理念，通过API服务提供完整的智能体rollout生命周期支持，并在无根HPC环境中支持多种智能体任务。
AI.motivation: 现有RL训练基础设施将rollout编排与训练循环紧密耦合，导致系统难以迁移和维护；同时，多轮LLM智能体在解决复杂交互任务时越来越重要，RL是改进其长视野行为的关键，但需要大量沙盒rollout轨迹。
AI.method: 提出ProRL Agent架构，提供标准化可扩展的沙盒环境，通过API服务方式解耦rollout编排与训练过程，支持在rootless HPC环境中运行多样化的智能体任务。
AI.result: 在软件工程、数学、STEM和编码任务上进行了RL训练验证，证明了ProRL Agent的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ProRL Agent已开源并集成到NVIDIA NeMo Gym中，为多轮LLM智能体的RL训练提供了可扩展、易维护的基础设施解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about RL training infrastructure for LLM agents (software engineering, math, coding tasks), which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics field focused on video-to-3D-motion generation, visual feature extraction, and motion synthesis. The application domain, methods, and research area are entirely different - this is AI/ML infrastructure research, not computer graphics or 3D motion generation.

title: Color image restoration based on nonlocal saturation-value similarity
summary: In this paper, we propose and develop a novel nonlocal variational technique based on saturation-value similarity for color image restoration. In traditional nonlocal methods, image patches are extracted from red, green and blue channels of a color image directly, and the color information can not be described finely because the patch similarity is mainly based on the grayscale value of independent channel. The main aim of this paper is to propose and develop a novel nonlocal regularization method by considering the similarity of image patches in saturation-value channel of a color image. In particular, we first establish saturation-value similarity based nonlocal total variation by incorporating saturation-value similarity of color image patches into the proposed nonlocal gradients, which can describe the saturation and value similarity of two adjacent color image patches. The proposed nonlocal variational models are then formulated based on saturation-value similarity based nonlocal total variation. Moreover, we design an effective and efficient algorithm to solve the proposed optimization problem numerically by employing bregmanized operator splitting method, and we also study the convergence of the proposed algorithms. Numerical examples are presented to demonstrate that the performance of the proposed models is better than that of other testing methods in terms of visual quality and some quantitative metrics including peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR), structural similarity index (SSIM), quaternion structural similarity index (QSSIM) and S-CIELAB color error.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于饱和度-值(SV)相似性的非局部变分技术用于彩色图像恢复，解决了传统方法仅基于灰度值描述彩色图像块相似性的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统非局部方法直接从RGB通道提取图像块，相似性主要基于独立通道的灰度值，无法精细描述颜色信息。
AI.method: 1. 建立基于饱和度-值相似性的非局部全变分模型；2. 将彩色图像块的SV相似性融入非局部梯度；3. 采用Bregmanized算子分裂法求解优化问题。
AI.result: 在PSNR、SSIM、QSSIM和S-CIELAB等定量指标上优于其他对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于饱和度-值相似性的非局部变分方法能够有效提升彩色图像恢复的视觉效果和量化性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about color image restoration/denoising using nonlocal variational methods and saturation-value similarity - a traditional computer vision/image processing task. It has NO relevance to the research profile which focuses on 3D motion generation from video, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), Vision-Language Models for motion synthesis, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The application domains are completely different: image restoration vs. 3D motion synthesis.

title: AU Codes, Language, and Synthesis: Translating Anatomy to Text for Facial Behavior Synthesis
summary: Facial behavior synthesis remains a critical yet underexplored challenge. While text-to-face models have made progress, they often rely on coarse emotion categories, which lack the nuance needed to capture the full spectrum of human nonverbal communication. Action Units (AUs) provide a more precise and anatomically grounded alternative. However, current AU-based approaches typically encode AUs as one-hot vectors, modeling compound expressions as simple linear combinations of individual AUs. This linearity becomes problematic when handling conflicting AUs--defined as those which activate the same facial muscle with opposing actions. Such cases lead to anatomically implausible artifacts and unnatural motion superpositions. To address this, we propose a novel method that represents facial behavior through natural language descriptions of AUs. This approach preserves the expressiveness of the AU framework while enabling explicit modeling of complex and conflicting AUs. It also unlocks the potential of modern text-to-image models for high-fidelity facial synthesis. Supporting this direction, we introduce BP4D-AUText, the first large-scale text-image paired dataset for complex facial behavior. It is synthesized by applying a rule-based Dynamic AU Text Processor to the BP4D and BP4D+ datasets. We further propose VQ-AUFace, a generative model that leverages facial structural priors to synthesize realistic and diverse facial behaviors from text. Extensive quantitative experiments and user studies demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing methods. It excels in generating facial expressions that are anatomically plausible, behaviorally rich, and perceptually convincing, particularly under challenging conditions involving conflicting AUs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自然语言描述Action Units (AUs)的面部行为合成方法，解决了传统AU-based方法在处理冲突面部动作时产生的解剖学上不合理的问题，并构建了首个大规模文本-图像配对数据集BP4D-AUText和VQ-AUFace生成模型。
AI.motivation: 当前基于文本的面部合成方法依赖于粗粒度的情绪类别，缺乏对人类非语言交流全面捕捉的细腻度；而基于AU的方法虽然更精确，但将AU编码为one-hot向量并简单线性组合，无法处理冲突AU（同一面部肌肉的相反动作），导致解剖学上不合理的人工伪影和不自然的动作叠加。
AI.method: 1) 提出使用自然语言描述AU来表征面部行为，保留AU框架的表现力同时支持复杂和冲突AU的显式建模；2) 构建规则驱动的动态AU文本处理器，从BP4D和BP4D+数据集生成BP4D-AUText数据集；3) 提出VQ-AUFace生成模型，利用面部结构先验从文本合成高保真面部行为。
AI.result: 定量实验和用户研究表明，该方法显著优于现有方法，在生成解剖学合理、行为丰富、感知逼真的面部表情方面表现出色，特别是在处理冲突AU的挑战性条件下。
AI.conclusion: 通过自然语言描述AU的方式成功解决了冲突AU的表示和合成问题，为高保真面部行为合成开辟了新路径，同时BP4D-AUText数据集和VQ-AUFace模型为该领域提供了重要的基础资源。

The pain points mentioned (extracting 3D motion from 2D video, driving 3D motion synthesis, bridging 2D-3D gap) are not addressed. While both use generation models, the target applications are completely different.

title: Conflict-Based Search for Multi Agent Path Finding with Asynchronous Actions
summary: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) seeks collision-free paths for multiple agents from their respective start locations to their respective goal locations while minimizing path costs. Most existing MAPF algorithms rely on a common assumption of synchronized actions, where the actions of all agents start at the same time and always take a time unit, which may limit the use of MAPF planners in practice. To get rid of this assumption, Continuous-time Conflict-Based Search (CCBS) is a popular approach that can find optimal solutions for MAPF with asynchronous actions (MAPF-AA). However, CCBS has recently been identified to be incomplete due to an uncountably infinite state space created by continuous wait durations. This paper proposes a new method, Conflict-Based Search with Asynchronous Actions (CBS-AA), which bypasses this theoretical issue and can solve MAPF-AA with completeness and solution optimality guarantees. Based on CBS-AA, we also develop conflict resolution techniques to improve the scalability of CBS-AA further. Our test results show that our method can reduce the number of branches by up to 90%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CBS-AA方法解决多智能体路径规划(MAPF)中的异步动作问题，绕过CCBS的理论不完整性，提供完整性和最优性保证，实验表明可减少90%的分支数。
AI.motivation: 现有MAPF算法通常假设同步动作(同时开始、耗时一个时间单元)，限制了实际应用。CCBS虽能处理异步动作，但因连续等待时长导致的无限状态空间而被证明不完整。
AI.method: 提出冲突搜索异步动作(CBS-AA)方法，基于CBS框架处理异步动作，并开发冲突解决技术提高可扩展性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法可减少高达90%的分支数。
AI.conclusion: CBS-AA绕过了CCBS的理论问题，为MAPF-AA提供了完整性和最优性保证，显著提升了可扩展性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multi-agent path finding (MAPF) in robotics/AI planning - a completely different field from Computer Graphics. It addresses none of the pain points (video-to-3D motion extraction, video generation quality control, visual guidance for motion synthesis) and uses none of the specified methods (video generation models, VLM, 3D motion generation). This is theoretical path planning algorithm research with no application to graphics or motion synthesis.

title: myMNIST: Benchmark of PETNN, KAN, and Classical Deep Learning Models for Burmese Handwritten Digit Recognition
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables, Accepted to ICNLP 2026, Xi'an, China
summary: We present the first systematic benchmark on myMNIST (formerly BHDD), a publicly available Burmese handwritten digit dataset important for Myanmar NLP/AI research. We evaluate eleven architectures spanning classical deep learning models (Multi-Layer Perceptron, Convolutional Neural Network, Long Short-Term Memory, Gated Recurrent Unit, Transformer), recent alternatives (FastKAN, EfficientKAN), an energy-based model (JEM), and physics-inspired PETNN variants (Sigmoid, GELU, SiLU). Using Precision, Recall, F1-Score, and Accuracy as evaluation metrics, our results show that the CNN remains a strong baseline, achieving the best overall scores (F1 = 0.9959, Accuracy = 0.9970). The PETNN (GELU) model closely follows (F1 = 0.9955, Accuracy = 0.9966), outperforming LSTM, GRU, Transformer, and KAN variants. JEM, representing energy-based modeling, performs competitively (F1 = 0.9944, Accuracy = 0.9958). KAN-based models (FastKAN, EfficientKAN) trail the top performers but provide a meaningful alternative baseline (Accuracy ~0.992). These findings (i) establish reproducible baselines for myMNIST across diverse modeling paradigms, (ii) highlight PETNN's strong performance relative to classical and Transformer-based models, and (iii) quantify the gap between energy-inspired PETNNs and a true energy-based model (JEM). We release this benchmark to facilitate future research on Myanmar digit recognition and to encourage broader evaluation of emerging architectures on regional scripts.

title: Complementary Text-Guided Attention for Zero-Shot Adversarial Robustness
comment: Accepted to TPAMI 2026. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2410.21802
summary: Due to the impressive zero-shot capabilities, pre-trained vision-language models (e.g., CLIP), have attracted widespread attention and adoption across various domains. Nonetheless, CLIP has been observed to be susceptible to adversarial examples. Through experimental analysis, we have observed a phenomenon wherein adversarial perturbations induce shifts in text-guided attention. Building upon this observation, we propose a simple yet effective strategy: Text-Guided Attention for Zero-Shot Robustness (TGA-ZSR). This framework incorporates two components: Local Attention Refinement Module and Global Attention Constraint Module. Our goal is to maintain the generalization of the CLIP model and enhance its adversarial robustness. Additionally, the Global Attention Constraint Module acquires text-guided attention from both the target and original models using clean examples. Its objective is to maintain model performance on clean samples while enhancing overall robustness. However, we observe that the method occasionally focuses on irrelevant or spurious features, which can lead to suboptimal performance and undermine its robustness in certain scenarios. To overcome this limitation, we further propose a novel approach called Complementary Text-Guided Attention (Comp-TGA). This method integrates two types of foreground attention: attention guided by the class prompt and reversed attention driven by the non-class prompt. These complementary attention mechanisms allow the model to capture a more comprehensive and accurate representation of the foreground. The experiments validate that TGA-ZSR and Comp-TGA yield 9.58% and 11.95% improvements respectively, in zero-shot robust accuracy over the current state-of-the-art techniques across 16 datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TGA-ZSR和Comp-TGA两种方法，通过文本引导注意力机制提升CLIP模型的零样本对抗鲁棒性，在16个数据集上分别实现9.58%和11.95%的零样本鲁棒准确率提升。
AI.motivation: CLIP等预训练视觉-语言模型虽然具有出色的零样本能力，但容易受到对抗样本的攻击。现有的对抗训练方法通常需要大量计算资源，且难以保持模型在干净样本上的性能。
AI.method: 提出文本引导注意力零样本鲁棒性框架(TGA-ZSR)，包含局部注意力精炼模块和全局注意力约束模块。全局注意力约束模块从目标和原始模型中获取文本引导注意力，保持干净样本性能同时增强鲁棒性。进一步提出互补文本引导注意力(Comp-TGA)，结合类别提示引导的前景注意力和非类别提示的反向注意力。
AI.result: 在16个数据集上，TGA-ZSR和Comp-TGA分别比当前最先进方法提升9.58%和11.95%的零样本鲁棒准确率。
AI.conclusion: 文本引导注意力机制可有效提升CLIP模型的零样本对抗鲁棒性，Comp-TGA通过互补注意力机制能更全面准确地捕获前景信息，性能优于TGA-ZSR。

Different application domain, different problem space, and different goals entirely.

title: Geography According to ChatGPT -- How Generative AI Represents and Reasons about Geography
summary: Understanding how AI will represent and reason about geography should be a key concern for all of us, as the broader public increasingly interacts with spaces and places through these systems. Similarly, in line with the nature of foundation models, our own research often relies on pre-trained models. Hence, understanding what world AI systems construct is as important as evaluating their accuracy, including factual recall. To motivate the need for such studies, we provide three illustrative vignettes, i.e., exploratory probes, in the hope that they will spark lively discussions and follow-up work: (1) Do models form strong defaults, and how brittle are model outputs to minute syntactic variations? (2) Can distributional shifts resurface from the composition of individually benign tasks, e.g., when using AI systems to create personas? (3) Do we overlook deeper questions of understanding when solely focusing on the ability of systems to recall facts such as geographic principles?

AI.tldr: 论文探讨了AI系统如何表示和推理地理空间的问题，强调理解AI构建的世界模型与评估其准确性同样重要，并提出三个探索性研究问题作为示例。
AI.motivation: 随着公众越来越多地通过AI系统与空间和地点交互，研究AI如何表示和推理地理变得至关重要。同时，由于研究依赖于预训练的基础模型，理解AI系统构建的世界模型与评估其事实准确性同样重要。
AI.method: 通过三个说明性的探索性研究(vignettes)来展开：(1)测试模型是否形成强默认值，以及输出对微小句法变化的脆弱程度；(2)检验从单独无害任务的组合中是否会产生分布偏移（如使用AI系统创建人物角色时）；(3)探讨当仅关注系统回忆地理事实等能力时，是否忽略了更深层次的理解问题。
AI.result: 论文未报告具体实验结果，而是一篇立场/观点文章，旨在激发关于AI地理推理研究的讨论和后续工作。
AI.conclusion: 需要开展更多关于AI地理表征和推理的研究，不仅要评估准确性，还要理解AI系统构建的世界模型。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI geography reasoning and LLM evaluation - completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. It focuses on how generative AI represents and reasons about geographic space, testing default values and factual recall. There is no connection to 3D motion extraction from video, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), visual feature extraction for 3D motion synthesis, or any computer graphics applications. This is an AI alignment/evaluation paper, not a computer graphics or 3D motion generation paper.

title: SJD-PAC: Accelerating Speculative Jacobi Decoding via Proactive Drafting and Adaptive Continuation
summary: Speculative Jacobi Decoding (SJD) offers a draft-model-free approach to accelerate autoregressive text-to-image synthesis. However, the high-entropy nature of visual generation yields low draft-token acceptance rates in complex regions, creating a bottleneck that severely limits overall throughput. To overcome this, we introduce SJD-PAC, an enhanced SJD framework. First, SJD-PAC employs a proactive drafting strategy to improve local acceptance rates in these challenging high-entropy regions. Second, we introduce an adaptive continuation mechanism that sustains sequence validation after an initial rejection, bypassing the need for full resampling. Working in tandem, these optimizations significantly increase the average acceptance length per step, boosting inference speed while strictly preserving the target distribution. Experiments on standard text-to-image benchmarks demonstrate that SJD-PAC achieves a $3.8\times$ speedup with lossless image quality.

AI.tldr: SJD-PAC是一种增强的Speculative Jacobi Decoding框架，通过主动drafting策略和自适应延续机制解决高熵视觉生成中draft token接受率低的问题，在文本到图像合成任务中实现3.8倍加速且保持无损图像质量。
AI.motivation: Speculative Jacobi Decoding (SJD)可在无draft模型情况下加速自回归文本到图像合成，但视觉生成的高熵特性导致复杂区域的draft token接受率较低，形成严重制约整体吞吐量的瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出SJD-PAC框架，包含两个核心优化：1) 主动drafting策略，提高高熵困难区域的局部接受率；2) 自适应延续机制，在初始拒绝后维持序列验证，避免完全重采样。两个优化协同工作显著提高每步平均接受长度。
AI.result: 在标准文本到图像基准测试中，SJD-PAC实现3.8倍加速且保持无损图像质量。
AI.conclusion: SJD-PAC通过主动drafting和自适应延续机制有效解决了高熵视觉生成中draft接受率低的问题，在严格保持目标分布的前提下显著提升推理速度，为自回归图像生成加速提供了有效方案。
