The pain points, objectives, and application areas are entirely unrelated - this is about generating PET images from MRI, not about extracting 3D motion from 2D video or driving 3D motion synthesis. The method similarity (diffusion) is the only connection, but different application domains should be considered as different fields.

title: GHOST: Fast Category-agnostic Hand-Object Interaction Reconstruction from RGB Videos using Gaussian Splatting
summary: Understanding realistic hand-object interactions from monocular RGB videos is essential for AR/VR, robotics, and embodied AI. Existing methods rely on category-specific templates or heavy computation, yet still produce physically inconsistent hand-object alignment in 3D. We introduce GHOST (Gaussian Hand-Object Splatting), a fast, category-agnostic framework for reconstructing dynamic hand-object interactions using 2D Gaussian Splatting. GHOST represents both hands and objects as dense, view-consistent Gaussian discs and introduces three key innovations: (1) a geometric-prior retrieval and consistency loss that completes occluded object regions, (2) a grasp-aware alignment that refines hand translations and object scale to ensure realistic contact, and (3) a hand-aware background loss that prevents penalizing hand-occluded object regions. GHOST achieves complete, physically consistent, and animatable reconstructions from a single RGB video while running an order of magnitude faster than prior category-agnostic methods. Extensive experiments on ARCTIC, HO3D, and in-the-wild datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art accuracy in 3D reconstruction and 2D rendering quality, establishing GHOST as an efficient and robust solution for realistic hand-object interaction modeling. Code is available at https://github.com/ATAboukhadra/GHOST.

AI.tldr: GHOST是一个基于2D Gaussian Splatting的快速、类别无关的手-物体交互重建框架，通过几何先验检索、抓取感知对齐和手部感知背景损失三项创新，实现了从单RGB视频中提取完整、物理一致且可动画化的手-物体交互模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖于类别特定模板或重计算，且在3D中产生物理上不一致的手-物体对齐。研究者需要一种快速、类别无关的框架来从单RGB视频重建动态手-物体交互。
AI.method: GHOST将手和物体表示为密集的、视图一致的Gaussian圆盘，引入了三个关键创新：1) 几何先验检索和一致性损失来完成遮挡的物体区域；2) 抓取感知对齐以精炼手部平移和物体尺度确保真实接触；3) 手部感知背景损失以避免惩罚手部遮挡的物体区域。
AI.result: GHOST实现了完整、物理一致且可动画化的重建，在ARCTIC、HO3D和野外数据集上进行了广泛实验，表明其在3D重建精度和2D渲染质量方面达到了最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: GHOST作为一个高效且鲁棒的 hand-object interaction 建模解决方案，在3D重建和2D渲染质量方面实现了最先进的精度，且运行速度比之前的类别无关方法快一个数量级。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses 3D reconstruction from RGB videos using Gaussian Splatting, which differs significantly from the research profile's focus on video generation models and 3D motion synthesis. While both involve 3D and video, the application domains are distinct: GHOST focuses on hand-object interaction reconstruction (recovering existing geometry), whereas the profile targets generating new video/motion content. The methods also differ - the profile emphasizes video generation models (Seedance) and motion generation models, while GHOST uses Gaussian Splatting for reconstruction. This represents a case of using similar underlying techniques (3D representations) in a fundamentally different application domain.

title: Unsupervised Contrastive Learning for Efficient and Robust Spectral Shape Matching
summary: Estimating correspondences between pairs of non-rigid deformable 3D shapes remains a significant challenge in computer vision and graphics. While deep functional map methods have become the go-to solution for addressing this problem, they primarily focus on optimizing pointwise and functional maps either individually or jointly, rather than directly enhancing feature representations in the embedding space, which often results in inadequate feature quality and suboptimal matching performance. Furthermore, these approaches heavily rely on traditional functional map techniques, such as time-consuming functional map solvers, which incur substantial computational costs. In this work, we introduce, for the first time, a novel unsupervised contrastive learning-based approach for efficient and robust 3D shape matching. We begin by presenting an unsupervised contrastive learning framework that promotes feature learning by maximizing consistency within positive similarity pairs and minimizing it within negative similarity pairs, thereby improving both the consistency and discriminability of the learned features.We then design a significantly simplified functional map learning architecture that eliminates the need for computationally expensive functional map solvers and multiple auxiliary functional map losses, greatly enhancing computational efficiency. By integrating these two components into a unified two-branch pipeline, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both accuracy and efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach is not only computationally efficient but also outperforms current state-of-the-art methods across various challenging benchmarks, including near-isometric, non-isometric, and topologically inconsistent scenarios, even surpassing supervised techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无监督对比学习的3D形状匹配方法，通过最大化正样本对相似度、最小化负样本对相似度来提升特征质量，并设计了简化版功能映射学习架构以提高计算效率，在近等距、非等距和拓扑不一致等多种挑战性场景下达到最先进的匹配性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度功能映射方法主要关注逐点或功能映射的单独或联合优化，而非直接增强嵌入空间的特征表示，导致特征质量不足和匹配性能次优；同时这些方法依赖耗时的功能映射求解器，计算成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出统一的双分支管道：一是无监督对比学习框架，通过促进正相似样本对内的一致性并最小化负样本对的一致性来提升特征的判别性；二是简化的功能映射学习架构，消除了计算昂贵功能映射求解器和多个辅助功能映射损失的需求。
AI.result: 在多种挑战性基准测试中（包括近等距、非等距和拓扑不一致场景）达到最先进的准确率和效率表现，甚至超越了监督学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过无监督对比学习有效提升了特征表示的质量，结合简化的功能映射架构大幅提高了计算效率，在无需标注数据的情况下实现了优于现有监督方法的性能，为3D形状匹配领域提供了新的研究思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D shape matching using spectral methods and unsupervised contrastive learning - a completely different application domain from the research profile. The profile focuses on video-to-3D motion extraction, video generation quality control, and using video generation models (like Wanxiang/Seedance) and VLMs for 3D motion synthesis from 2D video. The paper addresses 3D shape correspondence/matching between 3D meshes, not video-based motion generation. No alignment with the specified pain points or methods.

title: VGGT-360: Geometry-Consistent Zero-Shot Panoramic Depth Estimation
summary: This paper presents VGGT-360, a novel training-free framework for zero-shot, geometry-consistent panoramic depth estimation. Unlike prior view-independent training-free approaches, VGGT-360 reformulates the task as panoramic reprojection over multi-view reconstructed 3D models by leveraging the intrinsic 3D consistency of VGGT-like foundation models, thereby unifying fragmented per-view reasoning into a coherent panoramic understanding. To achieve robust and accurate estimation, VGGT-360 integrates three plug-and-play modules that form a unified panorama-to-3D-to-depth framework: (i) Uncertainty-guided adaptive projection slices panoramas into perspective views to bridge the domain gap between panoramic inputs and VGGT's perspective prior. It estimates gradient-based uncertainty to allocate denser views to geometry-poor regions, yielding geometry-informative inputs for VGGT. (ii) Structure-saliency enhanced attention strengthens VGGT's robustness during 3D reconstruction by injecting structure-aware confidence into its attention layers, guiding focus toward geometrically reliable regions and enhancing cross-view coherence. (iii) Correlation-weighted 3D model correction refines the reconstructed 3D model by reweighting overlapping points using attention-inferred correlation scores, providing a consistent geometric basis for accurate panoramic reprojection. Extensive experiments show that VGGT-360 outperforms both trained and training-free state-of-the-art methods across multiple resolutions and diverse indoor and outdoor datasets.

AI.tldr: VGGT-360是一个无需训练的零样本全景深度估计框架，通过将任务重新表述为基于多视角重建3D模型的全景重投影，利用VGGT类基础模型的内在3D一致性，统一碎片化的单视图推理为连贯的全景理解。
AI.motivation: 现有无训练方法采用视图无关方式处理全景深度估计，导致推理碎片化。VGGT-360旨在通过全景重投影范式解决这一问题，利用多视角重建3D模型的内在3D一致性，实现连贯的全景深度估计。
AI.method: VGGT-360集成了三个即插即用模块形成全景到3D再到深度的统一框架：1) 不确定性引导的自适应投影将全景图切分为透视视图，通过梯度不确定性为几何信息不足区域分配更密集的视角；2) 结构显著性增强的注意力机制向VGGT的注意力层注入结构感知置信度，引导模型关注几何可靠区域并增强跨视图一致性；3) 相关性加权的3D模型校正利用注意力推断的相关性分数对重叠点进行重加权，优化重建的3D模型。
AI.result: VGGT-360在多种分辨率和不同的室内外数据集上均优于现有的有训练和无训练方法。
AI.conclusion: VGGT-360通过无需训练的方式成功实现了零样本、几何一致的全景深度估计，为全景深度估计领域提供了一种新范式。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses panoramic DEPTH ESTIMATION (geometry from images), which is a different application domain from 3D MOTION GENERATION. While both are in computer graphics and deal with 2D-to-3D tasks, the research profile focuses on extracting temporal motion information from video for character animation, whereas this paper focuses on spatial depth reconstruction from panoramic images. The methods (VGGT for depth estimation vs motion generation models like Seedance) and end goals (geometry estimation vs motion synthesis) are fundamentally different. Only tangential relevance in terms of bridging 2D-to-3D, but not the motion synthesis aspect.

title: CRAFT: Aligning Diffusion Models with Fine-Tuning Is Easier Than You Think
summary: Aligning Diffusion models has achieved remarkable breakthroughs in generating high-quality, human preference-aligned images. Existing techniques, such as supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and DPO-style preference optimization, have become principled tools for fine-tuning diffusion models. However, SFT relies on high-quality images that are costly to obtain, while DPO-style methods depend on large-scale preference datasets, which are often inconsistent in quality. Beyond data dependency, these methods are further constrained by computational inefficiency. To address these two challenges, we propose Composite Reward Assisted Fine-Tuning (CRAFT), a lightweight yet powerful fine-tuning paradigm that requires significantly reduced training data while maintaining computational efficiency. It first leverages a Composite Reward Filtering (CRF) technique to construct a high-quality and consistent training dataset and then perform an enhanced variant of SFT. We also theoretically prove that CRAFT actually optimizes the lower bound of group-based reinforcement learning, establishing a principled connection between SFT with selected data and reinforcement learning. Our extensive empirical results demonstrate that CRAFT with only 100 samples can easily outperform recent SOTA preference optimization methods with thousands of preference-paired samples. Moreover, CRAFT can even achieve 11-220$\times$ faster convergences than the baseline preference optimization methods, highlighting its extremely high efficiency.

AI.tldr: CRAFT是一种轻量级但强大的扩散模型微调范式，通过Composite Reward Filtering技术从少量数据中构建高质量训练集，理论证明其优化了基于组的强化学习下界，100个样本即可超越数千样本的SOTA方法
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型对齐方法（SFT和DPO）存在数据依赖性强和计算效率低的问题：SFT依赖高质量但昂贵获取的图像，DPO依赖大规模且质量不一致的偏好数据集
AI.method: 1. Composite Reward Filtering (CRF)：构建高质量一致的训练数据集；2. 增强版SFT进行微调
AI.result: 1. 仅用100个样本即可超越使用数千个偏好配对样本的SOTA方法；2. 收敛速度比基线偏好优化方法快11-220倍
AI.conclusion: CRAFT在仅使用100个样本的情况下就能超越使用数千个偏好配对样本的SOTA偏好优化方法，且收敛速度比基线方法快11-220倍，证明了其高效性。

relevance_reason: Complete application domain mismatch. The research profile focuses on 3D MOTION GENERATION from video (human motion synthesis, extracting 3D motion from 2D video), while this paper is about aligning diffusion models for IMAGE generation (mentions "图像" = images). Even though both use diffusion models, they are in completely different application domains - image generation vs human motion generation are distinct fields in Computer Graphics. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points: extracting 3D motion from 2D video, video generation quality control, visual guidance for 3D motion synthesis, or bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space.

title: Unleashing the Power of Simplicity: A Minimalist Strategy for State-of-the-Art Fingerprint Enhancement
summary: Fingerprint recognition systems, which rely on the unique characteristics of human fingerprints, are essential in modern security and verification applications. Accurate minutiae extraction, a critical step in these systems, depends on the quality of fingerprint images. Despite recent improvements in fingerprint enhancement techniques, state-of-the-art methods often struggle with low-quality fingerprints and can be computationally demanding. This paper presents a minimalist approach to fingerprint enhancement, prioritizing simplicity and effectiveness. Two novel methods are introduced: a contextual filtering method and a learning-based method. These techniques consistently outperform complex state-of-the-art methods, producing clearer, more accurate, and less noisy images. The effectiveness of these methods is validated using a challenging latent fingerprint database. The open-source implementation of these techniques not only fosters reproducibility but also encourages further advancements in the field. The findings underscore the importance of simplicity in achieving high-quality fingerprint enhancement and suggest that future research should balance complexity and practical benefits.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种极简主义的指纹增强方法，包括两种新技术：上下文滤波方法和基于学习的方法。这些技术专注于简单性和有效性，在低质量指纹图像处理方面优于复杂的先进方法，并在具有挑战性的潜在指纹数据库上进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 尽管指纹识别系统在现代安全验证中至关重要，但当前最先进的指纹增强技术在处理低质量指纹时表现不佳，且计算成本高。现需要一种既有效又简单的指纹增强方法。
AI.method: 提出了两种新颖的指纹增强方法：1) 上下文滤波方法；2) 基于学习的方法。这两种方法都采用极简主义设计理念，追求简单性和有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，这两种方法始终优于复杂的最先进方法，能够产生更清晰、更准确、噪声更少的指纹图像。验证在具有挑战性的潜在指纹数据库上进行。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了简单性在实现高质量指纹增强中的重要性，表明未来研究应在复杂性和实际效益之间取得平衡。开源实现促进了该领域的进一步发展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about fingerprint enhancement for biometric security, which is completely unrelated to the research profile. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion generation from video, video generation models, and bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space. This paper addresses fingerprint image enhancement for security validation - a biometrics application, not computer graphics or motion synthesis. Even though both involve image processing, the application domains are entirely different (biometrics vs. 3D motion/video generation).

title: Generalized Hand-Object Pose Estimation with Occlusion Awareness
summary: Generalized 3D hand-object pose estimation from a single RGB image remains challenging due to the large variations in object appearances and interaction patterns, especially under heavy occlusion. We propose GenHOI, a framework for generalized hand-object pose estimation with occlusion awareness. GenHOI integrates hierarchical semantic knowledge with hand priors to enhance model generalization under challenging occlusion conditions. Specifically, we introduce a hierarchical semantic prompt that encodes object states, hand configurations, and interaction patterns via textual descriptions. This enables the model to learn abstract high-level representations of hand-object interactions for generalization to unseen objects and novel interactions while compensating for missing or ambiguous visual cues. To enable robust occlusion reasoning, we adopt a multi-modal masked modeling strategy over RGB images, predicted point clouds, and textual descriptions. Moreover, we leverage hand priors as stable spatial references to extract implicit interaction constraints. This allows reliable pose inference even under significant variations in object shapes and interaction patterns. Extensive experiments on the challenging DexYCB and HO3Dv2 benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in hand-object pose estimation.

AI.tldr: GenHOI是一个用于从单张RGB图像进行广义3D手-物体姿态估计的框架，通过整合层次语义知识与手部先验来增强模型在严重遮挡条件下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 从单张RGB图像进行广义3D手-物体姿态估计仍具挑战性，因为物体外观和交互模式变化大，尤其是在严重遮挡条件下。
AI.method: 提出层次语义提示编码物体状态、手部配置和交互模式的文本描述；采用多模态掩码建模策略处理RGB图像、预测点云和文本描述；利用手部先验作为稳定的空间参考来提取隐式交互约束。
AI.result: 在DexYCB和HO3Dv2两个具有挑战性的基准数据集上实现了最先进的手-物体姿态估计性能。
AI.conclusion: GenHOE通过层次语义知识与手部先验的结合，能够有效提升模型在遮挡条件下的泛化能力，为手-物体交互估计提供了一种新的思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about hand-object pose estimation from single RGB images, which is a computer vision/3D reconstruction task. While it deals with 3D pose estimation, the application domain is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on video-based 3D motion generation for computer graphics. The profile is about synthesizing new motion from video (generative task for graphics/animations), whereas this paper is about estimating existing poses from images (discriminative task for vision). Methods differ significantly: profile uses video generation models and motion synthesis, while paper uses pose estimation with hand priors. The pain points addressed are also different - this paper focuses on occlusion handling rather than video-to-3D-motion extraction or quality control of generated outputs.

title: Rethinking MLLM Itself as a Segmenter with a Single Segmentation Token
summary: Recent segmentation methods leveraging Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown reliable object-level segmentation and enhanced spatial perception. However, almost all previous methods predominantly rely on specialist mask decoders to interpret masks from generated segmentation-related embeddings and visual features, or incorporate multiple additional tokens to assist. This paper aims to investigate whether and how we can unlock segmentation from MLLM itSELF with 1 segmentation Embedding (SELF1E) while achieving competitive results, which eliminates the need for external decoders. To this end, our approach targets the fundamental limitation of resolution reduction in pixel-shuffled image features from MLLMs. First, we retain image features at their original uncompressed resolution, and refill them with residual features extracted from MLLM-processed compressed features, thereby improving feature precision. Subsequently, we integrate pixel-unshuffle operations on image features with and without LLM processing, respectively, to unleash the details of compressed features and amplify the residual features under uncompressed resolution, which further enhances the resolution of refilled features. Moreover, we redesign the attention mask with dual perception pathways, i.e., image-to-image and image-to-segmentation, enabling rich feature interaction between pixels and the segmentation token. Comprehensive experiments across multiple segmentation tasks validate that SELF1E achieves performance competitive with specialist mask decoder-based methods, demonstrating the feasibility of decoder-free segmentation in MLLMs. Project page: https://github.com/ANDYZAQ/SELF1E.

AI.tldr: SELF1E提出一种无需外部解码器的多模态大语言模型分割方法，通过保留原始分辨率图像特征、填充残差特征、像素反 shuffle 操作和双感知通道注意力掩码，实现与专用掩码解码器方法相当的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型分割方法主要依赖专用掩码解码器来解释分割嵌入和视觉特征，本文旨在探索能否仅通过MLLM自身实现分割，消除对外部解码器的依赖。
AI.method: 1. 保留原始未压缩分辨率的图像特征；2. 用MLLM处理的压缩特征中提取的残差特征进行填充，提高特征精度；3. 对经LLM处理和未处理的图像特征分别进行像素反shuffle操作，释放压缩特征的细节并在未压缩分辨率下放大残差特征；4. 重新设计双感知通道（图像到图像、图像到分割）的注意力掩码，实现像素与分割token之间的丰富特征交互。
AI.result: SELF1E在多个分割任务上取得了与专用掩码解码器方法相当的性能，验证了MLLM中无解码器分割的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过解决MLLM中像素 shuffling 带来的分辨率降低问题，SELF1E成功实现了无需外部解码器的分割方法，为多模态大语言模型的分割能力提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about image segmentation using MLLMs, which is a computer vision task. The research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation from 2D video (using Video Generation Models like Wanxiang/Seedance). The application domains are completely different: 2D image segmentation vs 3D motion synthesis from video. While both use Vision-Language Models, they are applied to entirely different problems - this would be like comparing image generation to human motion generation. The paper does not address any of the pain points mentioned (3D motion extraction, quality control of video generation, visual guidance for 3D motion synthesis, or bridging 2D to 3D motion space).

title: TerraScope: Pixel-Grounded Visual Reasoning for Earth Observation
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown promise in earth observation (EO), yet they struggle with tasks that require grounding complex spatial reasoning in precise pixel-level visual representations. To address this problem, we introduce TerraScope, a unified VLM that delivers pixel-grounded geospatial reasoning with two key capabilities: (1) modality-flexible reasoning: it handles single-modality inputs (optical or SAR) and adaptively fuses different modalities into the reasoning process when both are available; (2) multi-temporal reasoning: it integrates temporal sequences for change analysis across multiple time points. In addition, we curate Terra-CoT, a large-scale dataset containing 1 million samples with pixel-level masks embedded in reasoning chains across multiple sources. We also propose TerraScope-Bench, the first benchmark for pixel-grounded geospatial reasoning with six sub-tasks that evaluates both answer accuracy and mask quality to ensure authentic pixel-grounded reasoning. Experiments show that TerraScope significantly outperforms existing VLMs on pixel-grounded geospatial reasoning while providing interpretable visual evidence.

AI.tldr: TerraScope是一个统一的视觉语言模型,用于在地球观测中提供像素级接地气的地理空间推理,具有模态灵活推理和多时序推理能力,并发布了大规模数据集Terra-CoT和首个像素级地理空间推理基准TerraScope-Bench。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型在地球观测任务中存在局限性,难以在复杂的空间推理中实现精确的像素级视觉表示接地。
AI.method: 提出TerraScope模型,具备:(1)模态灵活推理-处理单模态输入(光学或SAR)并在多模态可用时自适应融合;(2)多时序推理-整合时间序列进行多时间点变化分析。同时构建Terra-CoT数据集(100万样本,包含像素级掩码和推理链)和TerraScope-Bench基准(6个子任务,评估答案准确性和掩码质量)。
AI.result: TerraScope在像素级地理空间推理任务上显著优于现有视觉语言模型,同时提供可解释的视觉证据。
AI.conclusion: TerraScope实现了统一的像素级接地气地理空间推理框架,为地球观测领域的多模态和多时序视觉语言理解提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Earth Observation/geospatial reasoning using Vision-Language Models for satellite imagery analysis - completely different application domain from Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on extracting 3D motion from 2D video, video generation models (like Seedance), and 3D motion synthesis. TerraScope addresses pixel-level geospatial reasoning for satellite/SAR images, which has no relevance to the pain points of bridging 2D video to 3D motion space or visual guidance for motion synthesis. While both mention "Vision-Language Models," the application domains are entirely different - one is for geographic/satellite analysis, the other is for computer graphics and motion generation.

title: Measuring 3D Spatial Geometric Consistency in Dynamic Generated Videos
summary: Recent generative models can produce high-fidelity videos, yet they often exhibit 3D spatial geometric inconsistencies. Existing evaluation methods fail to accurately characterize these inconsistencies: fidelity-centric metrics like FVD are insensitive to geometric distortions, while consistency-focused benchmarks often penalize valid foreground dynamics. To address this gap, we introduce SGC, a metric for evaluating 3D \textbf{S}patial \textbf{G}eometric \textbf{C}onsistency in dynamically generated videos. We quantify geometric consistency by measuring the divergence among multiple camera poses estimated from distinct local regions. Our approach first separates static from dynamic regions, then partitions the static background into spatially coherent sub-regions. We predict depth for each pixel, estimate a local camera pose for each subregion, and compute the divergence among these poses to quantify geometric consistency. Experiments on real and generative videos demonstrate that SGC robustly quantifies geometric inconsistencies, effectively identifying critical failures missed by existing metrics.

AI.tldr: SGC是一种评估动态生成视频中3D空间几何一致性的新指标，通过测量从不同局部区域估计的多个相机姿态之间的分歧来量化几何一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法无法准确表征3D空间几何不一致性：保真度指标（如FVD）对几何扭曲不敏感，而一致性基准测试往往惩罚有效的前景动态。
AI.method: 1）将静态区域与动态区域分离；2）将静态背景分割成空间连贯的子区域；3）为每个像素预测深度；4）估计每个子区域的局部相机姿态；5）计算这些姿态之间的分歧来量化几何一致性。
AI.result: 在真实和生成视频上的实验表明，SGC能够稳健地量化几何不一致性，有效识别现有指标遗漏的关键失败。
AI.conclusion: SGC能够有效评估动态生成视频中的3D空间几何一致性，弥补了现有指标的不足。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses ONE pain point (quality control of video generation outputs) but is fundamentally about a quality assessment metric for geometric consistency in generated videos, NOT about 3D motion generation or extracting 3D motion from 2D video. The application domain is video generation quality evaluation, which is tangentially related but not the core focus of the research profile which centers on 3D motion synthesis. It's in the same general field (Computer Graphics/Video) but addresses a different problem than the stated research needs.

title: SwiftTailor: Efficient 3D Garment Generation with Geometry Image Representation
summary: Realistic and efficient 3D garment generation remains a longstanding challenge in computer vision and digital fashion. Existing methods typically rely on large vision- language models to produce serialized representations of 2D sewing patterns, which are then transformed into simulation-ready 3D meshes using garment modeling framework such as GarmentCode. Although these approaches yield high-quality results, they often suffer from slow inference times, ranging from 30 seconds to a minute. In this work, we introduce SwiftTailor, a novel two-stage framework that unifies sewing-pattern reasoning and geometry-based mesh synthesis through a compact geometry image representation. SwiftTailor comprises two lightweight modules: PatternMaker, an efficient vision-language model that predicts sewing patterns from diverse input modalities, and GarmentSewer, an efficient dense prediction transformer that converts these patterns into a novel Garment Geometry Image, encoding the 3D surface of all garment panels in a unified UV space. The final 3D mesh is reconstructed through an efficient inverse mapping process that incorporates remeshing and dynamic stitching algorithms to directly assemble the garment, thereby amortizing the cost of physical simulation. Extensive experiments on the Multimodal GarmentCodeData demonstrate that SwiftTailor achieves state-of-the-art accuracy and visual fidelity while significantly reducing inference time. This work offers a scalable, interpretable, and high-performance solution for next-generation 3D garment generation.

AI.tldr: SwiftTailor是一个新型两阶段框架，通过紧凑的几何图像表示统一缝制图案推理和基于几何的网格合成，显著加速3D服装生成，同时保持高质量的视觉效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽然能生成高质量3D服装，但推理时间长达30秒到一分钟，无法满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：1) PatternMaker：高效视觉语言模型，从多种输入模态预测缝制图案；2) GarmentSewer：高效密集预测Transformer，将图案转换为统一UV空间中的服装几何图像；最后通过逆映射、重网格化和动态缝合算法重建3D网格。
AI.result: 在Multimodal GarmentCodeData数据集上实现了最先进的精度和视觉保真度，同时显著降低了推理时间。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为下一代3D服装生成提供了可扩展、可解释且高性能的解决方案。

relevance_reason: While this paper uses Vision-Language Models (VLMs) which matches one method from the profile, it addresses a completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on VIDEO-BASED 3D MOTION SYNTHESIS (extracting 3D motion from 2D video priors), while this paper focuses on 3D GARMENT GENERATION from static patterns/inputs. This is not about motion generation or video-to-3D-motion synthesis - it's about static garment geometry creation. The core pain points (video priors, video generation quality control, motion synthesis) are not addressed. The application domains are fundamentally different within computer graphics.

title: Em-Garde: A Propose-Match Framework for Proactive Streaming Video Understanding
summary: Recent advances in Streaming Video Understanding has enabled a new interaction paradigm where models respond proactively to user queries. Current proactive VideoLLMs rely on per-frame triggering decision making, which suffers from an efficiency-accuracy dilemma. We propose Em-Garde, a novel framework that decouples semantic understanding from streaming perception. At query time, the Instruction-Guided Proposal Parser transforms user queries into structured, perceptually grounded visual proposals; during streaming, a Lightweight Proposal Matching Module performs efficient embedding-based matching to trigger responses. Experiments on StreamingBench and OVO-Bench demonstrate consistent improvements over prior models in proactive response accuracy and efficiency, validating an effective solution for proactive video understanding under strict computational constraints.

AI.tldr: Em-Garde框架通过将语义理解与流式感知解耦，解决了现有主动视频理解模型中效率-准确性的权衡问题。该方法在查询时将用户查询转换为视觉提案，并在流式传输过程中进行轻量级匹配。实验表明其在保持高效率的同时显著提升了主动响应准确率。
AI.motivation: 当前主动VideoLLMs依赖逐帧触发决策，面临效率-准确性两难困境：精细帧处理计算成本高，而稀疏采样又可能导致关键信息遗漏。
AI.method: 提出Em-Garde框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 指令引导提案解析器(Instruct-Guided Proposal Parser)在查询时将用户指令转换为结构化视觉提案；2) 轻量级提案匹配模块(Lightweight Proposal Matching Module)在流式感知中进行高效的基于嵌入的匹配以触发响应。
AI.result: 在StreamingBench和OVO-Bench上的实验表明，Em-Garde在主动响应准确性和效率方面均优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: Em-Garde为在严格计算约束下的主动视频理解提供了有效解决方案，验证了语义理解与流式感知解耦架构的可行性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about VideoLLMs for streaming video understanding (video analysis/interpretation), which is a completely different application domain from the research profile focused on Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation from 2D video. While both involve Vision-Language Models, the paper addresses video query/understanding tasks, not video generation or 3D motion synthesis. The core goal is proactive video response, not extracting 3D motion information or driving 3D motion synthesis - making it only marginally relevant due to sharing VLM as a general method.

title: SignAgent: Agentic LLMs for Linguistically-Grounded Sign Language Annotation and Dataset Curation
summary: This paper introduces SignAgent, a novel agentic framework that utilises Large Language Models (LLMs) for scalable, linguistically-grounded Sign Language (SL) annotation and dataset curation. Traditional computational methods for SLs often operate at the gloss level, overlooking crucial linguistic nuances, while manual linguistic annotation remains a significant bottleneck, proving too slow and expensive for the creation of large-scale, phonologically-aware datasets. SignAgent addresses these challenges through SignAgent Orchestrator, a reasoning LLM that coordinates a suite of linguistic tools, and SignGraph, a knowledge-grounded LLM that provides lexical and linguistic grounding. We evaluate our framework on two downstream annotation tasks. First, on Pseudo-gloss Annotation, where the agent performs constrained assignment, using multi-modal evidence to extract and order suitable gloss labels for signed sequences. Second, on ID Glossing, where the agent detects and refines visual clusters by reasoning over both visual similarity and phonological overlap to correctly identify and group lexical sign variants. Our results demonstrate that our agentic approach achieves strong performance for large-scale, linguistically-aware data annotation and curation.

AI.tldr: SignAgent是一个利用大语言模型(LLM)实现可扩展、语言学基础的手语注释和数据集管理的智能体框架，解决了传统手语研究停留在手势层而忽略语言学细节、以及人工注释成本高效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统计算方法通常在手势(googletag)层面操作，忽视了关键的语言学特征；手动语言注释耗时且昂贵，难以创建大规模、语音学感知的数据集。
AI.method: 框架包含两个核心组件：1) SignAgent Orchestrator（协调器）：负责推理的LLM，协调各种语言学工具；2) SignGraph：提供词汇和语言基础的LLM。评估任务：1) 伪手势注释（Pseudo-gloss Annotation）：使用多模态证据进行约束分配；2) ID注释（ID Glossing）：通过视觉相似性和语音重叠进行推理。
AI.result: 智能体方法在大规模、语言学感知的数据注释和管理方面表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为手语的大规模语言学注释提供了新的解决方案，有望推动手语处理领域的发展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about using LLM agents for sign language linguistic annotation (NLP/linguistics domain), not Computer Graphics. The research profile is about 3D motion generation from 2D video, video generation models, and bridging 2D-3D representations. The application domains are completely different - sign language annotation vs. 3D motion synthesis. This paper does not address any of the stated pain points (3D motion extraction, quality control, visual guidance for motion synthesis, 2D-3D bridging) and uses completely different methods (LLM agents for annotation vs. video generation models and 3D motion generation).

title: DROID-SLAM in the Wild
summary: We present a robust, real-time RGB SLAM system that handles dynamic environments by leveraging differentiable Uncertainty-aware Bundle Adjustment. Traditional SLAM methods typically assume static scenes, leading to tracking failures in the presence of motion. Recent dynamic SLAM approaches attempt to address this challenge using predefined dynamic priors or uncertainty-aware mapping, but they remain limited when confronted with unknown dynamic objects or highly cluttered scenes where geometric mapping becomes unreliable. In contrast, our method estimates per-pixel uncertainty by exploiting multi-view visual feature inconsistency, enabling robust tracking and reconstruction even in real-world environments. The proposed system achieves state-of-the-art camera poses and scene geometry in cluttered dynamic scenarios while running in real time at around 10 FPS. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/MoyangLi00/DROID-W.git.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于可微不确定性感知束束调整的鲁棒实时RGB SLAM系统，能够在动态环境中有效处理运动物体和复杂场景，实现约10 FPS的实时性能。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM方法假设静态场景，在存在运动的情况下会导致跟踪失败；现有的动态SLAM方法依赖预定义的动态先验或不确定性感知映射，但在未知动态物体或高度杂乱场景中仍存在局限性，几何映射变得不可靠。
AI.method: 通过利用多视图视觉特征不一致性估计每像素不确定性，实现可微不确定性感知束束调整，使系统能够在动态环境中实现鲁棒跟踪和重建。
AI.result: 在杂乱动态场景中实现了最先进的相机位姿和场景几何精度，同时保持约10 FPS的实时运行速度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了动态环境下的SLAM问题，通过不确定性感知机制提高了系统的鲁棒性和精度，为实际动态场景应用提供了可行方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about SLAM (Simultaneous Localization and Mapping) for robotics, which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. While both deal with 3D understanding from 2D images, SLAM focuses on camera localization and scene reconstruction for navigation, not on video generation, 3D motion synthesis, or content generation. The pain points in the profile relate to generating new motion content from 2D video priors, which has nothing to do with SLAM tracking and mapping.

title: TAU-R1: Visual Language Model for Traffic Anomaly Understanding
summary: Traffic Anomaly Understanding (TAU) is important for traffic safety in Intelligent Transportation Systems. Recent vision-language models (VLMs) have shown strong capabilities in video understanding. However, progress on TAU remains limited due to the lack of benchmarks and task-specific methodologies. To address this limitation, we introduce Roundabout-TAU, a dataset constructed from real-world roundabout videos collected in collaboration with the City of Carmel, Indiana. The dataset contains 342 clips and is annotated with more than 2,000 question-answer pairs covering multiple aspects of traffic anomaly understanding. Building on this benchmark, we propose TAU-R1, a two-layer vision-language framework for TAU. The first layer is a lightweight anomaly classifier that performs coarse anomaly categorisation, while the second layer is a larger anomaly reasoner that generates detailed event summaries. To improve task-specific reasoning, we introduce a two-stage training strategy consisting of decomposed-QA-enhanced supervised fine-tuning followed by TAU-GRPO, a GRPO-based post-training method with TAU-specific reward functions. Experimental results show that TAU-R1 achieves strong performance on both anomaly classification and reasoning tasks while maintaining deployment efficiency. The dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/siri-rouser/TAU-R1

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Roundabout-TAU数据集和TAU-R1框架，用于解决智能交通系统中交通异常理解(TAU)任务的数据集和方法论匮乏问题。数据集包含342个真实环岛视频片段和2000多个问答对，框架采用两层VLM架构结合两阶段训练策略(分解QA增强的SFT + TAU-GRPO后训练)，在异常分类和推理任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 交通异常理解(TAU)对智能交通系统(ITS)的交通安全至关重要。近期视觉-语言模型(VLM)在视频理解方面展现出强大能力，但TAU领域进展仍有限，主要原因是缺乏基准数据集和任务特定方法论。
AI.method: 提出TAU-R1两层视觉-语言框架：第一层是轻量级异常分类器进行粗粒度异常分类，第二层是大型异常推理器生成详细事件摘要。训练采用两阶段策略：分解QA增强的监督微调(SFT) followed by TAU-GRPO(基于GRPO的后训练方法，使用TAU特定奖励函数)。
AI.result: TAU-R1在异常分类和推理任务上均取得强劲性能，同时保持了部署效率。数据集包含342个视频片段和超过2000个问答对，涵盖交通异常理解的多个方面。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建真实世界的环岛视频数据集Roundabout-TAU和提出两阶段训练的TAU-R1框架，有效推动了交通异常理解领域的研究，为ITS交通安全提供了有价值的基准和方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about traffic anomaly understanding in intelligent transportation systems (ITS), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. While it uses Vision-Language Models (VLMs), the application domain is traffic surveillance, not video generation or 3D motion synthesis. It does not address any of the pain points: extracting 3D motion from 2D video, quality control for video generation, visual guidance for 3D motion synthesis, or bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion space. The paper is about classification and reasoning for traffic anomalies, not computer graphics or motion generation.

title: CustomTex: High-fidelity Indoor Scene Texturing via Multi-Reference Customization
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. This version integrates the main paper and supplementary material
summary: The creation of high-fidelity, customizable 3D indoor scene textures remains a significant challenge. While text-driven methods offer flexibility, they lack the precision for fine-grained, instance-level control, and often produce textures with insufficient quality, artifacts, and baked-in shading. To overcome these limitations, we introduce CustomTex, a novel framework for instance-level, high-fidelity scene texturing driven by reference images. CustomTex takes an untextured 3D scene and a set of reference images specifying the desired appearance for each object instance, and generates a unified, high-resolution texture map. The core of our method is a dual-distillation approach that separates semantic control from pixel-level enhancement. We employ semantic-level distillation, equipped with an instance cross-attention, to ensure semantic plausibility and ``reference-instance'' alignment, and pixel-level distillation to enforce high visual fidelity. Both are unified within a Variational Score Distillation (VSD) optimization framework. Experiments demonstrate that CustomTex achieves precise instance-level consistency with reference images and produces textures with superior sharpness, reduced artifacts, and minimal baked-in shading compared to state-of-the-art methods. Our work establishes a more direct and user-friendly path to high-quality, customizable 3D scene appearance editing.

AI.tldr: CustomTex是一个用于实例级高保真3D场景纹理生成的新框架，通过参考图像驱动，结合双重蒸馏方法（语义级蒸馏和像素级蒸馏）在VSD优化框架内实现高分辨率纹理生成。
AI.motivation: 当前文本驱动的3D纹理生成方法缺乏细粒度实例级控制，生成的纹理质量不足、存在伪影和光照烘焙问题。
AI.method: 提出双重蒸馏方法：1) 语义级蒸馏配备实例交叉注意力确保语义合理性和参考-实例对齐；2) 像素级蒸馏确保高视觉保真度。两者统一在变分分数蒸馏(VSD)优化框架中。
AI.result: CustomTex实现了精确的实例级参考图像一致性，生成纹理具有卓越的清晰度、减少的伪影和最小化的光照烘焙。
AI.conclusion: 为高质量、可定制的3D场景外观编辑建立了更直接、用户友好的路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D SCENE TEXTURE generation (applying textures to 3D indoor scene models), which is completely different from the research profile focused on 3D MOTION GENERATION from 2D video priors. The application domains are entirely different: the research profile deals with temporal motion synthesis and video generation, while this paper deals with static texture synthesis for 3D surfaces. Although both are in Computer Graphics, the pain points (motion extraction from video vs. texture quality/control) and core objectives (motion synthesis vs. visual appearance) are orthogonal.

title: Revisiting Autoregressive Models for Generative Image Classification
summary: Class-conditional generative models have emerged as accurate and robust classifiers, with diffusion models demonstrating clear advantages over other visual generative paradigms, including autoregressive (AR) models. In this work, we revisit visual AR-based generative classifiers and identify an important limitation of prior approaches: their reliance on a fixed token order, which imposes a restrictive inductive bias for image understanding. We observe that single-order predictions rely more on partial discriminative cues, while averaging over multiple token orders provides a more comprehensive signal. Based on this insight, we leverage recent any-order AR models to estimate order-marginalized predictions, unlocking the high classification potential of AR models. Our approach consistently outperforms diffusion-based classifiers across diverse image classification benchmarks, while being up to 25x more efficient. Compared to state-of-the-art self-supervised discriminative models, our method delivers competitive classification performance - a notable achievement for generative classifiers.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了视觉自回归(AR)生成分类器，通过利用任意顺序AR模型估计顺序边际化预测，解决了传统固定顺序AR方法的局限性，在图像分类任务上超越了扩散模型分类器，且效率提升高达25倍。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉AR分类器依赖固定token顺序，这对图像理解施加了限制性归纳偏置。单顺序预测更多依赖部分判别线索，而多顺序平均能提供更全面的信号。这一观察促使作者探索如何释放AR模型的分类潜力。
AI.method: 利用最新的任意顺序(any-order)AR模型估计顺序边际化预测，通过对多个token顺序进行平均来获得更全面的分类信号。
AI.result: 在多种图像分类基准数据集上，方法一致性地超越了扩散模型分类器，效率提升高达25倍。与最先进的自监督判别模型相比，方法也具有竞争力的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用任意顺序AR模型进行顺序边际化预测，可以有效释放自回归生成模型的图像分类潜力，这一方法在性能上超越了扩散模型分类器，同时保持了显著的计算效率优势。

The paper is about 2D image classification using autoregressive models - a fundamental application domain mismatch. While both mention autoregressive models, the task, domain (2D image classification vs 3D motion synthesis), and end goal are entirely different. The paper deals with visual understanding for classification, not motion generation or computer graphics.

title: ADAPT: Attention Driven Adaptive Prompt Scheduling and InTerpolating Orthogonal Complements for Rare Concepts Generation
comment: Accepted in CVPR 2026 (findings). 10 pages, 4 figures; supplementary material included (8 pages, 10 figures)
summary: Generating rare compositional concepts in text-to-image synthesis remains a challenge for diffusion models, particularly for attributes that are uncommon in the training data. While recent approaches, such as R2F, address this challenge by utilizing LLM for prompt scheduling, they suffer from inherent variance due to the randomness of language models and suboptimal guidance from iterative text embedding switching. To address these problems, we propose the ADAPT framework, a training-free framework that deterministically plans and semantically aligns prompt schedules, providing consistent guidance to enhance the composition of rare concepts. By leveraging attention scores and orthogonal components, ADAPT significantly enhances compositional generation of rare concepts in the RareBench benchmark without additional training or fine-tuning. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that ADAPT achieves superior performance in RareBench and accurately reflects the semantic information of rare attributes, providing deterministic and precise control over the generation of rare compositions without compromising visual integrity.

AI.tldr: 提出了ADAPT框架，一个无训练的框架，用于在文本到图像合成中生成稀有组合概念，通过注意力分数和正交成分来确定性地计划和语义对齐提示调度。
AI.motivation: 稀有组合概念在扩散模型的训练数据中不常见，现有方法如R2F存在语言模型的随机性导致的方差问题和迭代文本嵌入切换的次优引导问题。
AI.method: ADAPT框架利用注意力分数和正交成分来确定性地计划和语义对齐提示调度，为增强稀有概念组合提供一致的引导，无需额外训练或微调。
AI.result: 在RareBench基准上显著增强了稀有概念的组合生成，实现了优于现有方法的性能，准确反映稀有属性的语义信息。
AI.conclusion: ADAPT提供了对稀有组合生成的决定性和精确控制，在不损害视觉完整性的情况下增强了扩散模型的稀有概念合成能力。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on text-to-image generation for rare concept composition using diffusion models, which is a completely different application domain from the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation from video. While both use diffusion models, the paper addresses 2D image synthesis (static images) while the profile needs video-to-3D-motion generation. The pain points are also unrelated - this paper tackles rare concept组合 in image generation, not extracting 3D motion from 2D video priors or quality control for video generation. The application domains are fundamentally different despite sharing diffusion models as a common method.

title: Adaptive Auxiliary Prompt Blending for Target-Faithful Diffusion Generation
comment: Accepted in CVPR 2026 (main track). 10 pages, 6 figures; supplementary material included (14 pages, 11 figures)
summary: Diffusion-based text-to-image (T2I) models have made remarkable progress in generating photorealistic and semantically rich images. However, when the target concepts lie in low-density regions of the training distribution, these models often produce semantically misaligned or structurally inconsistent results. This limitation arises from the long-tailed nature of text-image datasets, where rare concepts or editing instructions are underrepresented. To address this, we introduce Adaptive Auxiliary Prompt Blending (AAPB) - a unified framework that stabilizes the diffusion process in low-density regions. AAPB leverages auxiliary anchor prompts to provide semantic support in rare concept generation and structural support in image editing, ensuring faithful guidance toward the target prompt. Unlike prior heuristic prompt alternation methods, AAPB derives a closed-form adaptive coefficient that optimally balances the influence between the auxiliary anchor and the target prompt at each diffusion step. Grounded in Tweedie's identity, our formulation provides a principled and training-free framework for adaptive prompt blending, ensuring stable and target-faithful generation. We demonstrate the effectiveness of adaptive interpolation over fixed interpolation through controlled experiments and empirically show consistent improvements on the RareBench and FlowEdit datasets, achieving superior semantic accuracy and structural fidelity compared to prior training-free baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AAPB框架，通过自适应辅助提示混合解决扩散模型在低密度区域生成罕见概念或编辑时出现的语义错位和结构不一致问题，基于Tweedie恒等式提供无需训练的自适应提示融合方法。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在训练分布的低密度区域（罕见概念或编辑指令）表现不佳，常产生语义错位或结构不一致的结果，这是因为文本-图像数据集的长尾分布导致稀有概念被低估。
AI.method: AAPB利用辅助锚点提示为罕见概念生成提供语义支持，为图像编辑提供结构支持，通过基于Tweedie恒等式的闭合形式自适应系数，在每个扩散步骤中最优平衡辅助锚点和目标提示的影响，实现无需训练的自适应提示混合。
AI.result: 在RareBench和FlowEdit数据集上的控制实验表明，自适应插值优于固定插值方法，在语义准确性和结构保真度方面均优于先前无需训练的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: AAPB为低密度区域的自适应提示混合提供了原则性、无需训练的框架，确保稳定且忠实于目标的生成，在罕见概念生成和图像编辑任务上展现了 Consistently一致的改进。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper's pain points (rare concept handling, semantic alignment in image generation) have no relevance to the profile's goals (extracting 3D motion from video, quality control for video generation, bridging 2D-3D representations for motion).

title: ARIADNE: A Perception-Reasoning Synergy Framework for Trustworthy Coronary Angiography Analysis
summary: Conventional pixel-wise loss functions fail to enforce topological constraints in coronary vessel segmentation, producing fragmented vascular trees despite high pixel-level accuracy. We present ARIADNE, a two-stage framework coupling preference-aligned perception with RL-based diagnostic reasoning for topologically coherent stenosis detection. The perception module employs DPO to fine-tune the Sa2VA vision-language foundation model using Betti number constraints as preference signals, aligning the policy toward geometrically complete vessel structures rather than pixel-wise overlap metrics. The reasoning module formulates stenosis localization as a Markov Decision Process with an explicit rejection mechanism that autonomously defers ambiguous anatomical candidates such as bifurcations and vessel crossings, shifting from coverage maximization to reliability optimization. On 1,400 clinical angiograms, ARIADNE achieves state-of-the-art centerline Dice of 0.838, reduces false positives by 41% compared to geometric baselines. External validation on multi-center benchmarks ARCADE and XCAD confirms generalization across acquisition protocols. This represents the first application of DPO for topological alignment in medical imaging, demonstrating that preference-based learning over structural constraints mitigates topological violations while maintaining diagnostic sensitivity in interventional cardiology workflows.

AI.tldr: ARIADNE是一种结合偏好对齐感知与基于RL的诊断推理的两阶段框架，用于冠脉血管分割的拓扑一致性狭窄检测。该方法首次将DPO应用于医学影像的拓扑对齐。
AI.motivation: 传统像素级损失函数无法强制拓扑约束，导致血管树碎片化；现有方法在分叉和交叉处易产生误报，缺乏对模糊解剖候选区域的拒绝机制。
AI.method: 感知模块：使用DPO微调Sa2VA视觉语言基础模型，以Betti数约束作为偏好信号；推理模块：将狭窄定位建模为MDP，包含显式拒绝机制以自主推迟分叉和交叉等模糊解剖候选区域。
AI.result: 在1400张临床血管造影上达到0.838的中心线Dice，比几何基线减少41%误报；外部验证在ARCADE和XCAD多中心基准上确认了跨采集协议的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 首次将DPO应用于医学影像拓扑对齐，证明了基于结构约束的偏好学习可缓解拓扑违规，同时保持介入心脏病学工作流程中的诊断敏感性。

These are completely different application domains - medical imaging analysis vs computer graphics/video generation. While both may use Vision-Language Models, the purpose and domain are entirely different (medical diagnosis vs 3D motion synthesis).

title: DreamPartGen: Semantically Grounded Part-Level 3D Generation via Collaborative Latent Denoising
summary: Understanding and generating 3D objects as compositions of meaningful parts is fundamental to human perception and reasoning. However, most text-to-3D methods overlook the semantic and functional structure of parts. While recent part-aware approaches introduce decomposition, they remain largely geometry-focused, lacking semantic grounding and failing to model how parts align with textual descriptions or their inter-part relations. We propose DreamPartGen, a framework for semantically grounded, part-aware text-to-3D generation. DreamPartGen introduces Duplex Part Latents (DPLs) that jointly model each part's geometry and appearance, and Relational Semantic Latents (RSLs) that capture inter-part dependencies derived from language. A synchronized co-denoising process enforces mutual geometric and semantic consistency, enabling coherent, interpretable, and text-aligned 3D synthesis. Across multiple benchmarks, DreamPartGen delivers state-of-the-art performance in geometric fidelity and text-shape alignment.

AI.tldr: DreamPartGen是一个语义锚定的部件感知文本到3D生成框架，通过双部件潜在变量(DPLs)和关系语义潜在变量(RSLs)实现一致的三维合成。
AI.motivation: 当前文本到3D方法忽略部件的语义和功能结构，现有的部件感知方法仍以几何为中心，缺乏语义基础，无法建模部件与文本描述的对齐及部件间关系。
AI.method: 提出Duplex Part Latents (DPLs)联合建模每个部件的几何和外观，以及Relational Semantic Latents (RSLs)捕捉来自语言推导的部件间依赖关系，采用同步协同去噪过程确保几何和语义一致性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，DreamPartGen在几何保真度和文本-形状对齐方面实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: DreamPartGen能够实现连贯、可解释且文本对齐的3D合成，为部件感知的文本到3D生成提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on extracting 3D MOTION from 2D video, video generation quality control, and bridging 2D video to 3D MOTION synthesis. The paper is about TEXT-TO-3D SHAPE generation (creating static 3D objects from text). This is not about video, not about motion generation, and not about video-to-3D extraction - it's purely text-to-3D static shape generation, which is a fundamentally different application domain in computer graphics.

title: Reconstruction Matters: Learning Geometry-Aligned BEV Representation through 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) perception serves as a cornerstone for autonomous driving, offering a unified spatial representation that fuses surrounding-view images to enable reasoning for various downstream tasks, such as semantic segmentation, 3D object detection, and motion prediction. However, most existing BEV perception frameworks adopt an end-to-end training paradigm, where image features are directly transformed into the BEV space and optimized solely through downstream task supervision. This formulation treats the entire perception process as a black box, often lacking explicit 3D geometric understanding and interpretability, leading to suboptimal performance. In this paper, we claim that an explicit 3D representation matters for accurate BEV perception, and we propose Splat2BEV, a Gaussian Splatting-assisted framework for BEV tasks. Splat2BEV aims to learn BEV feature representations that are both semantically rich and geometrically precise. We first pre-train a Gaussian generator that explicitly reconstructs 3D scenes from multi-view inputs, enabling the generation of geometry-aligned feature representations. These representations are then projected into the BEV space to serve as inputs for downstream tasks. Extensive experiments on nuScenes and argoverse dataset demonstrate that Splat2BEV achieves state-of-the-art performance and validate the effectiveness of incorporating explicit 3D reconstruction into BEV perception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Splat2BEV框架，利用Gaussian Splatting技术辅助BEV感知任务，通过显式3D重建提升BEV特征的几何精度和语义丰富度。
AI.motivation: 现有BEV感知框架采用端到端训练，缺乏显式的3D几何理解和可解释性，导致性能次优。
AI.method: 预训练高斯生成器从多视角输入显式重建3D场景，生成几何对齐的特征表示，再投影到BEV空间作为下游任务输入。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和argoverse数据集上实现SOTA性能，验证了将显式3D重建融入BEV感知有效性。
AI.conclusion: 显式3D表示对准确BEV感知至关重要，Splat2BEV通过结合Gaussian Splatting与BEV感知显著提升了性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D scene reconstruction for BEV (Bird's Eye View) perception in autonomous driving, while the research profile is about 3D motion generation from 2D video (likely human motion synthesis). Although both use 3D Gaussian Splatting, they address completely different application domains - scene reconstruction/perception vs. motion generation. The research profile focuses on video generation models, bridging 2D-to-3D motion space, and visual guidance for motion synthesis, which are not addressed by this paper about autonomous driving perception.

title: Tinted Frames: Question Framing Blinds Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have been shown to be blind, often underutilizing their visual inputs even on tasks that require visual reasoning. In this work, we demonstrate that VLMs are selectively blind. They modulate the amount of attention applied to visual inputs based on linguistic framing even when alternative framings demand identical visual reasoning. Using visual attention as a probe, we quantify how framing alters both the amount and distribution of attention over the image. Constrained framings, such as multiple choice and yes/no, induce substantially lower attention to image context compared to open-ended, reduce focus on task-relevant regions, and shift attention towards uninformative tokens. We further demonstrate that this attention misallocation is the principal cause of degraded accuracy and cross-framing inconsistency. Building on this mechanistic insight, we introduce a lightweight prompt-tuning method using learnable tokens that encourages the robust, visually grounded attention patterns observed in open-ended settings, improving visual grounding and improving performance across framings.

AI.tldr: 研究揭示视觉语言模型(VLM)存在"选择性失明"问题——即使不同语言表述要求相同的视觉推理，模型也会根据语言框架调整对视觉输入的注意力分配。
AI.motivation: VLM常被证明是"盲的"，即使在需要视觉推理的任务中也未能充分利用视觉输入。
AI.method: 使用视觉注意力作为探针，量化框架如何改变图像上的注意力数量和分布；提出一种基于可学习标记的轻量级提示调整方法。
AI.result: 约束性框架（如选择题和是否题）导致对图像情境的注意力显著降低，任务相关区域的聚焦减少，注意力转向无信息标记。这种注意力错配是准确率下降和跨框架不一致的主要原因。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法可鼓励稳健的视觉注意力模式，改善视觉定位并提升跨框架性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Vision-Language Model attention behavior and "selective blindness" in VLMs when processing different question framings. While it uses VLMs, this is NOT a Computer Graphics paper - it's an AI/ML research paper about understanding VLM limitations. It does NOT address any of the stated pain points: extracting 3D motion from 2D video, quality control of video generation outputs, visual guidance for 3D motion synthesis, or bridging 2D-3D gaps. The application domain is completely different - this is about VLM interpretability research, not 3D motion generation or video generation for computer graphics.

title: RPiAE: A Representation-Pivoted Autoencoder Enhancing Both Image Generation and Editing
summary: Diffusion models have become the dominant paradigm for image generation and editing, with latent diffusion models shifting denoising to a compact latent space for efficiency and scalability. Recent attempts to leverage pretrained visual representation models as tokenizer priors either align diffusion features to representation features or directly reuse representation encoders as frozen tokenizers. Although such approaches can improve generation metrics, they often suffer from limited reconstruction fidelity due to frozen encoders, which in turn degrades editing quality, as well as overly high-dimensional latents that make diffusion modeling difficult. To address these limitations, We propose Representation-Pivoted AutoEncoder, a representation-based tokenizer that improves both generation and editing. We introduce Representation-Pivot Regularization, a training strategy that enables a representation-initialized encoder to be fine-tuned for reconstruction while preserving the semantic structure of the pretrained representation space, followed by a variational bridge which compress latent space into a compact one for better diffusion modeling. We adopt an objective-decoupled stage-wise training strategy that sequentially optimizes generative tractability and reconstruction-fidelity objectives. Together, these components yield a tokenizer that preserves strong semantics, reconstructs faithfully, and produces latents with reduced diffusion modeling complexity. Experiments demonstrate that RPiAE outperforms other visual tokenizers on text-to-image generation and image editing, while delivering the best reconstruction fidelity among representation-based tokenizers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Representation-Pivoted AutoEncoder (RPiAE)，一种基于预训练视觉表示的tokenizer，通过表示轴正则化和变分桥接压缩技术，在保持语义信息的同时提高重建保真度并降低扩散建模复杂度，在文本到图像生成和图像编辑任务上优于其他视觉tokenizer。
AI.motivation: 当前利用预训练视觉表示模型作为tokenizer先验的方法存在两个主要问题：1) 冻结编码器导致重建保真度有限，进而影响编辑质量；2) 潜在空间维度太高，增加扩散建模难度。因此需要一种方法既能保留语义结构，又能实现高质量重建和高效扩散建模。
AI.method: 提出三个核心技术创新：1) 表示轴正则化(Representation-Pivot Regularization)：允许初始化的表示编码器进行微调以重建，同时保持预训练表示空间的语义结构；2) 变分桥接(Variational Bridge)：将潜在空间压缩为紧凑空间以改善扩散建模；3) 目标解耦的阶段性训练策略：顺序优化生成可处理性和重建保真度目标。
AI.result: 实验表明，RPiAE在文本到图像生成和图像编辑任务上优于其他视觉tokenizer，同时在表示基tokenizer中实现最佳重建保真度。
AI.conclusion: RPiAE成功实现了语义保留、忠实重建和降低扩散建模复杂度的三重目标，为视觉tokenizer设计提供了新的有效范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 2D image generation and editing, not 3D motion generation. While it uses diffusion models and autoencoders (similar methods), the application domain is completely different - it's focused on text-to-image synthesis and image editing, not extracting 3D motion from video or visual guidance for motion synthesis. The research profile specifically needs methods for bridging 2D video to 3D motion space, which is unrelated to this 2D image generation work.

title: LVOmniBench: Pioneering Long Audio-Video Understanding Evaluation for Omnimodal LLMs
summary: Recent advancements in omnimodal large language models (OmniLLMs) have significantly improved the comprehension of audio and video inputs. However, current evaluations primarily focus on short audio and video clips ranging from 10 seconds to 5 minutes, failing to reflect the demands of real-world applications, where videos typically run for tens of minutes. To address this critical gap, we introduce LVOmniBench, a new benchmark designed specifically for the cross-modal comprehension of long-form audio and video. This dataset comprises high-quality videos sourced from open platforms that feature rich audio-visual dynamics. Through rigorous manual selection and annotation, LVOmniBench comprises 275 videos, ranging in duration from 10 to 90 minutes, and 1,014 question-answer (QA) pairs. LVOmniBench aims to rigorously evaluate the capabilities of OmniLLMs across domains, including long-term memory, temporal localization, fine-grained understanding, and multimodal perception. Our extensive evaluation reveals that current OmniLLMs encounter significant challenges when processing extended audio-visual inputs. Open-source models generally achieve accuracies below 35%, whereas the Gemini 3 Pro reaches a peak accuracy of approximately 65%. We anticipate that this dataset, along with our empirical findings, will stimulate further research and the development of advanced models capable of resolving complex cross-modal understanding problems within long-form audio-visual contexts.

AI.tldr: LVOmniBench是一个针对长形式音视频跨模态理解的新 benchmark，包含275个视频（10-90分钟）和1,014个问答对，用于评估OmniLLMs在长期记忆、时间定位、细粒度理解和多模态感知方面的能力
AI.motivation: 现有评估主要关注10秒到5分钟的短音视频 clips，未能反映实际应用中数十分钟视频的需求，存在关键差距
AI.method: 从开放平台获取高质量视频，经过严格的人工筛选和标注，构建包含275个视频（时长10-90分钟）和1,014个问答对的 benchmark
AI.result: 当前OmniLLMs在处理长音视频输入时面临重大挑战：开源模型准确率普遍低于35%，Gemini 3 Pro达到最高约65%的准确率
AI.conclusion: LVOmniBench benchmark能够激发后续研究，推动能够处理复杂长形式音视频跨模态理解问题的高级模型开发。当前OmniLLMs在处理长音频和视频输入时面临重大挑战。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain.
